Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*
This is the second of a sequence of files with the purpose of showing that the bicategory of univalent monoidal categories is again univalent.
In this file we construct one side of the first displayed layer above the bicategory of univalent categories, more precisely:
The total category corresponding to this displayed layer is the univalent bicategory defined as follows:
- The objects are categories together with a binary operation (which will be the tensor product for the monoidal structure).
- The morphisms are functors which preserve the tensor in a lax/weak sense (i.e. a non-necessarily isomorphic morphism).
- The 2-cells are natural transformations which (at tensor products) commute the tensor-preserving morphisms.
*)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Constructions.

Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfUnivCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispUnivalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispInvertibles.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.

Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.UnivalenceMonCat.CurriedMonoidalCategories.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope mor_disp_scope.

Import TensorNotation.

Section TensorLayer.

  Import TensorNotation.

  
disp_cat_ob_mor bicat_of_univ_cats

  
disp_cat_ob_mor bicat_of_univ_cats

    
∏ x y : bicat_of_univ_cats,
tensor x → tensor y → bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU

    exact (λ C D TC TD F, preserves_tensor TC TD F).
  Defined.

  
disp_cat_id_comp bicat_of_univ_cats
  disp_tensor_disp_ob_mor

  
disp_cat_id_comp bicat_of_univ_cats
  disp_tensor_disp_ob_mor

    
∏ (x : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(xx : disp_tensor_disp_ob_mor x),
xx -->[ identity x] xx
∏ (x y z : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : disp_tensor_disp_ob_mor x)
(yy : disp_tensor_disp_ob_mor y)
(zz : disp_tensor_disp_ob_mor z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz

    
∏ (x : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(xx : disp_tensor_disp_ob_mor x),
xx -->[ identity x] xx
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: disp_tensor_disp_ob_mor C
TC -->[ identity C] TC

      apply identityfunctor_preserves_tensor.
    
∏ (x y z : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : disp_tensor_disp_ob_mor x)
(yy : disp_tensor_disp_ob_mor y)
(zz : disp_tensor_disp_ob_mor z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz
 
C, D, E: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
TC: disp_tensor_disp_ob_mor C
TD: disp_tensor_disp_ob_mor D
TE: disp_tensor_disp_ob_mor E
TC -->[ F] TD → TD -->[ G] TE → TC -->[ F · G] TE

      apply compositions_preserves_tensor.
  Defined.

  Definition disp_tensor_disp_catdata : disp_cat_data bicat_of_univ_cats
    := (disp_tensor_disp_ob_mor,,disp_tensor_disp_id_comp).

  
disp_2cell_struct disp_tensor_disp_ob_mor

  
disp_2cell_struct disp_tensor_disp_ob_mor

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
TC: disp_tensor_disp_ob_mor C
TD: disp_tensor_disp_ob_mor D
TC -->[ F] TD → TC -->[ G] TD → UU

    exact (λ ptF ptG, preservestensor_commutes (pr1 ptF) (pr1 ptG) α).
  Defined.

  
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
TC: disp_tensor_disp_catdata C
TD: disp_tensor_disp_catdata D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
isaprop
  (bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C D F G α TC TD ptF
     ptG)

  
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
TC: disp_tensor_disp_catdata C
TD: disp_tensor_disp_catdata D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
isaprop
  (bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C D F G α TC TD ptF
     ptG)

    apply isaprop_preservestensor_commutes.
  Qed.

  Definition bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
    :  disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells bicat_of_univ_cats
    := (disp_tensor_disp_catdata,, bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct).

  
disp_prebicat_ops
  bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells

  
disp_prebicat_ops
  bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells

    
∏ (a b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y), disp_2cells (id2 f) f' f'
∏ (a b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y),
disp_2cells (Bicat.lunitor f) (id_disp x ;; f') f'
∏ (a b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y),
disp_2cells (Bicat.runitor f) (f' ;; id_disp y) f'
∏ (a b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y),
disp_2cells (linvunitor f) f' (id_disp x ;; f')
∏ (a b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y),
disp_2cells (rinvunitor f) f' (f' ;; id_disp y)
∏ (a b c d : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(w : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(z : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells d)
(ff : w -->[ f] x) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : y -->[ h] z),
disp_2cells (rassociator f g h) (ff ;; gg ;; hh)
  (ff ;; (gg ;; hh))
∏ (a b c d : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(w : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(z : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells d)
(ff : w -->[ f] x) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : y -->[ h] z),
disp_2cells (lassociator f g h) (ff ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (ff ;; gg ;; hh)
∏ (a b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f g h : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(r : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats f g)
(s : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats g h)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : x -->[ h] y),
disp_2cells r ff gg
→ disp_2cells s gg hh → disp_2cells (vcomp2 r s) ff hh
∏ (a b c : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g1 g2 : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats g1 g2)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(z : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg1 : y -->[ g1] z)
(gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
disp_2cells r gg1 gg2
→ disp_2cells (lwhisker f r) (ff ;; gg1) (ff ;; gg2)
∏ (a b c : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f1 f2 : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats f1 f2)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(z : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(ff1 : x -->[ f1] y) (ff2 : x -->[ f2] y)
(gg : y -->[ g] z),
disp_2cells r ff1 ff2
→ disp_2cells (rwhisker g r) (ff1 ;; gg) (ff2 ;; gg)

    
∏ (a b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y), disp_2cells (id2 f) f' f'
 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
disp_2cells (id2 F) ptF ptF

      apply identitynattrans_preservestensor_commutes.
    
∏ (a b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y),
disp_2cells (Bicat.lunitor f) (id_disp x ;; f') f'
 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
disp_2cells (Bicat.lunitor F) (id_disp TC ;; ptF) ptF

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 (id_disp TC ;; ptF) x y
· Bicat.lunitor F (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
Bicat.lunitor F x ⊗^{ TD} Bicat.lunitor F y
· pr1 ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 (id_disp TC ;; ptF) x y =
Bicat.lunitor F x ⊗^{ TD} Bicat.lunitor F y
· pr1 ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
compositions_preserves_tensor_data
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TC) ptF x y =
identity (F x) ⊗^{ TD} identity (F y) · pr1 ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
compositions_preserves_tensor_data
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TC) ptF x y =
identity (F x ⊗_{ TD} F y) · pr1 ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
compositions_preserves_tensor_data
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TC) ptF x y =
pr1 ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
compositions_preserves_tensor_data
  (λ x y : C,
   identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))) ptF x
  y = pr1 ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
ptF (identity C x) (identity C y)
· (# F)%cat
    (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))) =
pr1 ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
ptF (identity C x) (identity C y)
· identity (F (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))) =
pr1 ptF x y

      apply id_right.
    
∏ (a b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y),
disp_2cells (Bicat.runitor f) (f' ;; id_disp y) f'
 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
disp_2cells (Bicat.runitor F) (ptF ;; id_disp TD) ptF

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 (ptF ;; id_disp TD) x y
· Bicat.runitor F (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
Bicat.runitor F x ⊗^{ TD} Bicat.runitor F y
· pr1 ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 (ptF ;; id_disp TD) x y =
Bicat.runitor F x ⊗^{ TD} Bicat.runitor F y
· pr1 ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TD) x y =
identity (F x) ⊗^{ TD} identity (F y) · pr1 ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TD (F x) (F y)
· (# (functor_identity D))%cat (ptF x y) =
identity (F x) ⊗^{ TD} identity (F y) · pr1 ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
identity (functor_identity D (F x ⊗_{ TD} F y))
· (# (functor_identity D))%cat (ptF x y) =
identity (F x) ⊗^{ TD} identity (F y) · pr1 ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
(# (functor_identity D))%cat (ptF x y) =
identity (F x) ⊗^{ TD} identity (F y) · pr1 ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
ptF x y =
identity (F x) ⊗^{ TD} identity (F y) · pr1 ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
ptF x y = identity (F x ⊗_{ TD} F y) · pr1 ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
ptF x y = pr1 ptF x y

      apply idpath.
    
∏ (a b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y),
disp_2cells (linvunitor f) f' (id_disp x ;; f')
 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
disp_2cells (linvunitor F) ptF (id_disp TC ;; ptF)

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y · linvunitor F (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
linvunitor F x ⊗^{ TD} linvunitor F y
· pr1 (id_disp TC ;; ptF) x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y =
linvunitor F x ⊗^{ TD} linvunitor F y
· pr1 (id_disp TC ;; ptF) x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y =
identity (F x) ⊗^{ TD} identity (F y)
· compositions_preserves_tensor_data
    (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TC) ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y =
identity (F x ⊗_{ TD} F y)
· compositions_preserves_tensor_data
    (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TC) ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y =
compositions_preserves_tensor_data
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TC) ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y =
compositions_preserves_tensor_data
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TC) ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y =
ptF (functor_identity C x) (functor_identity C y)
· (# F)%cat
    (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TC x y)

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y =
ptF x y
· (# F)%cat
    (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TC x y)

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y =
ptF x y
· (# F)%cat
    (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y =
ptF x y
· identity (F (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y = ptF x y

      apply idpath.
    
∏ (a b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y),
disp_2cells (rinvunitor f) f' (f' ;; id_disp y)
 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
disp_2cells (rinvunitor F) ptF (ptF ;; id_disp TD)

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y · rinvunitor F (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
rinvunitor F x ⊗^{ TD} rinvunitor F y
· pr1 (ptF ;; id_disp TD) x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y =
rinvunitor F x ⊗^{ TD} rinvunitor F y
· pr1 (ptF ;; id_disp TD) x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y =
identity (F x) ⊗^{ TD} identity (F y)
· compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF
    (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TD) x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y =
identity (F x ⊗_{ TD} F y)
· compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF
    (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TD) x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y =
identity (F x ⊗_{ TD} F y)
· (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TD (F x)
     (F y) · (# (functor_identity D))%cat (ptF x y))

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y =
identity (F x ⊗_{ TD} F y)
· (identity (functor_identity D (F x ⊗_{ TD} F y))
   · (# (functor_identity D))%cat (ptF x y))

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y =
identity (F x ⊗_{ TD} F y)
· (identity (F x ⊗_{ TD} F y) · ptF x y)

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y = identity (F x ⊗_{ TD} F y) · ptF x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y = ptF x y

      apply idpath.
    
∏ (a b c d : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(w : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(z : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells d)
(ff : w -->[ f] x) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : y -->[ h] z),
disp_2cells (rassociator f g h) (ff ;; gg ;; hh)
  (ff ;; (gg ;; hh))
 
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ E, W ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
disp_2cells (rassociator F G H) (ptF ;; ptG ;; ptH)
  (ptF ;; (ptG ;; ptH))

      
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ E, W ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
x, y: C
pr1 (ptF ;; ptG ;; ptH) x y
· rassociator F G H (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
rassociator F G H x ⊗^{ TW} rassociator F G H y
· pr1 (ptF ;; (ptG ;; ptH)) x y

      
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ E, W ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
x, y: C
compositions_preserves_tensor_data
  (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF ptG) ptH x y
· identity (H (G (F (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))) =
identity (H (G (F x))) ⊗^{ TW} identity (H (G (F y)))
· compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF
    (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptG ptH) x y

      
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ E, W ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
x, y: C
compositions_preserves_tensor_data
  (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF ptG) ptH x y =
identity (H (G (F x))) ⊗^{ TW} identity (H (G (F y)))
· compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF
    (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptG ptH) x y

      
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ E, W ⟧

TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
x, y: C
compositions_preserves_tensor_data
  (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF ptG) ptH x y =
identity (H (G (F x)) ⊗_{ TW} H (G (F y)))
· compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF
    (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptG ptH) x y

      
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ E, W ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
x, y: C
compositions_preserves_tensor_data
  (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF ptG) ptH x y =
compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF
  (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptG ptH) x y

      
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ E, W ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
x, y: C
compositions_preserves_tensor_data
  (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF ptG) ptH x y =
compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF
  (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptG ptH) x y

      
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ E, W ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
x, y: C
ptH ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y)
· (# H)%cat (ptG (F x) (F y) · (# G)%cat (ptF x y)) =
ptH (G (F x)) (G (F y)) · (# H)%cat (ptG (F x) (F y))
· (# (G ∙ H))%cat (ptF x y)

      
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ E, W ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
x, y: C
ptH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
· (# H)%cat (ptG (F x) (F y) · (# G)%cat (ptF x y)) =
ptH (G (F x)) (G (F y)) · (# H)%cat (ptG (F x) (F y))
· (# H)%cat ((# G)%cat (ptF x y))

      
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ E, W ⟧

TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
x, y: C
ptH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
· (# H)%cat (ptG (F x) (F y) · (# G)%cat (ptF x y)) =
ptH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
· ((# H)%cat (ptG (F x) (F y))
   · (# H)%cat ((# G)%cat (ptF x y)))

      
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ E, W ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
x, y: C
ptH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
· ((# H)%cat (ptG (F x) (F y))
   · (# H)%cat ((# G)%cat (ptF x y))) =
ptH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
· ((# H)%cat (ptG (F x) (F y))
   · (# H)%cat ((# G)%cat (ptF x y)))

      apply idpath.
    
∏ (a b c d : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(w : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(z : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells d)
(ff : w -->[ f] x) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : y -->[ h] z),
disp_2cells (lassociator f g h) (ff ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (ff ;; gg ;; hh)
 
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ E, W ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
disp_2cells (lassociator F G H) (ptF ;; (ptG ;; ptH))
  (ptF ;; ptG ;; ptH)

      
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ E, W ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
x, y: C
pr1 (ptF ;; (ptG ;; ptH)) x y
· lassociator F G H (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
lassociator F G H x ⊗^{ TW} lassociator F G H y
· pr1 (ptF ;; ptG ;; ptH) x y

      
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧

TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
x, y: C
compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF
  (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptG ptH) x y
· identity (H (G (F (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))) =
identity (H (G (F x))) ⊗^{ TW} identity (H (G (F y)))
· compositions_preserves_tensor_data
    (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF ptG) ptH x
    y

compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF
  (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptG ptH) x y =
identity (H (G (F x))) ⊗^{ TW} identity (H (G (F y)))
· compositions_preserves_tensor_data
    (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF ptG) ptH x
    y

      
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧

  (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptG ptH) x y =
identity (H (G (F x)) ⊗_{ TW} H (G (F y)))
· compositions_preserves_tensor_data
    (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF ptG) ptH x
    y

      
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ E, W ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
x, y: C
compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF
  (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptG ptH) x y =
compositions_preserves_tensor_data
  (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF ptG) ptH x y

      
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ E, W ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
x, y: C
compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF
  (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptG ptH) x y =
compositions_preserves_tensor_data
  (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF ptG) ptH x y

      
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ E, W ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
x, y: C
ptH (G (F x)) (G (F y)) · (# H)%cat (ptG (F x) (F y))
· (# (G ∙ H))%cat (ptF x y) =
ptH ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y)
· (# H)%cat (ptG (F x) (F y) · (# G)%cat (ptF x y))

      
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ E, W ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
x, y: C
ptH (G (F x)) (G (F y)) · (# H)%cat (ptG (F x) (F y))
· (# H)%cat ((# G)%cat (ptF x y)) =
ptH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
· (# H)%cat (ptG (F x) (F y) · (# G)%cat (ptF x y))

      
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ E, W ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
x, y: C
ptH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
· ((# H)%cat (ptG (F x) (F y))
   · (# H)%cat ((# G)%cat (ptF x y))) =
ptH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
· (# H)%cat (ptG (F x) (F y) · (# G)%cat (ptF x y))

      
C, D, E, W: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ E, W ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
TW: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells W
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TE -->[ H] TW
x, y: C
ptH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
· ((# H)%cat (ptG (F x) (F y))
   · (# H)%cat ((# G)%cat (ptF x y))) =
ptH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
· ((# H)%cat (ptG (F x) (F y))
   · (# H)%cat ((# G)%cat (ptF x y)))

      apply idpath.
    
∏ (a b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f g h : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(r : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats f g)
(s : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats g h)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : x -->[ h] y),
disp_2cells r ff gg
→ disp_2cells s gg hh → disp_2cells (vcomp2 r s) ff hh
 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G, H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
β: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G H
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
ptH: TC -->[ H] TD
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptF ptG
ptcβ: disp_2cells β ptG ptH
disp_2cells (vcomp2 α β) ptF ptH

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G, H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
β: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G H
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
ptH: TC -->[ H] TD
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptF ptG
ptcβ: disp_2cells β ptG ptH
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y · vcomp2 α β (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
vcomp2 α β x ⊗^{ TD} vcomp2 α β y · pr1 ptH x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G, H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
β: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G H
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
ptH: TC -->[ H] TD
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptF ptG
ptcβ: disp_2cells β ptG ptH
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y · (α (x ⊗_{ TC} y) · β (x ⊗_{ TC} y)) =
(α x · β x) ⊗^{ TD} (α y · β y) · pr1 ptH x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G, H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
β: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G H
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
ptH: TC -->[ H] TD
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptF ptG
ptcβ: disp_2cells β ptG ptH
x, y: C
pr1 ptF x y · α (x ⊗_{ TC} y) · β (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
(α x · β x) ⊗^{ TD} (α y · β y) · pr1 ptH x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G, H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
β: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G H
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
ptH: TC -->[ H] TD
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptF ptG
ptcβ: disp_2cells β ptG ptH
x, y: C
α x ⊗^{ TD} α y · pr1 ptG x y · β (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
(α x · β x) ⊗^{ TD} (α y · β y) · pr1 ptH x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G, H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
β: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G H
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
ptH: TC -->[ H] TD
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptF ptG
ptcβ: disp_2cells β ptG ptH
x, y: C
α x ⊗^{ TD} α y · (pr1 ptG x y · β (x ⊗_{ TC} y)) =
(α x · β x) ⊗^{ TD} (α y · β y) · pr1 ptH x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G, H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
β: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G H
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
ptH: TC -->[ H] TD
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptF ptG
ptcβ: disp_2cells β ptG ptH
x, y: C
α x ⊗^{ TD} α y · (β x ⊗^{ TD} β y · pr1 ptH x y) =
(α x · β x) ⊗^{ TD} (α y · β y) · pr1 ptH x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G, H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
β: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G H
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
ptH: TC -->[ H] TD
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptF ptG
ptcβ: disp_2cells β ptG ptH
x, y: C
α x ⊗^{ TD} α y · β x ⊗^{ TD} β y · pr1 ptH x y =
(α x · β x) ⊗^{ TD} (α y · β y) · pr1 ptH x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G, H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
β: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G H
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
ptH: TC -->[ H] TD
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptF ptG
ptcβ: disp_2cells β ptG ptH
x, y: C
α x ⊗^{ TD} α y · β x ⊗^{ TD} β y · pr1 ptH x y =
α x ⊗^{ TD} α y · β x ⊗^{ TD} β y · pr1 ptH x y

      apply idpath.
    
∏ (a b c : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g1 g2 : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats g1 g2)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(z : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg1 : y -->[ g1] z)
(gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
disp_2cells r gg1 gg2
→ disp_2cells (lwhisker f r) (ff ;; gg1) (ff ;; gg2)
 
C, D, E: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G, H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G H
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TD -->[ H] TE
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptG ptH
disp_2cells (lwhisker F α) (ptF ;; ptG) (ptF ;; ptH)

      
C, D, E: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G, H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G H
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TD -->[ H] TE
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptG ptH
x, y: C
pr1 (ptF ;; ptG) x y · lwhisker F α (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
lwhisker F α x ⊗^{ TE} lwhisker F α y
· pr1 (ptF ;; ptH) x y

      
C, D, E: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G, H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G H
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TD -->[ H] TE
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptG ptH
x, y: C
compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF ptG x y
· pr1 α (pr1 F (x ⊗_{ TC} y)) =
pr1 α (pr1 F x) ⊗^{ TE} pr1 α (pr1 F y)
· compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF ptH x y

      
C, D, E: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G, H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G H
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TD -->[ H] TE
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptG ptH
x, y: C
ptG (F x) (F y) · (# G)%cat (ptF x y)
· pr1 α (pr1 F (x ⊗_{ TC} y)) =
pr1 α (pr1 F x) ⊗^{ TE} pr1 α (pr1 F y)
· (ptH (F x) (F y) · (# H)%cat (ptF x y))

      
C, D, E: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G, H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G H
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TD -->[ H] TE
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptG ptH
x, y: C
ptG (F x) (F y)
· ((# G)%cat (ptF x y) · pr1 α (pr1 F (x ⊗_{ TC} y))) =
pr1 α (pr1 F x) ⊗^{ TE} pr1 α (pr1 F y)
· (ptH (F x) (F y) · (# H)%cat (ptF x y))

      
C, D, E: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G, H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G H
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TD -->[ H] TE
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptG ptH
x, y: C
ptG (F x) (F y)
· (pr1 α (F x ⊗_{ TD} F y) · (# H)%cat (ptF x y)) =
pr1 α (pr1 F x) ⊗^{ TE} pr1 α (pr1 F y)
· (ptH (F x) (F y) · (# H)%cat (ptF x y))

      
C, D, E: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G, H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G H
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TD -->[ H] TE
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptG ptH
x, y: C
ptG (F x) (F y) · pr1 α (F x ⊗_{ TD} F y)
· (# H)%cat (ptF x y) =
pr1 α (pr1 F x) ⊗^{ TE} pr1 α (pr1 F y)
· (ptH (F x) (F y) · (# H)%cat (ptF x y))

      
C, D, E: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G, H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G H
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TD -->[ H] TE
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptG ptH
x, y: C
α (F x) ⊗^{ TE} α (F y) · pr1 ptH (F x) (F y)
· (# H)%cat (ptF x y) =
pr1 α (pr1 F x) ⊗^{ TE} pr1 α (pr1 F y)
· (ptH (F x) (F y) · (# H)%cat (ptF x y))

      
C, D, E: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
G, H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G H
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TD -->[ G] TE
ptH: TD -->[ H] TE
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptG ptH
x, y: C
α (F x) ⊗^{ TE} α (F y) · pr1 ptH (F x) (F y)
· (# H)%cat (ptF x y) =
pr1 α (pr1 F x) ⊗^{ TE} pr1 α (pr1 F y)
· ptH (F x) (F y) · (# H)%cat (ptF x y)

      apply idpath.
    
∏ (a b c : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f1 f2 : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats f1 f2)
(x : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(z : bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(ff1 : x -->[ f1] y) (ff2 : x -->[ f2] y)
(gg : y -->[ g] z),
disp_2cells r ff1 ff2
→ disp_2cells (rwhisker g r) (ff1 ;; gg) (ff2 ;; gg)
 
C, D, E: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
ptH: TD -->[ H] TE
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptF ptG
disp_2cells (rwhisker H α) (ptF ;; ptH) (ptG ;; ptH)

      
C, D, E: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
ptH: TD -->[ H] TE
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptF ptG
x, y: C
pr1 (ptF ;; ptH) x y · rwhisker H α (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
rwhisker H α x ⊗^{ TE} rwhisker H α y
· pr1 (ptG ;; ptH) x y

      
C, D, E: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, E ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells D
TE: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells E
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
ptH: TD -->[ H] TE
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptF ptG
x, y: C
compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptF ptH x y
· (# (pr1 H))%cat (pr1 α (x ⊗_{ TC} y)) =
(# (pr1 H))%cat (pr1 α x)
⊗^{ TE} (# (pr1 H))%cat (pr1 α y)
· compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptG ptH x y

ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
ptH: TD -->[ H] TE
ptcα: disp_2cells α ptF ptG
x, y: C
ptH (F x) (F y) · (# H)%cat (ptF x y)
· (# (pr1 H))%cat (pr1 α (x ⊗_{ TC} y)) =
(# (pr1 H))%cat (pr1 α x)
⊗^{ TE} (# (pr1 H))%cat (pr1 α y)
· (ptH (G x) (G y) · (# H)%cat (ptG x y))

      apply idpath.
  Defined.

  Definition bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_data : disp_prebicat_data bicat_of_univ_cats
    := (bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells,, bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_ops).

  
disp_prebicat_laws bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_data

  
disp_prebicat_laws bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_data

    repeat split; intro; intros; apply isaprop_bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct.
  Qed.

  Definition bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat : disp_prebicat bicat_of_univ_cats
    := (bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_data,,bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_laws).

  
disp_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats

  
disp_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats

    
has_disp_cellset bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
isaset (disp_2cells α ptF ptG)

α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
isaprop (disp_2cells α ptF ptG)

TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
isaprop
  (pr2 bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat C D F G α TC TD ptF
     ptG)

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
isaprop
  (pr2
     (bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_data,,
      bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat_laws) C D F G α TC
     TD ptF ptG)

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
isaprop
  (bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C D F G α TC TD ptF
     ptG)

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
isaprop
  (preservestensor_commutes (pr1 ptF) (pr1 ptG) α)

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
isaprop
  (∏ x y : C,
   pr1 ptF x y · α (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
   α x ⊗^{ TD} α y · pr1 ptG x y)

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_prebicat D
ptF: TC -->[ F] TD
ptG: TC -->[ G] TD
t, t0: C
isaprop
  (pr1 ptF t t0 · α (t ⊗_{ TC} t0) =
   α t ⊗^{ TD} α t0 · pr1 ptG t t0)

    apply univalent_category_has_homsets.
  Defined.


  (** We now show that this displayed bicategory is locally univalent *)
  
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF, ptG: TC -->[ F] TD
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) ptF ptG
→ pr1 ptF = pr1 ptG

  
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF, ptG: TC -->[ F] TD
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) ptF ptG
→ pr1 ptF = pr1 ptG

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF, ptG: TC -->[ F] TD
i: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) ptF
  ptG
pr1 ptF = pr1 ptG

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF, ptG: TC -->[ F] TD
i: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) ptF
  ptG
x, x0: C
pr1 ptF x x0 = pr1 ptG x x0

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF, ptG: TC -->[ F] TD
i: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) ptF
  ptG
x, x0: C
ix:= pr1 i x x0: pr1 ptF x x0
· id2_invertible_2cell F (x ⊗_{ TC} x0) =
id2_invertible_2cell F x
⊗^{ TD} id2_invertible_2cell F x0 · pr1 ptG x x0
pr1 ptF x x0 = pr1 ptG x x0

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF, ptG: TC -->[ F] TD
i: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) ptF
  ptG
x, x0: C
ix:= pr1 i x x0: pr1 ptF x x0 · identity (F (x ⊗_{ TC} x0)) =
identity (F x) ⊗^{ TD} identity (F x0)
· pr1 ptG x x0
pr1 ptF x x0 = pr1 ptG x x0

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF, ptG: TC -->[ F] TD
i: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) ptF
  ptG
x, x0: C
ix: pr1 ptF x x0 =
identity (F x) ⊗^{ TD} identity (F x0)
· pr1 ptG x x0
pr1 ptF x x0 = pr1 ptG x x0

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF, ptG: TC -->[ F] TD
i: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) ptF
  ptG
x, x0: C
ix: pr1 ptF x x0 =
identity (F x ⊗_{ TD} F x0) · pr1 ptG x x0
pr1 ptF x x0 = pr1 ptG x x0

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF, ptG: TC -->[ F] TD
i: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) ptF
  ptG
x, x0: C
ix: pr1 ptF x x0 = pr1 ptG x x0
pr1 ptF x x0 = pr1 ptG x x0

    exact ix.
  Defined.

  
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF, ptG: TC -->[ F] TD
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) ptF ptG
→ ptF = ptG

  ptG
ptF = ptG

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF, ptG: TC -->[ F] TD

  ptG
pr1 ptF = pr1 ptG
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF, ptG: TC -->[ F] TD
i: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) ptF
  ptG
pr2 ptF = transportb preserves_tensor_nat ?p (pr2 ptG)

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF, ptG: TC -->[ F] TD
i: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) ptF
  ptG
pr1 ptF = pr1 ptG
 apply (disp_inv_to_eq1 ptF ptG i).
    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF, ptG: TC -->[ F] TD
i: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) ptF
  ptG
pr2 ptF =
transportb preserves_tensor_nat
  (disp_inv_to_eq1 ptF ptG i) (pr2 ptG)
 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF, ptG: TC -->[ F] TD
i: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) ptF
  ptG
x, x0: C
pr2 ptF x x0 =
transportb preserves_tensor_nat
  (disp_inv_to_eq1 ptF ptG i) (pr2 ptG) x x0

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF, ptG: TC -->[ F] TD
i: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) ptF
  ptG
x, x0, t, t0: C
t1: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
t2: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
isaprop
  (pr1 ptF x t · (# F)%cat (t1 ⊗^{ TC} t2) =
   (# F)%cat t1 ⊗^{ TD} (# F)%cat t2 · pr1 ptF x0 t0)

      apply univalent_category_has_homsets.
  Defined.

  
disp_univalent_2_1 bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat

  
disp_univalent_2_1 bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat

    
fiberwise_local_univalent bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF1, ptF2: TC -->[ F] TD
isweq
  (disp_idtoiso_2_1 bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
     (idpath F) ptF1 ptF2)

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF1, ptF2: TC -->[ F] TD
disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F))
  ptF1 ptF2
→ transportf
    (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧, TC -->[ z] TD)
    (idpath F) ptF1 = ptF2
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF1, ptF2: TC -->[ F] TD
isaprop
  (transportf
     (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧, TC -->[ z] TD)
     (idpath F) ptF1 = ptF2)

ptF1, ptF2: TC -->[ F] TD
isaprop
  (disp_invertible_2cell 
     (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)) ptF1 ptF2)

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧

TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF1, ptF2: TC -->[ F] TD
disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F))
  ptF1 ptF2
→ transportf
    (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧, TC -->[ z] TD)
    (idpath F) ptF1 = ptF2
 apply disp_inv_to_eq.

     (idpath F) ptF1 = ptF2)

C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF1, ptF2: ∑ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TC TD F,
preserves_tensor_nat ptF
pt: preserves_tensor_data TC TD F
t, t0, t1, t2: C
t3: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t4: C ⟦ t1, t2 ⟧
isaprop
  (pt t t1 · (# F)%cat (t3 ⊗^{ TC} t4) =
   (# F)%cat t3 ⊗^{ TD} (# F)%cat t4 · pt t0 t2)

          apply univalent_category_has_homsets.
      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧

TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D

preserves_tensor_nat ptF
pf: isaset (preserves_tensor TC TD F)
isaprop (ptF1 = ptF2)

      apply pf.

isPredicate
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell
     (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)))
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF1, ptF2: TC -->[ F] TD
∏
x
 y : disp_2cells (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)) ptF1
       ptF2,
is_disp_invertible_2cell 
  (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)) x
→ is_disp_invertible_2cell
    (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)) y → 
  x = y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats

TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D

isPredicate
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell
     (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)))

TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF1, ptF2: TC -->[ F] TD
x: disp_2cells (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)) ptF1 ptF2
isaprop
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell
     (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)) x)

        apply isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell.
      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF1, ptF2: TC -->[ F] TD
∏
x
 y : disp_2cells (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)) ptF1
       ptF2,
is_disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F))
  x
→ is_disp_invertible_2cell
    (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)) y → x = y
 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptF1, ptF2: TC -->[ F] TD
x, y: disp_2cells (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)) ptF1 ptF2
X: is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)) x
X0: is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)) y
x = y

        apply isaprop_bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct.
  Defined.


  (** We now show that this displayed bicategory is globally univalent **)

  Definition tensor_iso {C : univalent_category} (TC TD : tensor C) : UU
    := ∑ α : ∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{TD} y) (x ⊗_{TC} y),
          ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C) (f : C⟦a1,a2⟧) (g : C⟦b1,b2⟧),
          (pr1 (α a1 b1)) · (f ⊗^{TC} g) = (f ⊗^{TD} g) · (pr1 (α a2 b2)).

  Definition tensor_eq {C : univalent_category} (TC TD : tensor C) : UU
    := ∑ (α : ∏ x y : C, (x ⊗_{TD} y) = (x ⊗_{TC} y)),
    ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C⟦x1,x2⟧) (g : C⟦y1,y2⟧),
      (idtomor _ _ (α x1 y1)) · (f ⊗^{TC} g) = (f ⊗^{TD} g) · (idtomor _ _ (α x2 y2)).

  Definition tensor_eq' {C : univalent_category} (TC TD : tensor C) : UU
    := ∑ (α : ∏ x y : C, (x ⊗_{TD} y) = (x ⊗_{TC} y)),
    ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C⟦x1,x2⟧) (g : C⟦y1,y2⟧),
      transportf (λ x : C, C⟦x , x2 ⊗_{TC} y2⟧) (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{TC} g)
      = (transportf _ (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{TD} g)).


  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (α x1 y1)
· f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g
· idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (α x2 y2)
→ transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
    (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
  transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
    (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (α x1 y1)
· f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g
· idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (α x2 y2)
→ transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
    (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
  transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
    (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (α x1 y1)
· f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g
· idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
    (α x2 y2)
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: pr1 (idtoiso (α x1 y1)) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g
· idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
    (α x2 y2)
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: pr1 (idtoiso (α x1 y1)) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g · pr1 (idtoiso (α x2 y2))
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: pr1 (idtoiso (α x1 y1)) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g · pr1 (idtoiso (α x2 y2))
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) = ?b
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: pr1 (idtoiso (α x1 y1)) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g · pr1 (idtoiso (α x2 y2))
?b =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)

transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) = ?b

      apply (! idtoiso_precompose _ _ _ _ _ _).

      apply pathsinv0inv0.

  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)

x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧

C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: pr1 (idtoiso (α x1 y1)) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g · pr1 (idtoiso (α x2 y2))
idtoiso (α x1 y1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g = ?b
 exact q. 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: pr1 (idtoiso (α x1 y1)) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g · pr1 (idtoiso (α x2 y2))
f ⊗^{ TD} g · pr1 (idtoiso (α x2 y2)) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)

    apply idtoiso_postcompose.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)
→ idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (α x1 y1)
  · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
  f ⊗^{ TD} g
  · idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (α x2 y2)

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)
→ idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (α x1 y1)
  · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
  f ⊗^{ TD} g
  · idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (α x2 y2)

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)
idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (α x1 y1)
· f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g
· idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (α x2 y2)

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)
idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (α x1 y1)
· f ⊗^{ TC} g = ?b
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)
?b =
f ⊗^{ TD} g
· idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (α x2 y2)

TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =

  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)

· f ⊗^{ TC} g = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)
idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (α x1 y1) =
?f'

      apply (! eq_idtoiso_idtomor _ _ _).
    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)
pr1 (idtoiso (α x1 y1)) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g
· idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (α x2 y2)

α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: idtoiso (α x1 y1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =

?b =
