C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: idtoiso (α x1 y1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g · idtoiso (α x2 y2)
pr1 (idtoiso (α x1 y1)) · f ⊗^{ TC} g = ?b
 apply q. 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: idtoiso (α x1 y1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g · idtoiso (α x2 y2)
f ⊗^{ TD} g · idtoiso (α x2 y2) =
f ⊗^{ TD} g
· idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (α x2 y2)

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: idtoiso (α x1 y1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g · idtoiso (α x2 y2)
idtoiso (α x2 y2) =
idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (α x2 y2)

    apply eq_idtoiso_idtomor.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tensor_eq' TC TD ≃ tensor_eq TC TD

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tensor_eq' TC TD ≃ tensor_eq TC TD

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
isPredicate
  (λ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (! x x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
   transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
isPredicate
  (λ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (x x1 y1)
   · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   f ⊗^{ TD} g
   · idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (x x2 y2))
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
∏ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
   (! x x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
 transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
   (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)) <->
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (x x1 y1)
 · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
 f ⊗^{ TD} g
 · idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (x x2 y2))

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
isPredicate
  (λ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (! x x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
   transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
isaprop
  (∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (! x x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
   transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
t, t0, t1, t2: C
t3: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t4: C ⟦ t1, t2 ⟧
isaprop
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, t0 ⊗_{ TC} t2 ⟧)
     (! x t t1) (t3 ⊗^{ TC} t4) =
   transportf (precategory_morphisms (t ⊗_{ TD} t1))
     (x t0 t2) (t3 ⊗^{ TD} t4))

      apply homset_property.
    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
isPredicate
  (λ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (x x1 y1)
   · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   f ⊗^{ TD} g
   · idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (x x2 y2))
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
isaprop
  (∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (x x1 y1)
   · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   f ⊗^{ TD} g
   · idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (x x2 y2))

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
t, t0, t1, t2: C
t3: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t4: C ⟦ t1, t2 ⟧
isaprop
  (idtomor (t ⊗_{ TD} t1) (t ⊗_{ TC} t1) (x t t1)
   · t3 ⊗^{ TC} t4 =
   t3 ⊗^{ TD} t4
   · idtomor (t0 ⊗_{ TD} t2) (t0 ⊗_{ TC} t2) (x t0 t2))

      apply homset_property.
    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
∏ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
   (! x x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
 transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
   (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)) <->
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (x x1 y1)
 · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
 f ⊗^{ TD} g
 · idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (x x2 y2))
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
   (! pob x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
 transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
   (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)) <->
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (pob x1 y1)
 · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
 f ⊗^{ TD} g
 · idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (pob x2 y2))

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
   (! pob x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
 transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
   (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))
→ ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
  (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
  idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (pob x1 y1)
  · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
  f ⊗^{ TD} g
  · idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
      (pob x2 y2)
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (pob x1 y1)
 · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
 f ⊗^{ TD} g
 · idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (pob x2 y2))
→ ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
  (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
  transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
    (! pob x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
  transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
    (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
   (! pob x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
 transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
   (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))
→ ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
  (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
  idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (pob x1 y1)
  · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
  f ⊗^{ TD} g
  · idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
      (pob x2 y2)
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
q: ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! pob x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (pob x1 y1)
· f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g
· idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (pob x2 y2)

        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
q: ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! pob x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! pob x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)

        exact (q _ _ _ _ f g).
      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (pob x1 y1)
 · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
 f ⊗^{ TD} g
 · idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (pob x2 y2))
→ ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
  (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
  transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
    (! pob x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
  transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
    (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
q: ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
  (pob x1 y1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g
· idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
    (pob x2 y2)
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! pob x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)

        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
q: ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
  (pob x1 y1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g
· idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
    (pob x2 y2)
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (pob x1 y1)
· f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g
· idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (pob x2 y2)

        exact (q _ _ _ _ f g).
  Defined.

  Definition tensor_eq'' {C : univalent_category} (TC TD : tensor C) : UU
    := ∑ (α : ∏ x y : C, (x ⊗_{TD} y) = (x ⊗_{TC} y)),
    ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C⟦x1,x2⟧) (g : C⟦y1,y2⟧),
      f ⊗^{TC} g
      = transportf (λ x : C, C⟦x , x2 ⊗_{TC} y2⟧) (α x1 y1) (transportf _ (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{TD} g)).

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)
→ f ⊗^{ TC} g =
  transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
    (α x1 y1)
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
       (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)
→ f ⊗^{ TC} g =
  transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
    (α x1 y1)
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
       (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)
f ⊗^{ TC} g =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) (α x1 y1)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)
transportb (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) (α x1 y1)
  (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)

    exact q.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
f ⊗^{ TC} g =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) (α x1 y1)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))
→ transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
    (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
  transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
    (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
f ⊗^{ TC} g =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) (α x1 y1)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))
→ transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
    (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
  transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
    (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: f ⊗^{ TC} g =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (α x1 y1)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! α x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: f ⊗^{ TC} g =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (α x1 y1)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))
f ⊗^{ TC} g =
transportb (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! α x1 y1)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: f ⊗^{ TC} g =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (α x1 y1)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))
f ⊗^{ TC} g =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! (! α x1 y1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
α: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
q: f ⊗^{ TC} g =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (α x1 y1)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))
f ⊗^{ TC} g =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) (α x1 y1)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))

    apply q.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tensor_eq'' TC TD ≃ tensor_eq' TC TD

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tensor_eq'' TC TD ≃ tensor_eq' TC TD

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
isPredicate
  (λ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (x x1 y1)
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
        (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
isPredicate
  (λ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (! x x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
   transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
∏ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 f ⊗^{ TC} g =
 transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
   (x x1 y1)
   (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
      (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))) <->
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
   (! x x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
 transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
   (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
isPredicate
  (λ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (x x1 y1)
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
        (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
isaprop
  (∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (x x1 y1)
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
        (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
t, t0, t1, t2: C
t3: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t4: C ⟦ t1, t2 ⟧
isaprop
  (t3 ⊗^{ TC} t4 =
   transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, t0 ⊗_{ TC} t2 ⟧)
     (x t t1)
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (t ⊗_{ TD} t1))
        (x t0 t2) (t3 ⊗^{ TD} t4)))

      apply homset_property.
    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
isPredicate
  (λ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (! x x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
   transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
isaprop
  (∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (! x x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
   transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
t, t0, t1, t2: C
t3: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t4: C ⟦ t1, t2 ⟧
isaprop
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, t0 ⊗_{ TC} t2 ⟧)
     (! x t t1) (t3 ⊗^{ TC} t4) =
   transportf (precategory_morphisms (t ⊗_{ TD} t1))
     (x t0 t2) (t3 ⊗^{ TD} t4))

      apply homset_property.
    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
∏ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 f ⊗^{ TC} g =
 transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
   (x x1 y1)
   (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
      (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))) <->
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
   (! x x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
 transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
   (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 f ⊗^{ TC} g =
 transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
   (pob x1 y1)
   (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
      (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))) <->
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
   (! pob x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
 transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
   (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 f ⊗^{ TC} g =
 transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
   (pob x1 y1)
   (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
      (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
→ ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
  (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
  transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
    (! pob x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
  transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
    (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
   (! pob x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
 transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
   (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))
→ ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
  (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
  f ⊗^{ TC} g =
  transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
    (pob x1 y1)
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
       (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 f ⊗^{ TC} g =
 transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
   (pob x1 y1)
   (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
      (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
→ ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
  (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
  transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
    (! pob x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
  transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
    (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
q: ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
f ⊗^{ TC} g =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (pob x1 y1)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! pob x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)

        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
q: ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
f ⊗^{ TC} g =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (pob x1 y1)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
f ⊗^{ TC} g =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (pob x1 y1)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))

        exact (q _ _ _ _ f g).
      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
   (! pob x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
 transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
   (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))
→ ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
  (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
  f ⊗^{ TC} g =
  transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
    (pob x1 y1)
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
       (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
q: ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! pob x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
f ⊗^{ TC} g =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (pob x1 y1)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))

        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
q: ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! pob x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! pob x1 y1) (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
  (pob x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)

        exact (q _ _ _ _ f g).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tensor_eq TC TD ≃ tensor_iso TC TD

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tensor_eq TC TD ≃ tensor_iso TC TD

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
(∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
≃ (∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
∏ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
(λ x0 : ∏ x0 y : C, x0 ⊗_{ TD} y = x0 ⊗_{ TC} y,
 ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (x0 x1 y1)
 · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
 f ⊗^{ TD} g
 · idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (x0 x2 y2))
  x
≃ (λ y : ∏ x0 y : C,
         z_iso (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y),
   ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C) (f : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
   pr1 (y a1 b1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   f ⊗^{ TD} g · pr1 (y a2 b2)) (?f x)

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
(∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
≃ (∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x, y: C
x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
≃ z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x, y: C
x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
→ z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x, y: C
z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
→ x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x, y: C
∏ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y, ?g (?f x0) = x0
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x, y: C
∏ y0 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
?f (?g y0) = y0

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x, y: C
x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
→ z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
 apply idtoiso.
      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x, y: C
z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
→ x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x, y: C
is_univalent C

        apply univalent_category_is_univalent.
      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x, y: C
∏ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
isotoid C (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
  (idtoiso x0) = x0
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x, y: C
x0: x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
isotoid C (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
  (idtoiso x0) = x0

        apply isotoid_idtoiso.
      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x, y: C
∏ y0 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
idtoiso
  (isotoid C (univalent_category_is_univalent C) y0) =
y0
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x, y: C
y0: z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
idtoiso
  (isotoid C (univalent_category_is_univalent C) y0) =
y0

        apply idtoiso_isotoid.
    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
∏ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
(λ x0 : ∏ x0 y : C, x0 ⊗_{ TD} y = x0 ⊗_{ TC} y,
 ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (x0 x1 y1)
 · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
 f ⊗^{ TD} g
 · idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (x0 x2 y2))
  x
≃ (λ y : ∏ x0 y : C,
         z_iso (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y),
   ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C) (f : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
   pr1 (y a1 b1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   f ⊗^{ TD} g · pr1 (y a2 b2))
    (weqonsecfibers
       (λ x0 : C, ∏ y : C, x0 ⊗_{ TD} y = x0 ⊗_{ TC} y)
       (λ x0 : C,
        ∏ y : C, z_iso (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y))
       (λ x0 : C,
        weqonsecfibers
          (λ x1 : C, x0 ⊗_{ TD} x1 = x0 ⊗_{ TC} x1)
          (λ x1 : C,
           z_iso (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x1) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x1))
          (λ y : C,
           weq_iso idtoiso
             (isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
             (λ x1 : x0 ⊗_{ TD} y = x0 ⊗_{ TC} y,
              isotoid_idtoiso C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y) x1)
             (λ y0 : z_iso (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y)
                       (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y),
              idtoiso_isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) x)
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
iso_tob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
(λ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
 ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 idtomor (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1) (x x1 y1)
 · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
 f ⊗^{ TD} g
 · idtomor (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2) (x x2 y2))
  iso_tob
≃ (λ y : ∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
   ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C) (f : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
   pr1 (y a1 b1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   f ⊗^{ TD} g · pr1 (y a2 b2))
    (weqonsecfibers
       (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       (λ x : C,
        weqonsecfibers
          (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
          (λ x0 : C,
           z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
          (λ y : C,
           weq_iso idtoiso
             (isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
             (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
              isotoid_idtoiso C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
             (λ y0 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
              idtoiso_isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0)))
       iso_tob)

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
iso_tob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
idtomor (x ⊗_{ TD} x1) (x ⊗_{ TC} x1) (iso_tob x x1)
· x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
    (iso_tob x0 x2)
≃ pr1
    (weqonsecfibers
       (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       (λ x : C,
        weqonsecfibers
          (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
          (λ x0 : C,
           z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
          (λ y : C,
           weq_iso idtoiso
             (isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
             (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
              isotoid_idtoiso C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
             (λ y0 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
              idtoiso_isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0)))
       iso_tob x x1) · x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
  x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
  · pr1
      (weqonsecfibers
         (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
         (λ x : C,
          ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ x : C,
          weqonsecfibers
            (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
            (λ x0 : C,
             z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
            (λ y : C,
             weq_iso idtoiso
               (isotoid C
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
               (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                isotoid_idtoiso C
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                  (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
               (λ y0 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                         (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                idtoiso_isotoid C
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                  (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0)))
         iso_tob x0 x2)

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
iso_tob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
idtomor (x ⊗_{ TD} x1) (x ⊗_{ TC} x1) (iso_tob x x1)
· x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
    (iso_tob x0 x2)
→ pr1
    (weqonsecfibers
       (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)

              isotoid_idtoiso C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)

              idtoiso_isotoid C

                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0)))

  x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
  · pr1
      (weqonsecfibers
         (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)

                         (x ⊗_{ TC} y),

TC, TD: tensor C
iso_tob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
pr1
  (weqonsecfibers
     (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
     (λ x : C,
      ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (λ x : C,

        (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
        (λ x0 : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))

            isotoid_idtoiso C

              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
              (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
           (λ y0 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
            idtoiso_isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
              (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x x1)
· x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· pr1
    (weqonsecfibers
       (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))

          (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)

          (λ y : C,

             (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,

             (λ y0 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y),

                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x0 x2)
→ idtomor (x ⊗_{ TD} x1) (x ⊗_{ TC} x1) (iso_tob x x1)
  · x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
  x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
  · idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) 
      (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2) (iso_tob x0 x2)
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
iso_tob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
∏
x5 : idtomor (x ⊗_{ TD} x1) 
       (x ⊗_{ TC} x1) (iso_tob x x1) · 
     x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
     x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
     · idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) 
         (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2) 
         (iso_tob x0 x2), 
?g (?f x5) = x5

TC, TD: tensor C
iso_tob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
∏
y : pr1
      (weqonsecfibers
         (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
         (λ x : C,
          ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ x : C,
          weqonsecfibers
            (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
            (λ x0 : C,
             z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
            (λ y : C,
             weq_iso idtoiso
               (isotoid C
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
               (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                isotoid_idtoiso C
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                  (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                  (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
               (λ y0 : 
                   z_iso 
                     (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                     (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                idtoiso_isotoid C
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                  (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                  (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x x1)
    · x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
    x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
    · pr1
        (weqonsecfibers
           (λ x : C,
            ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
           (λ x : C,
            ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
           (λ x : C,
            weqonsecfibers
              (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
              (λ x0 : C,
               z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
              (λ y : C,
               weq_iso idtoiso
                 (isotoid C
                    (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
                 (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                  isotoid_idtoiso C
                    (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                    (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                    (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
                 (λ y0 : 
                     z_iso 
                      (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                      (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                  idtoiso_isotoid C
                    (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                    (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                    (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x0 x2),
?f (?g y) = y

TC, TD: tensor C
iso_tob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
p: pr1 (idtoiso (iso_tob x x1)) · x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4 · pr1 (idtoiso (iso_tob x0 x2))
pr1
  (weqonsecfibers
     (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
     (λ x : C,
      ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (λ x : C,
      weqonsecfibers
        (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
        (λ x0 : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
        (λ y : C,
         weq_iso idtoiso
           (isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
           (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
            isotoid_idtoiso C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
           (λ y0 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
            idtoiso_isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0)))
     iso_tob x x1) · x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· pr1
    (weqonsecfibers
       (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       (λ x : C,
        weqonsecfibers
          (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
          (λ x0 : C,
           z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
          (λ y : C,
           weq_iso idtoiso
             (isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
             (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,

             (λ y0 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y),

                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0)))
       iso_tob x0 x2)

        apply p.

TC, TD: tensor C
iso_tob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
pr1
  (weqonsecfibers
     (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
     (λ x : C,
      ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (λ x : C,
      weqonsecfibers
        (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
        (λ x0 : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
        (λ y : C,
         weq_iso idtoiso
           (isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
           (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
            isotoid_idtoiso C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
           (λ y0 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
            idtoiso_isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0)))
     iso_tob x x1) · x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· pr1
    (weqonsecfibers
       (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       (λ x : C,
        weqonsecfibers
          (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
          (λ x0 : C,
           z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
          (λ y : C,
           weq_iso idtoiso
             (isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
             (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
              isotoid_idtoiso C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
             (λ y0 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
              idtoiso_isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0)))
       iso_tob x0 x2)
→ idtomor (x ⊗_{ TD} x1) (x ⊗_{ TC} x1) (iso_tob x x1)
  · x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
  x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
  · idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
      (iso_tob x0 x2)
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
iso_tob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
p: pr1
  (weqonsecfibers
     (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
     (λ x : C,
      ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (λ x : C,
      weqonsecfibers
        (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
        (λ x0 : C,
         z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
        (λ y : C,
         weq_iso idtoiso
           (isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
           (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
            isotoid_idtoiso C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
              (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
           (λ y0 : z_iso 
                     (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                     (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
            idtoiso_isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
              (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x x1)
· x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· pr1
    (weqonsecfibers
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       (λ x : C,
        weqonsecfibers
          (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
          (λ x0 : C,
           z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
          (λ y : C,
           weq_iso idtoiso
             (isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
             (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
              isotoid_idtoiso C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
             (λ y0 : z_iso 
                      (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                      (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
              idtoiso_isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x0 x2)
idtomor (x ⊗_{ TD} x1) (x ⊗_{ TC} x1) (iso_tob x x1)
· x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
    (iso_tob x0 x2)

        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
iso_tob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
p: pr1
  (weqonsecfibers
     (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
     (λ x : C,
      ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (λ x : C,
      weqonsecfibers
        (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
        (λ x0 : C,
         z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
        (λ y : C,
         weq_iso idtoiso
           (isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
           (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
            isotoid_idtoiso C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
              (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
           (λ y0 : z_iso 
                     (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                     (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
            idtoiso_isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
              (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x x1)
· x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· pr1
    (weqonsecfibers
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       (λ x : C,
        weqonsecfibers
          (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
          (λ x0 : C,
           z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
          (λ y : C,
           weq_iso idtoiso
             (isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
             (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
              isotoid_idtoiso C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
             (λ y0 : z_iso 
                      (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                      (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
              idtoiso_isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x0 x2)
idtomor (x ⊗_{ TD} x1) (x ⊗_{ TC} x1) (iso_tob x x1)
· x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 = ?b
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
iso_tob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧

  (weqonsecfibers
     (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)

      ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (λ x : C,
      weqonsecfibers
        (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)

         z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
        (λ y : C,
         weq_iso idtoiso
           (isotoid C

            isotoid_idtoiso C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
              (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
           (λ y0 : z_iso 
                     (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                     (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
            idtoiso_isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
              (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x x1)
· x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· pr1
    (weqonsecfibers
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       (λ x : C,
        weqonsecfibers
          (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
          (λ x0 : C,
           z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
          (λ y : C,
           weq_iso idtoiso
             (isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
             (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
              isotoid_idtoiso C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
             (λ y0 : z_iso 
                      (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                      (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
              idtoiso_isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x0 x2)
?b =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) 
    (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2) (iso_tob x0 x2)

· x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· pr1
    (weqonsecfibers
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       (λ x : C,

          (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)

· x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 = ?b

          
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
iso_tob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
p: pr1
  (weqonsecfibers
     (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
     (λ x : C,
      ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (λ x : C,
      weqonsecfibers
        (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
        (λ x0 : C,
         z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
        (λ y : C,
         weq_iso idtoiso
           (isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
           (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
            isotoid_idtoiso C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
              (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
           (λ y0 : z_iso 
                     (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                     (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
            idtoiso_isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
              (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x x1)
· x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· pr1
    (weqonsecfibers
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       (λ x : C,
        weqonsecfibers
          (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
          (λ x0 : C,
           z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
          (λ y : C,
           weq_iso idtoiso
             (isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
             (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
              isotoid_idtoiso C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
             (λ y0 : z_iso 
                      (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                      (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
              idtoiso_isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x0 x2)
idtomor (x ⊗_{ TD} x1) (x ⊗_{ TC} x1) (iso_tob x x1) =
?f'

          apply (! eq_idtoiso_idtomor _ _ _).
        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
iso_tob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
p: pr1
  (weqonsecfibers
     (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
     (λ x : C,
      ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (λ x : C,
      weqonsecfibers
        (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
        (λ x0 : C,
         z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
        (λ y : C,
         weq_iso idtoiso
           (isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
           (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
            isotoid_idtoiso C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
              (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
           (λ y0 : z_iso 
                     (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                     (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
            idtoiso_isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
              (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x x1)
· x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· pr1
    (weqonsecfibers
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       (λ x : C,
        weqonsecfibers
          (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
          (λ x0 : C,
           z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
          (λ y : C,
           weq_iso idtoiso
             (isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
             (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
              isotoid_idtoiso C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
             (λ y0 : z_iso 
                      (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                      (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
              idtoiso_isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x0 x2)
pr1 (idtoiso (iso_tob x x1)) · x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
    (iso_tob x0 x2)

x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· pr1
    (weqonsecfibers
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       (λ x : C,
        weqonsecfibers
          (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
          (λ x0 : C,
           z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
          (λ y : C,
           weq_iso idtoiso
             (isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
             (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
              isotoid_idtoiso C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
             (λ y0 : z_iso 
                      (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                      (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
              idtoiso_isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x0 x2)
?b =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) 
    (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2) (iso_tob x0 x2)
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
iso_tob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
p: pr1
  (weqonsecfibers
     (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
     (λ x : C,
      ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (λ x : C,
      weqonsecfibers
        (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
        (λ x0 : C,
         z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
        (λ y : C,
         weq_iso idtoiso
           (isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
           (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
            isotoid_idtoiso C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
              (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
           (λ y0 : z_iso 
                     (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                     (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
            idtoiso_isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
              (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x x1)
· x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· pr1
    (weqonsecfibers
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       (λ x : C,
        weqonsecfibers
          (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
          (λ x0 : C,
           z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
          (λ y : C,
           weq_iso idtoiso
             (isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
             (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
              isotoid_idtoiso C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
             (λ y0 : z_iso 
                      (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                      (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
              idtoiso_isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x0 x2)
pr1 (idtoiso (iso_tob x x1)) · x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 = ?b
 apply p. 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
iso_tob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
p: pr1
  (weqonsecfibers
     (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
     (λ x : C,
      ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (λ x : C,
      weqonsecfibers
        (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
        (λ x0 : C,
         z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
        (λ y : C,
         weq_iso idtoiso
           (isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
           (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
            isotoid_idtoiso C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
              (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
           (λ y0 : z_iso 
                     (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                     (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
            idtoiso_isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
              (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x x1)
· x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· pr1
    (weqonsecfibers
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       (λ x : C,
        weqonsecfibers
          (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
          (λ x0 : C,
           z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
          (λ y : C,
           weq_iso idtoiso
             (isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
             (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
              isotoid_idtoiso C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
             (λ y0 : z_iso 
                      (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                      (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
              idtoiso_isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x0 x2)
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· pr1
    (weqonsecfibers
       (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       (λ x : C,

          (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)

       iso_tob x0 x2) =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
    (iso_tob x0 x2)

        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
iso_tob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
p: pr1
  (weqonsecfibers
     (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
     (λ x : C,
      ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (λ x : C,
      weqonsecfibers
        (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
        (λ x0 : C,
         z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
        (λ y : C,
         weq_iso idtoiso
           (isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
           (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
            isotoid_idtoiso C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
              (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
           (λ y0 : z_iso 
                     (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                     (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
            idtoiso_isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
              (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x x1)
· x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
· pr1
    (weqonsecfibers
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
       (λ x : C,
        ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       (λ x : C,
        weqonsecfibers
          (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
          (λ x0 : C,
           z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
          (λ y : C,
           weq_iso idtoiso
             (isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
             (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
              isotoid_idtoiso C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
             (λ y0 : z_iso 
                      (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                      (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
              idtoiso_isotoid C
                (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                (x ⊗_{ TD} y) 
                (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x0 x2)
pr1
  (weqonsecfibers
     (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
     (λ x : C,
      ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (λ x : C,
      weqonsecfibers
        (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
        (λ x0 : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
        (λ y : C,
         weq_iso idtoiso
           (isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
           (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
            isotoid_idtoiso C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
           (λ y0 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
            idtoiso_isotoid C
              (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
              (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0)))
     iso_tob x0 x2) =
idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
  (iso_tob x0 x2)

        apply eq_idtoiso_idtomor.
      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
iso_tob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
∏
x5 : idtomor (x ⊗_{ TD} x1) (x ⊗_{ TC} x1)
       (iso_tob x x1) · x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
     x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
     · idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
         (iso_tob x0 x2),
(λ p : pr1
         (weqonsecfibers
            (λ x : C,
             ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
            (λ x : C,
             ∏ y : C,
             z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ x : C,
             weqonsecfibers
               (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
               (λ x0 : C,
                z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
               (λ y : C,
                weq_iso idtoiso
                  (isotoid C
                     (univalent_category_is_univalent
                        C))
                  (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                   isotoid_idtoiso C
                     (univalent_category_is_univalent
                        C) (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                     x0)
                  (λ y0 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                            (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                   idtoiso_isotoid C
                     (univalent_category_is_univalent
                        C) (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                     y0))) iso_tob x x1)
       · x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
       x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
       · pr1
           (weqonsecfibers
              (λ x : C,
               ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
              (λ x : C,
               ∏ y : C,
               z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
              (λ x : C,
               weqonsecfibers
                 (λ x0 : C,
                  x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
                 (λ x0 : C,
                  z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
                 (λ y : C,
                  weq_iso idtoiso
                    (isotoid C
                       (univalent_category_is_univalent
                          C))
                    (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                     isotoid_idtoiso C
                       (univalent_category_is_univalent
                          C) (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                       (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
                    (λ y0 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                              (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                     idtoiso_isotoid C
                       (univalent_category_is_univalent
                          C) (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                       (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0))) iso_tob x0
              x2),
 cancel_postcomposition
   (idtomor (x ⊗_{ TD} x1) (x ⊗_{ TC} x1)
      (iso_tob x x1)) (pr1 (idtoiso (iso_tob x x1)))
   (x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4)
   (! eq_idtoiso_idtomor (x ⊗_{ TD} x1) (x ⊗_{ TC} x1)
        (iso_tob x x1)) @
 p @
 cancel_precomposition C (x ⊗_{ TD} x1)
   (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
   (pr1
      (weqonsecfibers
         (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
         (λ x : C,
          ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ x : C,
          weqonsecfibers
            (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
            (λ x0 : C,
             z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
            (λ y : C,
             weq_iso idtoiso
               (isotoid C
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
               (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                isotoid_idtoiso C
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                  (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
               (λ y0 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                         (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                idtoiso_isotoid C
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                  (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0)))
         iso_tob x0 x2))
   (idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
      (iso_tob x0 x2)) (x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4)
   (eq_idtoiso_idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
      (iso_tob x0 x2)))
  ((λ p : idtomor (x ⊗_{ TD} x1) (x ⊗_{ TC} x1)
            (iso_tob x x1) · x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
          x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
          · idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
              (iso_tob x0 x2),
    let p0 :=
      internal_paths_rew
        (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} x1, x ⊗_{ TC} x1 ⟧)
        (idtomor (x ⊗_{ TD} x1) (x ⊗_{ TC} x1)
           (iso_tob x x1))
        (λ p0 : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} x1, x ⊗_{ TC} x1 ⟧,
         p0 · x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
         x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
         · idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
             (iso_tob x0 x2)) p
        (pr1 (idtoiso (iso_tob x x1)))
        (! eq_idtoiso_idtomor (x ⊗_{ TD} x1)
             (x ⊗_{ TC} x1) (iso_tob x x1)) in
    let p1 :=
      internal_paths_rew
        (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2 ⟧)
        (idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
           (iso_tob x0 x2))
        (λ p1 : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2 ⟧,
         pr1 (idtoiso (iso_tob x x1)) · x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
         x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4 · p1) p0
        (pr1 (idtoiso (iso_tob x0 x2)))
        (! eq_idtoiso_idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)
             (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2) (iso_tob x0 x2)) in
    p1) x5) = x5
 intro ; apply homset_property.
      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
iso_tob: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
∏
y : pr1
      (weqonsecfibers
         (λ x : C, ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
         (λ x : C,
          ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ x : C,
          weqonsecfibers
            (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
            (λ x0 : C,
             z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
            (λ y : C,
             weq_iso idtoiso
               (isotoid C
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
               (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                isotoid_idtoiso C
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                  (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
               (λ y0 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                         (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                idtoiso_isotoid C
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                  (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0)))
         iso_tob x x1) · x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
    x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
    · pr1
        (weqonsecfibers
           (λ x : C,
            ∏ y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y)
           (λ x : C,
            ∏ y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
           (λ x : C,
            weqonsecfibers
              (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
              (λ x0 : C,
               z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
              (λ y : C,
               weq_iso idtoiso
                 (isotoid C
                    (univalent_category_is_univalent C))
                 (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                  isotoid_idtoiso C
                    (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                    (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) x0)
                 (λ y0 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                           (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                  idtoiso_isotoid C
                    (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                    (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) y0)))
           iso_tob x0 x2),
(λ p : idtomor (x ⊗_{ TD} x1) (x ⊗_{ TC} x1)
         (iso_tob x x1) · x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
       x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
       · idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
           (iso_tob x0 x2),
 let p0 :=
   internal_paths_rew
     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} x1, x ⊗_{ TC} x1 ⟧)
     (idtomor (x ⊗_{ TD} x1) (x ⊗_{ TC} x1)
        (iso_tob x x1))
     (λ p0 : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} x1, x ⊗_{ TC} x1 ⟧,
      p0 · x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
      x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
      · idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
          (iso_tob x0 x2)) p
     (pr1 (idtoiso (iso_tob x x1)))
     (! eq_idtoiso_idtomor (x ⊗_{ TD} x1)
          (x ⊗_{ TC} x1) (iso_tob x x1)) in
 let p1 :=
   internal_paths_rew
     (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2 ⟧)
     (idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
        (iso_tob x0 x2))
     (λ p1 : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2 ⟧,
      pr1 (idtoiso (iso_tob x x1)) · x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
      x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4 · p1) p0
     (pr1 (idtoiso (iso_tob x0 x2)))
     (! eq_idtoiso_idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)
          (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2) (iso_tob x0 x2)) in
 p1)
  ((λ p : pr1
            (weqonsecfibers
               (λ x : C,
                ∏ y0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 = x ⊗_{ TC} y0)
               (λ x : C,
                ∏ y0 : C,
                z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y0) (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
               (λ x : C,
                weqonsecfibers
                  (λ x0 : C,
                   x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
                  (λ x0 : C,
                   z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
                  (λ y0 : C,
                   weq_iso idtoiso
                     (isotoid C
                        (univalent_category_is_univalent
                           C))
                     (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y0 =
                             x ⊗_{ TC} y0,
                      isotoid_idtoiso C
                        (univalent_category_is_univalent
                           C) (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)
                        (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) x0)
                     (λ y1 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)
                               (x ⊗_{ TC} y0),
                      idtoiso_isotoid C
                        (univalent_category_is_univalent
                           C) (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)
                        (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) y1))) iso_tob x
               x1) · x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4 =
          x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4
          · pr1
              (weqonsecfibers
                 (λ x : C,
                  ∏ y0 : C,
                  x ⊗_{ TD} y0 = x ⊗_{ TC} y0)
                 (λ x : C,
                  ∏ y0 : C,
                  z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y0) (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
                 (λ x : C,
                  weqonsecfibers
                    (λ x0 : C,
                     x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
                    (λ x0 : C,
                     z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0)
                       (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
                    (λ y0 : C,
                     weq_iso idtoiso
                       (isotoid C
                          (univalent_category_is_univalent
                             C))
                       (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y0 =
                               x ⊗_{ TC} y0,
                        isotoid_idtoiso C
                          (univalent_category_is_univalent
                             C) (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)
                          (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) x0)
                       (λ y1 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)
                                 (x ⊗_{ TC} y0),
                        idtoiso_isotoid C
                          (univalent_category_is_univalent
                             C) (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)
                          (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) y1))) iso_tob
                 x0 x2),
    cancel_postcomposition
      (idtomor (x ⊗_{ TD} x1) (x ⊗_{ TC} x1)
         (iso_tob x x1))
      (pr1 (idtoiso (iso_tob x x1))) (x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4)
      (! eq_idtoiso_idtomor (x ⊗_{ TD} x1)
           (x ⊗_{ TC} x1) (iso_tob x x1)) @
    p @
    cancel_precomposition C (x ⊗_{ TD} x1)
      (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
      (pr1
         (weqonsecfibers
            (λ x : C,
             ∏ y0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 = x ⊗_{ TC} y0)
            (λ x : C,
             ∏ y0 : C,
             z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y0) (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
            (λ x : C,
             weqonsecfibers
               (λ x0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} x0 = x ⊗_{ TC} x0)
               (λ x0 : C,
                z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} x0) (x ⊗_{ TC} x0))
               (λ y0 : C,
                weq_iso idtoiso
                  (isotoid C
                     (univalent_category_is_univalent
                        C))
                  (λ x0 : x ⊗_{ TD} y0 = x ⊗_{ TC} y0,
                   isotoid_idtoiso C
                     (univalent_category_is_univalent
                        C) (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)
                     (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) x0)
                  (λ y1 : z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)
                            (x ⊗_{ TC} y0),
                   idtoiso_isotoid C
                     (univalent_category_is_univalent
                        C) (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)
                     (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) y1))) iso_tob x0
            x2))
      (idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2) (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
         (iso_tob x0 x2)) (x3 ⊗^{ TD} x4)
      (eq_idtoiso_idtomor (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)
         (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2) (iso_tob x0 x2))) y) = y
 intro ; apply homset_property.
  Defined.

  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
disp_adjoint_equivalence (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
  TC TD → tensor_iso TC TD

  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
disp_adjoint_equivalence (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
  TC TD → tensor_iso TC TD

    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
dae: disp_adjoint_equivalence (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) TC TD
tensor_iso TC TD

    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
data: disp_left_adjoint_data
  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) 
  (ptd,, ptnat)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) data
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) data
tensor_iso TC TD

    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: TD -->[
left_adjoint_right_adjoint
  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))] TC
ptunit: disp_2cells
  (left_adjoint_unit
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
  (id_disp TC) ((ptd,, ptnat) ;; ptdinv)
ptcounit: disp_2cells
  (left_adjoint_counit
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
  (ptdinv ;; (ptd,, ptnat)) 
  (id_disp TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
tensor_iso TC TD

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
tensor_iso TC TD


    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
(λ α : ∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
 ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C) (f : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
 pr1 (α a1 b1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
 f ⊗^{ TD} g · pr1 (α a2 b2)) 
  ?pr1

  (functor_identity C)

  TD TD

∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)

C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
x, y: C
C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧
 exact (ptd x y).
      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
x, y: C
C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧
 exact (pr1 ptdinv x y).
      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
x, y: C
is_inverse_in_precat (ptd x y) (pr1 ptdinv x y)
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
x, y: C
ptd x y · pr1 ptdinv x y = identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)

TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd

ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC

  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)

  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
