     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)

  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,

     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
x, y: C
pr1 ptdinv x y · ptd x y = identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)

TC, TD: tensor C

  (functor_identity C)

     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)

  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD

     (ptd,, ptnat))

  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,

     (functor_identity C),,

  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,

     (functor_identity C),,

C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
x, y: C
t:= ptcounit x y: pr1
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat)) x y
· nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)
    (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
⊗^{ TD} nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) y
· pr1 (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD) x y
ptd x y · pr1 ptdinv x y = identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)

          
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
x, y: C
t:= ptcounit x y: compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptdinv ptd x y
· identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
· identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TD x y
ptd x y · pr1 ptdinv x y = identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)

TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)

ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)

     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)

  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)

  TD TD

     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)

  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,

     (functor_identity C),,

  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
x, y: C
t:= ptcounit x y: compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptdinv ptd x y
· identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
· identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
ptd x y · pr1 ptdinv x y = identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)

TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)

  (functor_identity C)

     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)

  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))

  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,

C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
x, y: C
t: ptd (functor_identity C x) (functor_identity C y)
· (# (functor_identity C))%cat (ptdinv x y) =
identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
ptd x y · pr1 ptdinv x y = identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)

          
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
x, y: C
t: ptd
  ((functor_identity_data C,,
    is_functor_identity C) x)
  ((functor_identity_data C,,
    is_functor_identity C) y)
· (# (functor_identity_data C,,
      is_functor_identity C))%cat 
    (ptdinv x y) = identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
ptd x y · pr1 ptdinv x y = identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)

          exact t.
        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
x, y: C
pr1 ptdinv x y · ptd x y = identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
x, y: C
t:= ! ptunit x y: nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
⊗^{ TC} nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) y
· pr1
    (compositions_preserves_tensor 
       (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv) x y =
pr1 (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC) x y
· nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)
    (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
pr1 ptdinv x y · ptd x y = identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)

          
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
x, y: C
t:= ! ptunit x y: identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
· compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptd ptdinv x
    y =
identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TC x y
· identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
pr1 ptdinv x y · ptd x y = identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)

          
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
x, y: C
t:= ! ptunit x y: identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
· compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptd ptdinv x
    y =
identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
· identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
pr1 ptdinv x y · ptd x y = identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)

          
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
x, y: C
t: identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
· compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptd ptdinv x
    y = identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
pr1 ptdinv x y · ptd x y = identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)

          
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
x, y: C
t: identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
· compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptd ptdinv x
    y = identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
pr1 ptdinv x y · ptd x y = identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)

          
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
x, y: C
t: compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptd ptdinv x y =
identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
pr1 ptdinv x y · ptd x y = identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)

          
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
x, y: C
t: ptdinv (functor_identity C x)
  (functor_identity C y)
· (# (functor_identity C))%cat (ptd x y) =
identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
pr1 ptdinv x y · ptd x y = identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)

          exact t.
    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
(λ α : ∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
 ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C) (f : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
 pr1 (α a1 b1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
 f ⊗^{ TD} g · pr1 (α a2 b2))
  (λ x y : C,
   make_z_iso (ptd x y) (pr1 ptdinv x y)
     ((let t := ptcounit x y in
       let t0 :=
         internal_paths_rew
           (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
           (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptdinv
              ptd x y · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
           (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
            p =
            identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
            · identity
                (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y))) t
           (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptdinv
              ptd x y)
           (id_right
              (compositions_preserves_tensor_data
                 ptdinv ptd x y)) in
       let t1 :=
         internal_paths_rew
           (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
           (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
           (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
            compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptdinv
              ptd x y =
            p
            · identity
                (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y))) t0
           (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)) (tensor_id TD x y)
         in
       let t2 :=
         internal_paths_rew
           (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y,
            functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y) ⟧)
           (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
            · identity
                (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
           (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y,
                  functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y) ⟧,
            compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptdinv
              ptd x y = p) t1 (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
           (id_right (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))) in
       t2),,
      (let t := ! ptunit x y in
       let t0 :=
         internal_paths_rew
           (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
            x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
           (identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
           (λ p : C
                  ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                  x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
            identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
            · compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptd
                ptdinv x y = p) t
           (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
           (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))) in
       let t1 :=
         internal_paths_rew
           (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
           (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
           (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
            p
            · compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptd
                ptdinv x y = identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
           t0 (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
           (tensor_id TC x y) in
       let t2 :=
         internal_paths_rew
           (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
           (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
            · compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptd
                ptdinv x y)
           (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
            p = identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)) t1
           (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptd
              ptdinv x y)
           (id_left
              (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptd
                 ptdinv x y)) in
       t2)))
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
ptd: preserves_tensor_data TC TD (functor_identity C)
ptnat: preserves_tensor_nat ptd
ptdinv: preserves_tensor TD TC (functor_identity C)
ptunit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)) TC
  TC (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TC)
  (compositions_preserves_tensor
     (ptd,, ptnat) ptdinv)
ptcounit: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C C
  (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
  TD TD
  (compositions_preserves_tensor ptdinv
     (ptd,, ptnat))
  (identityfunctor_preserves_tensor TD)
ax: disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
equiv: disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (internal_adjunction_data_identity C,,
   is_internal_adjunction_identity C,,
   is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
     (functor_identity C),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
     (functor_identity C))
  (ptdinv,, ptunit,, ptcounit)
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
pr1
  (make_z_iso (ptd x1 y1) (pr1 ptdinv x1 y1)
     ((let t := ptcounit x1 y1 in
       let t0 :=
         internal_paths_rew
           (C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1, x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 ⟧)
           (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptdinv
              ptd x1 y1 · identity (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
           (λ p : C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1, x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 ⟧,
            p =
            identity x1 ⊗^{ TD} identity y1
            · identity
                (functor_identity C (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)))
           t
           (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptdinv
              ptd x1 y1)
           (id_right
              (compositions_preserves_tensor_data
                 ptdinv ptd x1 y1)) in
       let t1 :=
         internal_paths_rew
           (C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1, x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 ⟧)
           (identity x1 ⊗^{ TD} identity y1)
           (λ p : C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1, x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 ⟧,
            compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptdinv
              ptd x1 y1 =
            p
            · identity
                (functor_identity C (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)))
           t0 (identity (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
           (tensor_id TD x1 y1) in
       let t2 :=
         internal_paths_rew
           (C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1,
            functor_identity C (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) ⟧)
           (identity (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)
            · identity
                (functor_identity C (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)))
           (λ p : C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1,
                  functor_identity C (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1) ⟧,
            compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptdinv
              ptd x1 y1 = p) t1
           (identity (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
           (id_right (identity (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))) in
       t2),,
      (let t := ! ptunit x1 y1 in
       let t0 :=
         internal_paths_rew
           (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1),
            x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1 ⟧)
           (identity
              (functor_identity C (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
            · identity (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
           (λ p : C
                  ⟦ functor_identity C (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1),
                  x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1 ⟧,
            identity x1 ⊗^{ TC} identity y1
            · compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptd
                ptdinv x1 y1 = p) t
           (identity (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
           (id_left (identity (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))) in
       let t1 :=
         internal_paths_rew
           (C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1 ⟧)
           (identity x1 ⊗^{ TC} identity y1)
           (λ p : C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1 ⟧,
            p
            · compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptd
                ptdinv x1 y1 =
            identity (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)) t0
           (identity (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
           (tensor_id TC x1 y1) in
       let t2 :=
         internal_paths_rew
           (C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1 ⟧)
           (identity (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
            · compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptd
                ptdinv x1 y1)
           (λ p : C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1 ⟧,
            p = identity (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)) t1
           (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptd
              ptdinv x1 y1)
           (id_left
              (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptd
                 ptdinv x1 y1)) in
       t2))) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g
· pr1
    (make_z_iso (ptd x2 y2) (pr1 ptdinv x2 y2)
       ((let t := ptcounit x2 y2 in
         let t0 :=
           internal_paths_rew
             (C ⟦ x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
             (compositions_preserves_tensor_data
                ptdinv ptd x2 y2
              · identity (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2))
             (λ p : C ⟦ x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧,
              p =
              identity x2 ⊗^{ TD} identity y2
              · identity
                  (functor_identity C (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2)))
             t
             (compositions_preserves_tensor_data
                ptdinv ptd x2 y2)
             (id_right
                (compositions_preserves_tensor_data
                   ptdinv ptd x2 y2)) in
         let t1 :=
           internal_paths_rew
             (C ⟦ x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
             (identity x2 ⊗^{ TD} identity y2)
             (λ p : C ⟦ x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧,
              compositions_preserves_tensor_data
                ptdinv ptd x2 y2 =
              p
              · identity
                  (functor_identity C (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2)))
             t0 (identity (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2))
             (tensor_id TD x2 y2) in
         let t2 :=
           internal_paths_rew
             (C ⟦ x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2,
              functor_identity C (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2) ⟧)
             (identity (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2)
              · identity
                  (functor_identity C (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2)))
             (λ p : C ⟦ x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2,
                    functor_identity C (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2)
                    ⟧,
              compositions_preserves_tensor_data
                ptdinv ptd x2 y2 = p) t1
             (identity (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2))
             (id_right (identity (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2))) in
         t2),,
        (let t := ! ptunit x2 y2 in
         let t0 :=
           internal_paths_rew
             (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2),
              x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
             (identity
                (functor_identity C (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2))
              · identity (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2))
             (λ p : C
                    ⟦ functor_identity C
                        (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2), x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2
                    ⟧,
              identity x2 ⊗^{ TC} identity y2
              · compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptd
                  ptdinv x2 y2 = p) t
             (identity (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2))
             (id_left (identity (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2))) in
         let t1 :=
           internal_paths_rew
             (C ⟦ x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
             (identity x2 ⊗^{ TC} identity y2)
             (λ p : C ⟦ x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧,
              p
              · compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptd
                  ptdinv x2 y2 =
              identity (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)) t0
             (identity (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2))
             (tensor_id TC x2 y2) in
         let t2 :=
           internal_paths_rew
             (C ⟦ x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
             (identity (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
              · compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptd
                  ptdinv x2 y2)
             (λ p : C ⟦ x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧,
              p = identity (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)) t1
             (compositions_preserves_tensor_data ptd
                ptdinv x2 y2)
             (id_left
                (compositions_preserves_tensor_data
                   ptd ptdinv x2 y2)) in
         t2)))

      exact (ptnat x1 x2 y1 y2 f g).
  Defined.

  
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p1: z_iso x1 y1
p2: z_iso x2 y2
∏ (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
pr1 p1 · g = f · pr1 p2
→ inv_from_z_iso p1 · f = g · inv_from_z_iso p2

  
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p1: z_iso x1 y1
p2: z_iso x2 y2
∏ (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
pr1 p1 · g = f · pr1 p2
→ inv_from_z_iso p1 · f = g · inv_from_z_iso p2

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p1: z_iso x1 y1
p2: z_iso x2 y2
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
p: pr1 p1 · g = f · pr1 p2
inv_from_z_iso p1 · f = g · inv_from_z_iso p2

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p1: z_iso x1 y1
p2: z_iso x2 y2
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
p: pr1 p1 · g = f · pr1 p2
f = p1 · (g · inv_from_z_iso p2)

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p1: z_iso x1 y1
p2: z_iso x2 y2
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
p: pr1 p1 · g = f · pr1 p2
f = p1 · g · inv_from_z_iso p2

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p1: z_iso x1 y1
p2: z_iso x2 y2
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
p: pr1 p1 · g = f · pr1 p2
p1 · g = f · p2

    apply p.
  Qed.

  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
tensor_iso TC TD
→ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) TC TD

  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
tensor_iso TC TD
→ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) TC TD

    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_adjoint_equivalence (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
  TC TD

TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
TC -->[ idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)] TD

ti: tensor_iso TC TD
(λ ff : TC -->[ idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)] TD,
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
   (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) ff) ?pr1

TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
TC -->[ idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)] TD

TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C

preserves_tensor_data TC TD
  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))

TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C

(λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TC TD
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)),
 preserves_tensor_nat ptF) ?pr1

      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
preserves_tensor_data TC TD
  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
C
⟦ idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x
  ⊗_{ TD} idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y,
idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) ⟧

        apply ti.
      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
(λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TC TD
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)),
 preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
  ((λ x y : C,
    let X := pr1 ti in
    let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
    X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
      (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
   :
   preserves_tensor_data TC TD
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
(let X := pr1 ti in
 let X0 := λ x y : C, pr1 (X x y) in
 X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x1)
   (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y1))
· (# (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))%cat (f ⊗^{ TC} g) =
(# (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))%cat f
⊗^{ TD} (# (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))%cat g
· (let X := pr1 ti in
   let X0 := λ x y : C, pr1 (X x y) in
   X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x2)
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y2))

        exact ((pr2 ti) x1 x2 y1 y2 f g).

    (* disp_left_adjoint_equivalence *)
    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
(λ ff : TC -->[ idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)] TD,
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
   (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) ff)
  (((λ x y : C,
     let X := pr1 ti in
     let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
     X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
       (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
    :
    preserves_tensor_data TC TD
      (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),,
   ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
    :
    (λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TC TD
               (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)),
     preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
      ((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
        X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
       :
       preserves_tensor_data TC TD
         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))))
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_left_adjoint_data (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
  (((λ x y : C,
     let X := pr1 ti in
     let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
     X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
       (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
    :
    preserves_tensor_data TC TD
      (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),,
   ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
    :
    (λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TC TD
               (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)),
     preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
      ((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
        X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
       :
       preserves_tensor_data TC TD
         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))))
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
(λ ααd : disp_left_adjoint_data
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
           (((λ x y : C,
              let X := pr1 ti in
              let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
              X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
             :
             preserves_tensor_data TC TD
               (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),,
            ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
              (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
              pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
             :
             (λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TC TD
                        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)),
              preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
               ((λ x y : C,
                 let X := pr1 ti in
                 let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0)
                   in
                 X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
                   (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
                :
                preserves_tensor_data TC TD
                  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))),
 disp_left_adjoint_axioms (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
   ααd
 × disp_left_equivalence_axioms
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) ααd) ?pr1

      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_left_adjoint_data (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
  (((λ x y : C,
     let X := pr1 ti in
     let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
     X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
       (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
    :
    preserves_tensor_data TC TD
      (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),,
   ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
    :

     preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
