C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_2cells
  (left_adjoint_unit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
  (id_disp TC)
  ((((λ x y : C,
      let X := pr1 ti in
      let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
      X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
     :
     preserves_tensor_data TC TD
       (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),,
    ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
      (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
     :
     (λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TC TD
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)),
      preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
       ((λ x y : C,
         let X := pr1 ti in
         let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
         X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
        :
        preserves_tensor_data TC TD
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))) ;; (?pr1,,
                                              ?pr20))
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
(λ _ : disp_2cells
         (left_adjoint_unit
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) (id_disp TC)
         ((((λ x y : C,
             let X := pr1 ti in
             let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
             X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
               (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
            :
            preserves_tensor_data TC TD
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),,
           ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
             (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
             pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
            :
            (λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TC TD
                       (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)),
             preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
              ((λ x y : C,
                let X := pr1 ti in
                let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0)
                  in
                X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
                  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
               :
               preserves_tensor_data TC TD
                 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))) ;; 
          (?pr1,, ?pr20)),
 disp_2cells
   (left_adjoint_counit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
   ((?pr1,, ?pr20) ;; (((λ x y : C,
                         let X := pr1 ti in
                         let X0 :=
                           λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0)
                           in
                         X0
                           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)
                              x)
                           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)
                              y))
                        :
                        preserves_tensor_data TC TD
                          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),,
                       ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                         (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                         (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                         pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
                        :
                        (λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data
                                   TC TD
                                   (idtoiso_2_0 C C
                                      (idpath C)),
                         preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
                          ((λ x y : C,
                            let X := pr1 ti in
                            let X0 :=
                              λ x0 y0 : C,
                              pr1 (X x0 y0) in
                            X0
                              (idtoiso_2_0 C C
                                 (idpath C) x)
                              (idtoiso_2_0 C C
                                 (idpath C) y))
                           :
                           preserves_tensor_data TC TD
                             (idtoiso_2_0 C C
                                (idpath C))))))
   (id_disp TD)) ?pr10

      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
preserves_tensor_data TD TC
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
C
⟦ left_adjoint_right_adjoint
    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x
  ⊗_{ TC} left_adjoint_right_adjoint
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y,
left_adjoint_right_adjoint
  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) (x ⊗_{ TD} y) ⟧

        apply ti.
      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
(λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TD TC
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),
 preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
  ((λ x y : C,
    let X := pr1 ti in
    let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
    let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
    X1
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y))
   :
   preserves_tensor_data TD TC
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
(let X := pr1 ti in
 let X0 := λ x y : C, pr2 (X x y) in
 let X1 := λ x y : C, pr1 (X0 x y) in
 X1
   (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
      (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x1)
   (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
      (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y1))
· (# (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))%cat
    (f ⊗^{ TD} g) =
(# (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
      (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))%cat f
⊗^{ TC} (# (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))%cat g
· (let X := pr1 ti in
   let X0 := λ x y : C, pr2 (X x y) in
   let X1 := λ x y : C, pr1 (X0 x y) in
   X1
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x2)
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y2))

        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
n: ∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
i: ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C) (f : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
pr1 (n a1 b1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g · pr1 (n a2 b2)
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
(let X := pr1 (n,, i) in
 let X0 := λ x y : C, pr2 (X x y) in
 let X1 := λ x y : C, pr1 (X0 x y) in
 X1
   (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
      (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x1)
   (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
      (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y1))
· (# (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))%cat
    (f ⊗^{ TD} g) =
(# (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
      (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))%cat f
⊗^{ TC} (# (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))%cat g
· (let X := pr1 (n,, i) in
   let X0 := λ x y : C, pr2 (X x y) in
   let X1 := λ x y : C, pr1 (X0 x y) in
   X1
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x2)
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y2))

        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
n: ∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
i: ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C) (f : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
pr1 (n a1 b1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g · pr1 (n a2 b2)
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
pr1 (n x1 y1) · f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g =
f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g · pr1 (n x2 y2)

        exact (i x1 x2 y1 y2 f g).
      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_2cells
  (left_adjoint_unit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
  (id_disp TC)
  ((((λ x y : C,
      let X := pr1 ti in
      let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
      X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
     :
     preserves_tensor_data TC TD
       (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),,
    ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
      (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
     :
     (λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TC TD
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)),
      preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
       ((λ x y : C,
         let X := pr1 ti in
         let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
         X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
        :
        preserves_tensor_data TC TD
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))) ;; (((λ 
                                                x
                                                 y : C,
                                                let
                                                 X :=
                                                 pr1
                                                 ti in
                                                let
                                                 X0 :=
                                                 λ 
                                                 x0
                                                 y0 : C,
                                                 pr2
                                                 (X x0
                                                 y0)
                                                 in
                                                let
                                                 X1 :=
                                                 λ 
                                                 x0
                                                 y0 : C,
                                                 pr1
                                                 (X0
                                                 x0 y0)
                                                 in
                                                X1
                                                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C)) x)
                                                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C)) y))
                                               :
                                               preserves_tensor_data
                                                 TD TC
                                                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C)))),,
                                              ((λ 
                                                (x1 x2
                                                 y1
                                                 y2 : C)
                                                (f : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x1,
                                                 x2 ⟧)
                                                (g : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y1,
                                                 y2 ⟧),
                                                (λ 
                                                 (n : 
                                                 ∏
                                                 x
                                                 y : C,
                                                 z_iso
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗_{ TD} y)
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗_{ TC} y))
                                                 (i : 
                                                 ∏
                                                 (a1
                                                 a2 b1
                                                 b2 : C)
                                                 (f0 : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ a1,
                                                 a2 ⟧)
                                                 (g0 : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ b1,
                                                 b2 ⟧),
                                                 pr1
                                                 (n a1
                                                 b1)
                                                 · 
                                                 f0
                                                 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                                                 f0
                                                 ⊗^{ TD} g0
                                                 · 
                                                 pr1
                                                 (n a2
                                                 b2)),
                                                 swap_along_zisos
                                                 (n x1
                                                 y1)
                                                 (n x2
                                                 y2)
                                                 (f
                                                 ⊗^{ 
                                                 pr1
                                                 TD} g)
                                                 (f
                                                 ⊗^{ 
                                                 pr1
                                                 TC} g)
                                                 (i x1
                                                 x2 y1
                                                 y2 f
                                                 g))
                                                 (pr1
                                                 ti)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 ti))
                                               :
                                               (λ 
                                                ptF : 
                                                 preserves_tensor_data
                                                 TD TC
                                                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C))),
                                                preserves_tensor_nat
                                                 ptF)
                                                 ((λ 
                                                 x
                                                 y : C,
                                                 let
                                                 X :=
                                                 pr1
                                                 ti in
                                                 let
                                                 X0 :=
                                                 λ 
                                                 x0
                                                 y0 : C,
                                                 pr2
                                                 (X x0
                                                 y0)
                                                 in
                                                 let
                                                 X1 :=
                                                 λ 
                                                 x0
                                                 y0 : C,
                                                 pr1
                                                 (X0
                                                 x0 y0)
                                                 in
                                                 X1
                                                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C)) x)
                                                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C)) y))
                                                 :
                                                 preserves_tensor_data
                                                 TD TC
                                                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C)))))))
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
pr1 (id_disp TC) x y
· left_adjoint_unit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
    (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
left_adjoint_unit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x
⊗^{ TC} left_adjoint_unit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
          y
· pr1
    (((λ x y : C,
       let X := pr1 ti in
       let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
       X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y)),,
      (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
       (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) ;; 
     ((λ x y : C,
       let X := pr1 ti in
       let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
       let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
       X1
         (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
         (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
      (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
       (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
       swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
         (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
         (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)))) x y

        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TC x y
· identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
· compositions_preserves_tensor_data
    (λ x y : C, pr1 (pr1 ti x y))
    (λ x y : C, pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) x y

        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
· identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
· compositions_preserves_tensor_data
    (λ x y : C, pr1 (pr1 ti x y))
    (λ x y : C, pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) x y

        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
· identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
· (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
           (functor_identity C y))
   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))

        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
· (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
           (functor_identity C y))
   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))

        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
· (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
           (functor_identity C y))
   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))

        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
        (functor_identity C y))
· (# (functor_identity C))%cat (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))

        apply (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv ((pr1 ti x y))).
      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
(λ _ : disp_2cells
         (left_adjoint_unit
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) (id_disp TC)
         ((((λ x y : C,
             let X := pr1 ti in
             let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
             X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
               (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
            :
            preserves_tensor_data TC TD
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),,
           ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
             (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
             pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
            :
            (λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TC TD
                       (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)),
             preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
              ((λ x y : C,
                let X := pr1 ti in
                let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0)
                  in
                X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
                  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
               :
               preserves_tensor_data TC TD
                 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))) ;; 
          (((λ x y : C,
             let X := pr1 ti in
             let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
             let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
             X1
               (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
               (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y))
            :
            preserves_tensor_data TD TC
              (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))),,
           ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
             (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
             (λ (n : ∏ x y : C,
                     z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
              (i : ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C)
                   (f0 : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧)
                   (g0 : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
                   pr1 (n a1 b1) · f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                   f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0 · pr1 (n a2 b2)),
              swap_along_zisos (n x1 y1) (n x2 y2)
                (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
                (i x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) (pr1 ti) (pr2 ti))
            :
            (λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TD TC
                       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),
             preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
              ((λ x y : C,
                let X := pr1 ti in
                let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0)
                  in
                let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0)
                  in
                X1
                  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
                  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y))
               :
               preserves_tensor_data TD TC
                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))))),
 disp_2cells
   (left_adjoint_counit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
   ((((λ x y : C,
       let X := pr1 ti in
       let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
       let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
       X1
         (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
         (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y))
      :
      preserves_tensor_data TD TC
        (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))),,
     ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
       (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
       (λ (n : ∏ x y : C,
               z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
        (i : ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧)
             (g0 : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
             pr1 (n a1 b1) · f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
             f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0 · pr1 (n a2 b2)),
        swap_along_zisos (n x1 y1) (n x2 y2)
          (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
          (i x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) (pr1 ti) (pr2 ti))
      :
      (λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TD TC
                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),
       preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
        ((λ x y : C,
          let X := pr1 ti in
          let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
          let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
          X1
            (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
               (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
            (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
               (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y))
         :
         preserves_tensor_data TD TC
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))))) ;; 
    (((λ x y : C,
       let X := pr1 ti in
       let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
       X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
      :
      preserves_tensor_data TC TD
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),,
     ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
       (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
      :
      (λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TC TD
                 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)),
       preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
        ((λ x y : C,
          let X := pr1 ti in
          let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
          X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
         :
         preserves_tensor_data TC TD
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))))
   (id_disp TD))
  ((λ x y : C,
    ((internal_paths_rew_r
        (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
         x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
        (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
        (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
        (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
               x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
         p =
         identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
         · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                    (functor_identity C y))
            · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
           (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
           (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
           (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
            identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
            p
            · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                       (functor_identity C y))
               · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                   (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
              (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
               · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                          (functor_identity C y))
                  · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                      (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
              (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                       (functor_identity C y))
               · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                   (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
              (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
               identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
              (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
              (id_left
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                          (functor_identity C y))
                  · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                      (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
           (tensor_id TC x y))
        (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))
      :
      identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
      · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
      identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
      · compositions_preserves_tensor_data
          (λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y0))
          (λ x0 y0 : C, pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y0)) x y)
     :
     identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TC x y
     · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
     identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
     · compositions_preserves_tensor_data
         (λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y0))
         (λ x0 y0 : C, pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y0)) x y)
    :
    pr1 (id_disp TC) x y
    · left_adjoint_unit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
        (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
    left_adjoint_unit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x
    ⊗^{ TC} left_adjoint_unit
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y
    · pr1
        (((λ x0 y0 : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x1 y1 : C, pr1 (X x1 y1) in
           X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x0)
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y0)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) ;; 
         ((λ x0 y0 : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x1 y1 : C, pr2 (X x1 y1) in
           let X1 := λ x1 y1 : C, pr1 (X0 x1 y1) in
           X1
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x0)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y0)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)))) x y)
   :
   disp_2cells
     (left_adjoint_unit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
     (id_disp TC)
     ((((λ x y : C,
         let X := pr1 ti in
         let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
         X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
        :
        preserves_tensor_data TC TD
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),,
       ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
         (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
        :
        (λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TC TD
                   (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)),
         preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
          ((λ x y : C,
            let X := pr1 ti in
            let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
            X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
           :
           preserves_tensor_data TC TD
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))) ;; (((λ 
                                                 x
                                                 y : C,
                                                 let
                                                 X :=
                                                 pr1
                                                 ti in
                                                 let
                                                 X0 :=
                                                 λ 
                                                 x0
                                                 y0 : C,
                                                 pr2
                                                 (X x0
                                                 y0)
                                                 in
                                                 let
                                                 X1 :=
                                                 λ 
                                                 x0
                                                 y0 : C,
                                                 pr1
                                                 (X0
                                                 x0 y0)
                                                 in
                                                 X1
                                                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C)) x)
                                                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C)) y))
                                                 :
                                                 preserves_tensor_data
                                                 TD TC
                                                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C)))),,
                                                 ((λ 
                                                 (x1
                                                 x2 y1
                                                 y2 : C)
                                                 (f : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x1,
                                                 x2 ⟧)
                                                 (g : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y1,
                                                 y2 ⟧),
                                                 (λ 
                                                 (n : 
                                                 ∏
                                                 x
                                                 y : C,
                                                 z_iso
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗_{ TD} y)
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗_{ TC} y))
                                                 (i : 
                                                 ∏
                                                 (a1
                                                 a2 b1
                                                 b2 : C)
                                                 (f0 : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ a1,
                                                 a2 ⟧)
                                                 (g0 : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ b1,
                                                 b2 ⟧),
                                                 pr1
                                                 (n a1
                                                 b1)
                                                 · 
                                                 f0
                                                 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                                                 f0
                                                 ⊗^{ TD} g0
                                                 · 
                                                 pr1
                                                 (n a2
                                                 b2)),
                                                 swap_along_zisos
                                                 (n x1
                                                 y1)
                                                 (n x2
                                                 y2)
                                                 (f
                                                 ⊗^{ 
                                                 pr1
                                                 TD} g)
                                                 (f
                                                 ⊗^{ 
                                                 pr1
                                                 TC} g)
                                                 (i x1
                                                 x2 y1
                                                 y2 f
                                                 g))
                                                 (pr1
                                                 ti)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 ti))
                                                 :
                                                 (λ 
                                                 ptF : 
                                                 preserves_tensor_data
                                                 TD TC
                                                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C))),
                                                 preserves_tensor_nat
                                                 ptF)
                                                 ((λ 
                                                 x
                                                 y : C,
                                                 let
                                                 X :=
                                                 pr1
                                                 ti in
                                                 let
                                                 X0 :=
                                                 λ 
                                                 x0
                                                 y0 : C,
                                                 pr2
                                                 (X x0
                                                 y0)
                                                 in
                                                 let
                                                 X1 :=
                                                 λ 
                                                 x0
                                                 y0 : C,
                                                 pr1
                                                 (X0
                                                 x0 y0)
                                                 in
                                                 X1
                                                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C)) x)
                                                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C)) y))
                                                 :
                                                 preserves_tensor_data
                                                 TD TC
                                                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C))))))))
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
pr1
  (((λ x y : C,
     let X := pr1 ti in
     let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
     let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
     X1
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
    (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
       (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
       (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))) ;; ((λ x y : C,
                                       let X := pr1 ti
                                         in
                                       let X0 :=
                                         λ x0 y0 : C,
                                         pr1 (X x0 y0)
                                         in
                                       X0
                                         (idtoiso_2_0
                                            C C
                                            (idpath C)
                                            x)
                                         (idtoiso_2_0
                                            C C
                                            (idpath C)
                                            y)),,
                                      (λ (x1 x2 y1
                                          y2 : C)
                                       (f : C ⟦ x1, x2
                                            ⟧)
                                       (g : C ⟦ y1, y2
                                            ⟧),
                                       pr2 ti x1 x2 y1
                                         y2 f g))) x y
· left_adjoint_counit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
    (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
left_adjoint_counit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x
⊗^{ TD} left_adjoint_counit
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y
· pr1 (id_disp TD) x y

        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
compositions_preserves_tensor_data
  (λ x y : C, pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
  (λ x y : C, pr1 (pr1 ti x y)) x y
· identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
· identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TD x y

        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
pr1
  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
     (functor_identity C y))
· (# (functor_identity C))%cat (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
· identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
· identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TD x y

        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
pr1
  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
     (functor_identity C y))
· (# (functor_identity C))%cat (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
· identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
· identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y))

        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
pr1
  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
     (functor_identity C y))
· (# (functor_identity C))%cat (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
· identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y))

        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
pr1
  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
     (functor_identity C y))
· (# (functor_identity C))%cat (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
· identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y))

        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
pr1
  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
     (functor_identity C y))
· (# (functor_identity C))%cat (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y))

        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y) =
identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)

        apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso ((pr1 ti x y))).
      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
(λ ααd : disp_left_adjoint_data
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
           (((λ x y : C,
              let X := pr1 ti in
              let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
              X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
             :
             preserves_tensor_data TC TD
               (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),,
            ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
              (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
              pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
             :
             (λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TC TD
                        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)),
              preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
               ((λ x y : C,
                 let X := pr1 ti in
                 let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0)
                   in
                 X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
                   (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
                :
                preserves_tensor_data TC TD
                  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))),
 disp_left_adjoint_axioms (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
   ααd
 × disp_left_equivalence_axioms
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) ααd)
  ((((λ x y : C,
      let X := pr1 ti in
      let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
      let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
      X1
        (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
        (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y))
     :
     preserves_tensor_data TD TC
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))),,
    ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
      (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
      (λ (n : ∏ x y : C,
              z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       (i : ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧)
            (g0 : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
            pr1 (n a1 b1) · f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
            f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0 · pr1 (n a2 b2)),
       swap_along_zisos (n x1 y1) (n x2 y2)
         (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
         (i x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) (pr1 ti) (pr2 ti))
     :
     (λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TD TC
                (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                   (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),
      preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
       ((λ x y : C,
         let X := pr1 ti in
         let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
         let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
         X1
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y))
        :
        preserves_tensor_data TD TC
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))))),,
   ((λ x y : C,
     ((internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
          x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
             p
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
            (tensor_id TC x y))
         (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))
       :
       identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
       identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
       · compositions_preserves_tensor_data
           (λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y0))
           (λ x0 y0 : C, pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y0)) x y)
      :
      identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TC x y
      · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
      identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
      · compositions_preserves_tensor_data
          (λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y0))
          (λ x0 y0 : C, pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y0)) x y)
     :
     pr1 (id_disp TC) x y
     · left_adjoint_unit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
         (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
     left_adjoint_unit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x
     ⊗^{ TC} left_adjoint_unit
               (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y
     · pr1
         (((λ x0 y0 : C,
            let X := pr1 ti in
            let X0 := λ x1 y1 : C, pr1 (X x1 y1) in
            X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x0)
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y0)),,
           (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) ;; 
          ((λ x0 y0 : C,
            let X := pr1 ti in
            let X0 := λ x1 y1 : C, pr2 (X x1 y1) in
            let X1 := λ x1 y1 : C, pr1 (X0 x1 y1) in
            X1
              (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x0)
              (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y0)),,
           (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
            swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
              (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
              (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
              (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)))) x y)
    :
    disp_2cells
      (left_adjoint_unit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
      (id_disp TC)
      ((((λ x y : C,
          let X := pr1 ti in
          let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
          X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
         :
         preserves_tensor_data TC TD
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),,
        ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
         :
         (λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TC TD
                    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)),
          preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
           ((λ x y : C,
             let X := pr1 ti in

             X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
               (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
            :
            preserves_tensor_data TC TD
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))) ;; (((λ

                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C)))))))),,
   ((λ x y : C,
     ((internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,

             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =

             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat

                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
                identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (id_left
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
            (tensor_id TD x y))
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))
       :
       pr1
         (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
            (functor_identity C y))
       · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
       · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =

       · identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TD x y)
      :
      compositions_preserves_tensor_data
        (λ x0 y0 : C, pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y0))

      · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =

      · identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TD x y)
     :
     pr1
       (((λ x0 y0 : C,
          let X := pr1 ti in
          let X0 := λ x1 y1 : C, pr2 (X x1 y1) in
          let X1 := λ x1 y1 : C, pr1 (X0 x1 y1) in

            (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
               (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x0)
            (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
               (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y0)),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),

            (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
            (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g) (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))) ;; 
        ((λ x0 y0 : C,
          let X := pr1 ti in
          let X0 := λ x1 y1 : C, pr1 (X x1 y1) in
          X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x0)
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y0)),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)))
       x y
     · left_adjoint_counit
         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
     left_adjoint_counit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
       x
     ⊗^{ TD} left_adjoint_counit
               (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y
     · pr1 (id_disp TD) x y)
    :
    (λ _ : disp_2cells
             (left_adjoint_unit
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
             (id_disp TC)
             ((((λ x y : C,
                 let X := pr1 ti in
                 let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0)

                      (idtoiso_2_0 C C (...) y))

                     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))) ;; 
              (((λ x y : C,
                 let X := pr1 ti in

                      (idtoiso_2_0 C C (...)) y))

                     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))),,
               ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                 (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                 (λ (n : ∏ x y : C,
                         z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                           (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                  (i : ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C)
                       (f0 : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧)
                       (g0 : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
                       pr1 (...) · f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                       f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0 · pr1 (...)),
                  swap_along_zisos (n x1 y1) (n x2 y2)
                    (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
                    (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
                    (i x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) (pr1 ti)
                   (pr2 ti))

                           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint

                                 (idpath C))),

                  ((λ x y : C,
                    let X := pr1 ti in
                    let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (...)
                      in
                    let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 ... in
                    X1
                      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint ...
                         x)
                      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint ...
                         y))
                   :
                   preserves_tensor_data TD TC
                     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))))),
     disp_2cells
       (left_adjoint_counit
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
       ((((λ x y : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
           let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in

             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y))
          :
          preserves_tensor_data TD TC
            (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
               (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))),,
         ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
