           (λ (n : ∏ x y : C,
                   z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (i : ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
                 pr1 (n a1 b1) · f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0 · pr1 (n a2 b2)),
            swap_along_zisos (n x1 y1) (n x2 y2)
              (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
              (i x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) (pr1 ti) (pr2 ti))
          :
          (λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TD TC
                     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),
           preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
            ((λ x y : C,
              let X := pr1 ti in
              let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
              let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (...) in
              X1 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (...) x)
                (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (...) y))
             :
             preserves_tensor_data TD TC
               (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))))) ;; 
        (((λ x y : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
           X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
          :
          preserves_tensor_data TC TD
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),,
         ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
          :
          (λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TC TD
                     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)),
           preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
            ((λ x y : C,
              let X := pr1 ti in
              let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
              X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
             :
             preserves_tensor_data TC TD
               (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))))
       (id_disp TD))
      ((λ x y : C,
        ((internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                   x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (...))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                p
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti ... ...)
                   · (# ...)%cat (...)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti ... ...)
                      · (# ...)%cat (...)))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (...)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧, identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti ... ...)
                      · (# ...)%cat (...))))
               (tensor_id TC x y))
            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))
          :
          identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · compositions_preserves_tensor_data
              (λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y0))
              (λ x0 y0 : C, pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y0)) x y)
         :
         identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TC x y
         · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
         identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
         · compositions_preserves_tensor_data
             (λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y0))
             (λ x0 y0 : C, pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y0)) x y)
        :
        pr1 (id_disp TC) x y
        · left_adjoint_unit
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
        left_adjoint_unit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
          x
        ⊗^{ TC} left_adjoint_unit
                  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y
        · pr1
            (((λ x0 y0 : C,
               let X := pr1 ti in
               let X0 := λ x1 y1 : C, pr1 (X x1 y1) in
               X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x0)
                 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y0)),,
              (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) ;; ((λ x0
                                                y0 : C,
                                             let X :=
                                               pr1 ti
                                               in
                                             let X0 :=
                                               λ x1
                                                 y1 : C,
                                               pr2
                                                 (X x1
                                                 y1)
                                               in
                                             let X1 :=
                                               λ x1
                                                 y1 : C,
                                               pr1
                                                 (...)
                                               in
                                             X1
                                               (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                 (...)
                                                 x0)
                                               (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                 (...)
                                                 y0)),,
                                            (λ (x1 x2
                                                y1
                                                y2 : C)
                                             (f : 
                                              C ⟦ x1,
                                              x2 ⟧)
                                             (g : 
                                              C ⟦ y1,
                                              y2 ⟧),
                                             swap_along_zisos
                                               (pr1 ti
                                                 x1 y1)
                                               (pr1 ti
                                                 x2 y2)
                                               (f
                                                ⊗^{ 
                                                pr1 TD} g)
                                               (f
                                                ⊗^{ 
                                                pr1 TC} g)
                                               (pr2 ti
                                                 x1 x2
                                                 y1 y2
                                                 f g))))
            x y)
       :
       disp_2cells
         (left_adjoint_unit
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) (id_disp TC)
         ((((λ x y : C,
             let X := pr1 ti in
             let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
             X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
               (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
            :
            preserves_tensor_data TC TD
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),,
           ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
             (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
             pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
            :
            (λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TC TD
                       (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)),
             preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
              ((λ x y : C,
                let X := pr1 ti in
                let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0)
                  in
                X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
                  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y))
               :
               preserves_tensor_data TC TD
                 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))) ;; 
          (((λ x y : C,
             let X := pr1 ti in
             let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
             let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
             X1
               (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
               (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y))
            :
            preserves_tensor_data TD TC
              (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))),,
           ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
             (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
             (λ (n : ∏ x y : C,
                     z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
              (i : ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C)
                   (f0 : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧)
                   (g0 : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
                   pr1 (n a1 b1) · f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                   f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0 · pr1 (n a2 b2)),
              swap_along_zisos (n x1 y1) (n x2 y2)
                (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
                (i x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) (pr1 ti) (pr2 ti))
            :
            (λ ptF : preserves_tensor_data TD TC
                       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),
             preserves_tensor_nat ptF)
              ((λ x y : C,
                let X := pr1 ti in
                let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0)
                  in
                let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (...) in
                X1
                  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (...) x)
                  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (...) y))
               :
               preserves_tensor_data TD TC
                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))))))))

        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_left_adjoint_axioms (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
  (((λ x y : C,
     let X := pr1 ti in
     let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
     let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
     X1
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
    (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
       (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
       (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
   (λ x y : C,
    internal_paths_rew_r
      (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
       x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
      (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
      (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
      (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
       p =
       identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
       · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
          p
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
            (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
            (id_left
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
         (tensor_id TC x y))
      (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
   (λ x y : C,
    internal_paths_rew_r
      (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
      (pr1
         (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
            (functor_identity C y))
       · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
       · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
      (pr1
         (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
            (functor_identity C y))
       · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
      (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
       p =
       identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
       · identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
          p
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
            (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
            (id_left
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
         (tensor_id TD x y))
      (id_right
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))))
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
  (((λ x y : C,
     let X := pr1 ti in
     let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
     let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
     X1
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
    (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
       (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
       (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
   (λ x y : C,
    internal_paths_rew_r
      (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
       x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
      (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
      (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
      (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
       p =
       identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
       · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
          p
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
            (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
            (id_left
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
         (tensor_id TC x y))
      (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
   (λ x y : C,
    internal_paths_rew_r
      (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
      (pr1
         (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
            (functor_identity C y))
       · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
       · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
      (pr1
         (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
            (functor_identity C y))
       · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
      (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
       p =
       identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
       · identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
          p
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
            (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
            (id_left
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
         (tensor_id TD x y))
      (id_right
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))))

        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_left_adjoint_axioms (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
  (((λ x y : C,
     let X := pr1 ti in
     let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
     let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
     X1
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
    (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
       (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
       (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
   (λ x y : C,
    internal_paths_rew_r
      (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
       x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
      (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
      (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
      (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
       p =
       identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
       · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
          p
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
            (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
            (id_left
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
         (tensor_id TC x y))
      (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
   (λ x y : C,
    internal_paths_rew_r
      (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
      (pr1
         (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
            (functor_identity C y))
       · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
       · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
      (pr1
         (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
            (functor_identity C y))
       · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
      (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
       p =
       identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
       · identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
          p
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
            (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
            (id_left
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
         (tensor_id TD x y))
      (id_right
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))))
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_vcomp2

     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_vcomp2
           (disp_linvunitor
              ((λ x y : C,
                let X := pr1 ti in

                (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),

                        (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y

                           (id_left

                        (tensor_id TC x y))
                     (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,

     ((λ x y : C,
       let X := pr1 ti in

transportb
  (λ x : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)),
   disp_2cells x

       let X := pr1 ti in

     ((λ x y : C,
       let X := pr1 ti in

         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y)),,
      (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
       (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)))
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_vcomp2
  (disp_vcomp2
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_vcomp2
           (disp_rinvunitor
              (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
                 (((λ x y : C,
                    let X := pr1 ti in
                    let X0 :=
                      λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
                    let X1 :=
                      λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
                    X1
                      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (...)) x)
                      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (...)) y)),,
                   (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                    (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                    (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                    swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
                      (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
                      (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
                      (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
                  (λ x y : C,
                   internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C
                      ⟦ functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TC} y), x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C

                           (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))))

                   x0 ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x0 ⊗^{ TC} identity y
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x0)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} y, x0 ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity x0 ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
               (identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} y, x0 ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                p
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                           (functor_identity C x0)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} y, x0 ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y)
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x0)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti
                           (functor_identity C x0)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} y,
                         x0 ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                   identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x0 y))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x0)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y)))))
               (tensor_id TC x0 y))
            (id_left (identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
         (λ x0 y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} y, x0 ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x0)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y))
             · identity (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x0)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} y, x0 ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x0 ⊗^{ TD} identity y
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} y, x0 ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity x0 ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
               (identity (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} y, x0 ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x0)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y)) =
                p
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} y, x0 ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y)
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C
                        (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} y,
                         x0 ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x0)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x0 y))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
               (tensor_id TD x0 y))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x0)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y))))))))
  (Adjunctions.internal_triangle2
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
  (disp_id2
     (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
        (((λ x y : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
           let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
           X1
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                   x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                p
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧, identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
               (tensor_id TC x y))
            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
                p
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                         ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))))))

          
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_vcomp2
  (disp_vcomp2
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_vcomp2
           (disp_linvunitor
              ((λ x y : C,
                let X := pr1 ti in
                let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0)
                  in
                X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
                  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y)),,
               (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)))
           (disp_rwhisker
              ((λ x y : C,
                let X := pr1 ti in
                let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0)
                  in
                X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
                  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y)),,
               (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))
              (disp_left_adjoint_unit
                 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
                 (((λ x y : C,
                    let X := pr1 ti in
                    let X0 :=
                      λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
                    let X1 :=
                      λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
                    X1
                      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (...)) x)
                      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (...)) y)),,
                   (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                    (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                    (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                    swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
                      (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
                      (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
                      (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
                  (λ x y : C,
                   internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C
                      ⟦ functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TC} y), x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                      · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                     (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                     (λ p : C
                            ⟦ functor_identity C
                                (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                            x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                      p =
                      identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
                      · (pr12 (pr1 ti (...) (...))
                         · (# (...))%cat (pr1 ...)))
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧)
                        (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
                        (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                        (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                               x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                         identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                         p
                         · (pr12 (...) · ...%cat ...))
                        (internal_paths_rew_r
                           (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                            x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                           (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                            · (pr12 (...)
                               · ...%cat ...))
                           (pr12 (pr1 ti (...) (...))
                            · (# (...))%cat (pr1 ...))
                           (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                                  x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                            identity (...) = p)
                           (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                                (pr1 ti x y))
                           (id_left
                              (pr12 (...)
                               · ...%cat ...)))
                        (tensor_id TC x y))
                     (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
                  (λ x y : C,
                   internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                     (pr1
                        (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
                      · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
                     (pr1
                        (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
                     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y,
                            x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                      p =
                      identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
                      · identity
                          (functor_identity C
                             (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                         ⟧)
                        (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
                        (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
                        (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y,
                               x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                         pr1 (pr1 ti ... ...)
                         · (# (...))%cat (pr12 (...)) =
                         p
                         · identity
                             (functor_identity C ...))
                        (internal_paths_rew_r
                           (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y,
                            x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                           (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                            · identity
                                (functor_identity C
                                   ...))
                           (identity
                              (functor_identity C
                                 (...)))
                           (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y,
                                  x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                            pr1 ... · ...%cat ... = p)
                           (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                              (pr1 ti x y))
                           (id_left (identity (...))))
                        (tensor_id TD x y))
                     (id_right
                        (pr1
                           (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                         · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                             (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))))
        (disp_rassociator
           ((λ x y : C,
             let X := pr1 ti in
             let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in

                         ⟧)

                            · (# (...))%cat (pr1 ...)))
                        (pr12 (pr1 ti

                                 (functor_identity C y))
                         · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                             (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                        (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                               x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,

                        (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv

                        (id_left

                         ⟧,

                          (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))
           ((λ x y : C,
             let X := pr1 ti in
             let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in

        ((λ x y : C,

        (disp_left_adjoint_counit
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))

                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                  (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧,
                   identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                   p
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                     (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                      · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                                 (functor_identity C x)
                                 (functor_identity C y))
                         · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                             (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                            x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                      identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                          (pr1 ti x y))
                     (id_left
                        (pr12 (pr1 ti
                                 (functor_identity C x)
                                 (functor_identity C y))
                         · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                             (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
                  (tensor_id TC x y))
               (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
            (λ x y : C,
             internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
                · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                p =
                identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                  (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                         ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
                   p
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                     (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                      · identity
                          (functor_identity C
                             (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y,
                            x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                      pr1
                        (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                        (pr1 ti x y))
                     (id_left
                        (identity
                           (functor_identity C
                              (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
                  (tensor_id TD x y))
               (id_right
                  (pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))))
  (disp_runitor
     ((λ x y : C,
       let X := pr1 ti in
       let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
       X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y)),,
      (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
       (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))) =
transportb
  (λ x : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)),
   disp_2cells x
     ((λ x0 y : C,
       let X := pr1 ti in
       let X0 := λ x1 y0 : C, pr1 (X x1 y0) in
       X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x0)
         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y)),,
      (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
       (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))
     ((λ x0 y : C,
       let X := pr1 ti in
       let X0 := λ x1 y0 : C, pr1 (X x1 y0) in
       X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x0)
         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y)),,
      (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
       (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)))
  (internal_triangle1 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
  (disp_id2
     ((λ x y : C,
       let X := pr1 ti in
       let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
       X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y)),,
      (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
       (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)))
 abstract (repeat (apply funextsec ; intro) ;
             apply univalent_category_has_homsets).
          
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD

                  (λ x y : C,

                     (C
                      ⟦ functor_identity C

                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧)

                                (pr1 ti x y))
                           (id_left
                              (pr12 (...)
                               · ...%cat ...)))
                        (tensor_id TC x y))
                     (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,

                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))) =
transportb
  (λ x : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),
   disp_2cells x
     (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
        (((λ x0 y : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x1 y0 : C, pr2 (X x1 y0) in
           let X1 := λ x1 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x1 y0) in
           X1
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x0)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x0 y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y),
             x0 ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y))
             · identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ functor_identity C (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y),
                   x0 ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x0 ⊗^{ TC} identity y
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x0)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} y, x0 ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity x0 ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
               (identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} y, x0 ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                p
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                           (functor_identity C x0)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} y, x0 ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y)
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x0)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti
                           (functor_identity C x0)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} y,
                         x0 ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                   identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x0 y))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x0)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y)))))
               (tensor_id TC x0 y))
            (id_left (identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
         (λ x0 y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} y, x0 ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x0)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y))
             · identity (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x0)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} y, x0 ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x0 ⊗^{ TD} identity y
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} y, x0 ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity x0 ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
               (identity (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} y, x0 ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x0)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y)) =
                p
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} y, x0 ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y)
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C
                        (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} y,
                         x0 ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x0)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x0 y))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
               (tensor_id TD x0 y))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x0)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y)))))))
     (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
        (((λ x0 y : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x1 y0 : C, pr2 (X x1 y0) in
           let X1 := λ x1 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x1 y0) in
           X1
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x0)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x0 y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y),

               (functor_identity C (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y))

            (identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ functor_identity C (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y),
                   x0 ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x0 ⊗^{ TC} identity y
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x0)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} y, x0 ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)

                           (functor_identity C x0)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} y,
                         x0 ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                   identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x0 y))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x0)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y)))))

            (id_left (identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,

                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y))

            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x0)
                  (functor_identity C y))

  (Adjunctions.internal_triangle2
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
  (disp_id2
     (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
        (((λ x y : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
           let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
           X1
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                   x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                p
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧, identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
               (tensor_id TC x y))
            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
                p
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                         ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))))))
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, x0: C
disp_vcomp2
  (disp_vcomp2
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_vcomp2
           (disp_rinvunitor
              (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
                 (((λ x y : C,
                    let X := pr1 ti in
                    let X0 :=
                      λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
                    let X1 :=
                      λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
                    X1
                      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (...)) x)
                      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (...)) y)),,
                   (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                    (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                    (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                    swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
                      (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
                      (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
                      (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
                  (λ x y : C,
                   internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C
                      ⟦ functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TC} y), x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                      · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                     (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                     (λ p : C
                            ⟦ functor_identity C
                                (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                            x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                      p =
                      identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
                      · (pr12 (pr1 ti (...) (...))
                         · (# (...))%cat (pr1 ...)))
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧)
                        (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
                        (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                        (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                               x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                         identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                         p
                         · (pr12 (...) · ...%cat ...))
                        (internal_paths_rew_r
                           (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                            x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                           (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                            · (pr12 (...)
                               · ...%cat ...))
                           (pr12 (pr1 ti (...) (...))
                            · (# (...))%cat (pr1 ...))
                           (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                                  x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                            identity (...) = p)
                           (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                                (pr1 ti x y))
                           (id_left
                              (pr12 (...)
                               · ...%cat ...)))
                        (tensor_id TC x y))
                     (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
                  (λ x y : C,
                   internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                     (pr1
                        (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
                      · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
                     (pr1
                        (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
                     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y,
                            x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                      p =
                      identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
                      · identity
                          (functor_identity C
                             (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                         ⟧)
                        (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
                        (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
                        (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y,
                               x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                         pr1 (pr1 ti ... ...)
                         · (# (...))%cat (pr12 (...)) =
                         p
                         · identity
                             (functor_identity C ...))
                        (internal_paths_rew_r
                           (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y,
                            x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                           (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                            · identity
                                (functor_identity C
                                   ...))
                           (identity
                              (functor_identity C
                                 (...)))
                           (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y,
                                  x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                            pr1 ... · ...%cat ... = p)
                           (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                              (pr1 ti x y))
                           (id_left (identity (...))))
                        (tensor_id TD x y))
                     (id_right
                        (pr1
                           (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                         · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                             (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))))))
           (disp_lwhisker
              (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
                 (((λ x y : C,
                    let X := pr1 ti in
                    let X0 :=
                      λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
                    let X1 :=
                      λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
                    X1
                      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (...)) x)
                      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (...)) y)),,
                   (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                    (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                    (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                    swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
                      (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
                      (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
                      (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
                  (λ x y : C,
                   internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C
                      ⟦ functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TC} y), x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                      · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                     (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                     (λ p : C
                            ⟦ functor_identity C

                             (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y,
                            x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                      pr1
                        (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                        (pr1 ti x y))
                     (id_left
                        (identity
                           (functor_identity C
                              (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
                  (tensor_id TD x y))
               (id_right
                  (pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))
        (disp_left_adjoint_counit
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
           (((λ x y : C,
              let X := pr1 ti in
              let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
              let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
              X1
                (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                   (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
                (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                   (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
             (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
              (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
              swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
                (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
                (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
                (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
            (λ x y : C,
             internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
               (λ p : C
                      ⟦ functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TC} y), x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                p =
                identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                  (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧,
                   identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                   p
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                     (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                      · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                                 (functor_identity C x)
                                 (functor_identity C y))
                         · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                             (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                            x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                      identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                          (pr1 ti x y))
                     (id_left
                        (pr12 (pr1 ti
                                 (functor_identity C x)
                                 (functor_identity C y))
                         · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                             (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
                  (tensor_id TC x y))
               (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
            (λ x y : C,
             internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
                · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                p =
                identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                  (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                         ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
                   p
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                     (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                      · identity
                          (functor_identity C
                             (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y,
                            x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                      pr1
                        (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                        (pr1 ti x y))
                     (id_left
                        (identity
                           (functor_identity C
                              (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
                  (tensor_id TD x y))
               (id_right
                  (pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat

     (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
        (((λ x y : C,

             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x y : C,

            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),

            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                   x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)

                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =

                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat

                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
