                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧, identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
               (tensor_id TC x y))
            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
                p
                · identity

               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                         ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))) x x0 =

                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                   x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                p
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧, identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
               (tensor_id TC x y))
            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
                p
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                         ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))) x x0

             apply univalent_category_has_homsets.
        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
  (((λ x y : C,
     let X := pr1 ti in
     let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
     let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
     X1
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
    (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
       (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
       (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
   (λ x y : C,
    internal_paths_rew_r
      (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
       x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
      (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
       · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
      (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
      (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
       p =
       identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
       · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
          p
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
            (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
            (id_left
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
         (tensor_id TC x y))
      (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
   (λ x y : C,
    internal_paths_rew_r
      (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
      (pr1
         (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
            (functor_identity C y))
       · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
       · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
      (pr1
         (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
            (functor_identity C y))
       · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
      (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
       p =
       identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
       · identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
          p
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
            (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
            (id_left
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
         (tensor_id TD x y))
      (id_right
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))))
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
  (disp_left_adjoint_unit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
        let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
        X1
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
        swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
          (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
          (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
          x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
             p
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
            (tensor_id TC x y))
         (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
             p
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
               (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
            (tensor_id TD x y))
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
  (disp_left_adjoint_counit
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
        let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
        X1
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
        swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
          (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
          (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
          x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
             p
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
            (tensor_id TC x y))
         (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
             p
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
               (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
            (tensor_id TD x y))
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))

          
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
  (disp_left_adjoint_unit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
        let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
        X1
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
        swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
          (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
          (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
          x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
             p
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
            (tensor_id TC x y))
         (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
             p
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
               (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
            (tensor_id TD x y))
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_2cells
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) ^-1%bicategory
  (((λ x y : C,
     let X := pr1 ti in
     let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
     X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
       (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y)),,
    (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) ;; 
   disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
        let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
        X1
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
        swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
          (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
          (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
          x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
             p
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
            (tensor_id TC x y))
         (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
             p
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
               (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
            (tensor_id TD x y))
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))))) (id_disp TC)
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
(λ y : disp_2cells
         (left_equivalence_unit_iso
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) ^-1%bicategory
         (((λ x y : C,
            let X := pr1 ti in
            let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
            X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y)),,
           (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) ;; 
          disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
            (((λ x y : C,
               let X := pr1 ti in
               let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
               let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0)
                 in
               X1
                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
              (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
                 (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
                 (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
                 (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
             (λ x y : C,
              internal_paths_rew_r
                (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                 x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                (identity
                   (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                 · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                (λ p : C
                       ⟦ functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TC} y), x ⊗_{ TC} y
                       ⟧,
                 p =
                 identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
                 · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                            (functor_identity C x)
                            (functor_identity C y))
                    · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                        (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                   (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
                   (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                   (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                          ⟧,
                    identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                    p
                    · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                               (functor_identity C x)
                               (functor_identity C y))
                       · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                           (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                      (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                       · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                                  (functor_identity C
                                     x)
                                  (functor_identity C
                                     y))
                          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                              (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                      (pr12 (pr1 ti
                               (functor_identity C x)
                               (functor_identity C y))
                       · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                           (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                      (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                             x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                       identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                      (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                           (pr1 ti x y))
                      (id_left
                         (pr12 (pr1 ti
                                  (functor_identity C
                                     x)
                                  (functor_identity C
                                     y))
                          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                              (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
                   (tensor_id TC x y))
                (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
             (λ x y : C,
              internal_paths_rew_r
                (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                (pr1
                   (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                      (functor_identity C y))
                 · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
                 · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
                (pr1
                   (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                      (functor_identity C y))
                 · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
                (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                 p =
                 identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
                 · identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                   (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
                   (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
                   (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                          ⟧,
                    pr1
                      (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                         (functor_identity C y))
                    · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                        (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
                    p
                    · identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                      (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                       · identity
                           (functor_identity C
                              (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                      (identity
                         (functor_identity C
                            (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                      (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y,
                             x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                       pr1
                         (pr1 ti
                            (functor_identity C x)
                            (functor_identity C y))
                       · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                           (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                      (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                         (pr1 ti x y))
                      (id_left
                         (identity
                            (functor_identity C
                               (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
                   (tensor_id TD x y))
                (id_right
                   (pr1
                      (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                         (functor_identity C y))
                    · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                        (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))
         (id_disp TC),
 disp_vcomp2
   (disp_left_adjoint_unit
      (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
      (((λ x y0 : C,
         let X := pr1 ti in
         let X0 := λ x0 y1 : C, pr2 (X x0 y1) in
         let X1 := λ x0 y1 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y1) in
         X1
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y0)),,
        (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
         (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
         swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
           (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
           (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g) (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
       (λ x y0 : C,
        internal_paths_rew_r
          (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0),
           x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
          (identity
             (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
           · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
          (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
          (λ p : C
                 ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0),
                 x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
           p =
           identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y0
           · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                      (functor_identity C y0))
              · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                  (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0))))
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
             (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y0)
             (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
             (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
              identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) =
              p
              · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                         (functor_identity C y0))
                 · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                     (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0))))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
                (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0)
                 · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                            (functor_identity C x)
                            (functor_identity C y0))
                    · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                        (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0))))
                (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                         (functor_identity C y0))
                 · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                     (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0)))
                (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0
                       ⟧, identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) = p)
                (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y0))
                (id_left
                   (pr12 (pr1 ti
                            (functor_identity C x)
                            (functor_identity C y0))
                    · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                        (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0)))))
             (tensor_id TC x y0))
          (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0)))),,
       (λ x y0 : C,
        internal_paths_rew_r
          (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
          (pr1
             (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                (functor_identity C y0))
           · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
               (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0))
           · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0))
          (pr1
             (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                (functor_identity C y0))
           · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
               (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)))
          (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
           p =
           identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y0
           · identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
             (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y0)
             (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0))
             (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
              pr1
                (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                   (functor_identity C y0))
              · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)) =
              p
              · identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
                (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)
                 · identity
                     (functor_identity C
                        (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
                (identity
                   (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
                (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0
                       ⟧,
                 pr1
                   (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                      (functor_identity C y0))
                 · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)) = p)
                (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y0))
                (id_left
                   (identity
                      (functor_identity C
                         (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))))
             (tensor_id TD x y0))
          (id_right
             (pr1
                (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                   (functor_identity C y0))
              · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0))))))) y =
 transportb
   (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats
            (identity C) (identity C),
    disp_2cells α (id_disp TC) (id_disp TC))
   (vcomp_rinv
      (left_equivalence_unit_iso
         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))
   (disp_id2 (id_disp TC))
 × disp_vcomp2 y
     (disp_left_adjoint_unit
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
        (((λ x y0 : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x0 y1 : C, pr2 (X x0 y1) in
           let X1 := λ x0 y1 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y1) in
           X1
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y0)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x y0 : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0),
                   x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y0
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y0))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y0)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) =
                p
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y0))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0)
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y0))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y0))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0,
                         x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
                   identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x y0))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y0))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0)))))
               (tensor_id TC x y0))
            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0)))),,
         (λ x y0 : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y0))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y0))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y0
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y0)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y0))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)) =
                p
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C
                        (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0,
                         x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y0))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y0))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y0))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y0))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0))))))) =
   transportb
     (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)
               · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                   (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)
               · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                   (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),
      disp_2cells α
        (((λ x y0 : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x0 y1 : C, pr1 (X x0 y1) in
           X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y0)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) ;; 
         disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
           (((λ x y0 : C,
              let X := pr1 ti in
              let X0 := λ x0 y1 : C, pr2 (X x0 y1) in
              let X1 := λ x0 y1 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y1) in
              X1
                (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                   (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
                (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                   (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y0)),,
             (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
              (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
              swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
                (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
                (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
                (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
            (λ x y0 : C,
             internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
                · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
               (λ p : C
                      ⟦ functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TC} y0), x ⊗_{ TC} y0
                      ⟧,
                p =
                identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y0
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y0))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (...))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
                  (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y0)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0,
                         x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
                   identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) =
                   p
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti ... ...)
                      · (# ...)%cat (...)))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
                     (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0)
                      · (pr12 (pr1 ti ... ...)
                         · (# ...)%cat (...)))
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y0))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (...)))
                     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0,
                            x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
                      identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) = p)
                     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                          (pr1 ti x y0))
                     (id_left
                        (pr12 (pr1 ti ... ...)
                         · (# ...)%cat (...))))
                  (tensor_id TC x y0))
               (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0)))),,
            (λ x y0 : C,
             internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y0))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0))
                · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0))
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y0))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
                p =
                identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y0
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
                  (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y0)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0,
                         x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
                   pr1 (pr1 ti (...) (...))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)) =
                   p
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C (...)))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
                     (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)
                      · identity
                          (functor_identity C (...)))
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
                     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0,
                            x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
                      pr1 (...)
                      · (# ...)%cat (pr12 ...) = p)
                     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                        (pr1 ti x y0))
                     (id_left
                        (identity
                           (functor_identity C ...))))
                  (tensor_id TD x y0))
               (id_right
                  (pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y0))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)))))))
        (((λ x y0 : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x0 y1 : C, pr1 (X x0 y1) in
           X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y0)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) ;; 
         disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
           (((λ x y0 : C,
              let X := pr1 ti in
              let X0 := λ x0 y1 : C, pr2 (X x0 y1) in
              let X1 := λ x0 y1 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y1) in
              X1
                (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                   (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
                (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                   (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y0)),,
             (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
              (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
              swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
                (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
                (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
                (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
            (λ x y0 : C,
             internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
                · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
               (λ p : C
                      ⟦ functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TC} y0), x ⊗_{ TC} y0
                      ⟧,
                p =
                identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y0
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y0))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (...))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
                  (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y0)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0,
                         x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
                   identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) =
                   p
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti ... ...)
                      · (# ...)%cat (...)))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
                     (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0)
                      · (pr12 (pr1 ti ... ...)
                         · (# ...)%cat (...)))
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y0))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (...)))
                     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0,
                            x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
                      identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) = p)
                     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                          (pr1 ti x y0))
                     (id_left
                        (pr12 (pr1 ti ... ...)
                         · (# ...)%cat (...))))
                  (tensor_id TC x y0))
               (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0)))),,
            (λ x y0 : C,
             internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y0))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0))
                · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0))
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y0))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
                p =
                identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y0
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
                  (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y0)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0,
                         x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
                   pr1 (pr1 ti (...) (...))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)) =
                   p
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C (...)))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
                     (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)
                      · identity
                          (functor_identity C (...)))
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
                     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0,
                            x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
                      pr1 (...)
                      · (# ...)%cat (pr12 ...) = p)
                     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                        (pr1 ti x y0))
                     (id_left
                        (identity
                           (functor_identity C ...))))
                  (tensor_id TD x y0))
               (id_right
                  (pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y0))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0))))))))
     (vcomp_linv
        (left_equivalence_unit_iso
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))
     (disp_id2
        (((λ x y0 : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x0 y1 : C, pr1 (X x0 y1) in
           X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y0)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) ;; 
         disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
           (((λ x y0 : C,
              let X := pr1 ti in
              let X0 := λ x0 y1 : C, pr2 (X x0 y1) in
              let X1 := λ x0 y1 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y1) in
              X1
                (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                   (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
                (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                   (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y0)),,
             (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
              (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
              swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
                (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
                (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
                (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
            (λ x y0 : C,
             internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
                · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
               (λ p : C
                      ⟦ functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TC} y0), x ⊗_{ TC} y0
                      ⟧,
                p =
                identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y0
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y0))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
                  (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y0)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0,
                         x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
                   identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) =
                   p
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti (...) (...))
                      · (# (...))%cat (pr1 ...)))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
                     (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0)
                      · (pr12 (pr1 ti (...) (...))
                         · (# (...))%cat (pr1 ...)))
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y0))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0)))
                     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0,
                            x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
                      identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) = p)
                     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                          (pr1 ti x y0))
                     (id_left
                        (pr12 (pr1 ti (...) (...))
                         · (# (...))%cat (pr1 ...))))
                  (tensor_id TC x y0))
               (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0)))),,
            (λ x y0 : C,
             internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y0))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0))
                · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0))
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y0))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
                p =
                identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y0
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
                  (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y0)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0,
                         x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y0))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)) =
                   p
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
                     (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)
                      · identity

                             (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
                     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0,
                            x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
                      pr1 (pr1 ti ... ...)
                      · (# (...))%cat (pr12 (...)) = p)
                     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                        (pr1 ti x y0))
                     (id_left
                        (identity
                           (functor_identity C (...)))))
                  (tensor_id TD x y0))
               (id_right
                  (pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y0))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)))))))))
  ?pr1

             
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_2cells
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) ^-1%bicategory
  (((λ x y : C,
     let X := pr1 ti in
     let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
     X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
       (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y)),,
    (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) ;; 
   disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
        let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
        X1
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
        swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
          (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
          (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
          x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
             p
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
            (tensor_id TC x y))
         (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
             p
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
               (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
            (tensor_id TD x y))
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))))) (id_disp TC)
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
pr1
  (((λ x y : C,
     let X := pr1 ti in
     let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
     X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
       (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y)),,
    (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) ;; 
   disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
        let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
        X1
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
        swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
          (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
          (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
          x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
             p
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
            (tensor_id TC x y))
         (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
             p
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
               (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
            (tensor_id TD x y))
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))))) x y
· (left_equivalence_unit_iso
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) ^-1%bicategory
    (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
(left_equivalence_unit_iso
   (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) ^-1%bicategory x
⊗^{ TC} (left_equivalence_unit_iso
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) ^-1%bicategory
          y · pr1 (id_disp TC) x y

                
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
compositions_preserves_tensor_data
  (λ x y : C, pr1 (pr1 ti x y))
  (λ x y : C, pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) x y
· identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
· identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TC x y

                
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
        (functor_identity C y))
· (# (functor_identity C))%cat (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))
· identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
· identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TC x y

                
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
        (functor_identity C y))
· (# (functor_identity C))%cat (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))
· identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
· identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))

TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y)
· identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)

TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
(λ y : disp_2cells
         (left_equivalence_unit_iso
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) ^-1%bicategory
         (((λ x y : C,
            let X := pr1 ti in

            X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y)),,

            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) ;; 
          disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
            (((λ x y : C,
               let X := pr1 ti in
               let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
               let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0)
                 in

                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
              (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),

                 (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
                 (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
                 (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
             (λ x y : C,

                (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                 x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                (identity

                 · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                (λ p : C

                            (functor_identity C y))

                                  (functor_identity C

                          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat

                (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
             (λ x y : C,

          (id_right

 × disp_vcomp2 y
     (disp_left_adjoint_unit
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
        (((λ x y0 : C,
