           X1
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y0)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x y0 : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0),
                   x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y0
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y0))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y0)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) =
                p
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y0))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0)
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y0))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y0))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0,
                         x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
                   identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x y0))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y0))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0)))))
               (tensor_id TC x y0))
            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0)))),,
         (λ x y0 : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y0))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y0))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y0
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y0)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y0))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)) =
                p
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C
                        (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0,
                         x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y0))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y0))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y0))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y0))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0))))))) =

     (disp_id2
        (((λ x y0 : C,

  ((λ x y : C,
    (((internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y)
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y) = p)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y) =
                p)
               (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
               (tensor_id TC x y))
            (id_right (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)))
         (id_right
            (pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
       :
       pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
       · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)) · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
       identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
       · identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))
      :
      pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
              (functor_identity C y))
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)) · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
      identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
      · identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TC x y)
     :
     compositions_preserves_tensor_data
       (λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (pr1 ti x0 y0))
       (λ x0 y0 : C, pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y0)) x y
     · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
     identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
     · identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TC x y)
    :
    pr1
      (((λ x0 y0 : C,
         let X := pr1 ti in
         let X0 := λ x1 y1 : C, pr1 (X x1 y1) in
         X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x0)
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y0)),,
        (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
         (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) ;; 
       disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
         (((λ x0 y0 : C,
            let X := pr1 ti in
            let X0 := λ x1 y1 : C, pr2 (X x1 y1) in
            let X1 := λ x1 y1 : C, pr1 (X0 x1 y1) in
            X1
              (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x0)
              (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y0)),,
           (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
            swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
              (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
              (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
              (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
          (λ x0 y0 : C,
           internal_paths_rew_r
             (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0),
              x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
             (identity
                (functor_identity C (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0))
              · identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0))
             (identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0))
             (λ p : C
                    ⟦ functor_identity C
                        (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0), x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0
                    ⟧,
              p =
              identity x0 ⊗^{ TC} identity y0
              · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x0)
                         (functor_identity C y0))
                 · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                     (pr1 (...))))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0, x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
                (identity x0 ⊗^{ TC} identity y0)
                (identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0))
                (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0,
                       x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
                 identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0) =
                 p
                 · (pr12 (pr1 ti ... ...)
                    · (# ...)%cat (...)))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0, x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
                   (identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0)
                    · (pr12 (pr1 ti ... ...)
                       · (# ...)%cat (...)))
                   (pr12 (pr1 ti
                            (functor_identity C x0)
                            (functor_identity C y0))
                    · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                        (pr1 (...)))
                   (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0,
                          x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
                    identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0) = p)
                   (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                        (pr1 ti x0 y0))
                   (id_left
                      (pr12 (pr1 ti ... ...)
                       · (# ...)%cat (...))))
                (tensor_id TC x0 y0))
             (id_left (identity (x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0)))),,
          (λ x0 y0 : C,
           internal_paths_rew_r
             (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0, x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
             (pr1
                (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x0)
                   (functor_identity C y0))
              · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y0))
              · identity (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0))
             (pr1
                (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x0)
                   (functor_identity C y0))
              · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y0)))
             (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0, x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
              p =
              identity x0 ⊗^{ TD} identity y0
              · identity
                  (functor_identity C (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0, x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
                (identity x0 ⊗^{ TD} identity y0)
                (identity (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0))
                (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0,
                       x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
                 pr1 (pr1 ti (...) (...))
                 · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y0)) =
                 p
                 · identity (functor_identity C (...)))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0, x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
                   (identity (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0)
                    · identity
                        (functor_identity C (...)))
                   (identity
                      (functor_identity C
                         (x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
                   (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0,
                          x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
                    pr1 (...) · (# ...)%cat (pr12 ...) =
                    p)
                   (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                      (pr1 ti x0 y0))
                   (id_left
                      (identity
                         (functor_identity C ...))))
                (tensor_id TD x0 y0))
             (id_right
                (pr1
                   (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x0)
                      (functor_identity C y0))
                 · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti x0 y0))))))) x y
    · (left_equivalence_unit_iso
         (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) ^-1%bicategory
        (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
    (left_equivalence_unit_iso
       (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) ^-1%bicategory x
    ⊗^{ TC} (left_equivalence_unit_iso
               (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) ^-1%bicategory
              y · pr1 (id_disp TC) x y)
   :
   disp_2cells
     (left_equivalence_unit_iso
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) ^-1%bicategory
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
        X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) ;; 
      disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
        (((λ x y : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
           let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
           X1
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                   x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                p
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧, identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
               (tensor_id TC x y))
            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
                p
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                         ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))
     (id_disp TC))
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_vcomp2
  (disp_left_adjoint_unit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
        let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
        X1
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
        swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
          (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
          (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
          x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
             p
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
            (tensor_id TC x y))
         (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
             p
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
               (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
            (tensor_id TD x y))
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))
  (λ x y : C,
   internal_paths_rew_r
     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
     (pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y)
      · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y))
     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
      p =
      identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
      · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (internal_paths_rew_r
        (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
        (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
         · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
        (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
        (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
         pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y) = p)
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
           (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
           (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
           (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
            pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y) = p)
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
           (tensor_id TC x y))
        (id_right (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)))
     (id_right (pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats
           (identity C) (identity C),
   disp_2cells α (id_disp TC) (id_disp TC))
  (vcomp_rinv
     (left_equivalence_unit_iso
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))
  (disp_id2 (id_disp TC))
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_vcomp2
  (λ x y : C,
   internal_paths_rew_r
     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
     (pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y)
      · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y))
     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
      p =
      identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
      · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (internal_paths_rew_r
        (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
        (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
         · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
        (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
        (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
         pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y) = p)
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
           (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
           (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
           (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
            pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y) = p)
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
           (tensor_id TC x y))
        (id_right (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)))
     (id_right (pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
  (disp_left_adjoint_unit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
        let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
        X1
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
        swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
          (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
          (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
          x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
             p
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
            (tensor_id TC x y))
         (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
             p
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
               (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
            (tensor_id TD x y))
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))))) =
transportb
  (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)
            · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)
            · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),
   disp_2cells α
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
        X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) ;; 
      disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
        (((λ x y : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
           let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
           X1
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                   x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                p
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧, identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
               (tensor_id TC x y))
            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
                p
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                         ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
        X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) ;; 
      disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
        (((λ x y : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
           let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
           X1
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                   x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                p
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧, identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
               (tensor_id TC x y))
            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))

                         ⟧,

                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat

                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))))))
  (vcomp_linv
     (left_equivalence_unit_iso
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))
  (disp_id2
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
        X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) ;; 
      disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
        (((λ x y : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
           let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
           X1
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                   x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                p
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧, identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
               (tensor_id TC x y))
            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
                p
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                         ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))))))

                
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_vcomp2
  (disp_left_adjoint_unit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
        let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
        X1
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
        swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
          (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
          (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
          x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
             p
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
            (tensor_id TC x y))
         (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
             p
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
               (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
            (tensor_id TD x y))
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))
  (λ x y : C,
   internal_paths_rew_r
     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
     (pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y)
      · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y))
     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
      p =
      identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
      · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (internal_paths_rew_r
        (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
        (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
         · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
        (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
        (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
         pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y) = p)
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
           (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
           (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
           (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
            pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y) = p)
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
           (tensor_id TC x y))
        (id_right (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)))
     (id_right (pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats
           (identity C) (identity C),
   disp_2cells α (id_disp TC) (id_disp TC))
  (vcomp_rinv
     (left_equivalence_unit_iso
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))
  (disp_id2 (id_disp TC))
 abstract (repeat (apply funextsec ; intro) ;
                   apply univalent_category_has_homsets).
                
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_vcomp2
  (λ x y : C,
   internal_paths_rew_r
     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
     (pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y)
      · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y))
     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
      p =
      identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
      · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
     (internal_paths_rew_r
        (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
        (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
         · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
        (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
        (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
         pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y) = p)
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
           (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
           (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
           (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
            pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y) = p)
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
           (tensor_id TC x y))
        (id_right (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)))
     (id_right (pr12 (pr1 ti x y) · pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
  (disp_left_adjoint_unit (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
        let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
        X1
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
        swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
          (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
          (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
          x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
             p
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
            (tensor_id TC x y))
         (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
             p
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
               (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
            (tensor_id TD x y))
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))))) =
transportb
  (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)
            · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)
            · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))),
   disp_2cells α
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
        X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) ;; 
      disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
        (((λ x y : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
           let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
           X1
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                   x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                p
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧, identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
               (tensor_id TC x y))
            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
                p
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                         ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
        X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)

       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)

                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)

           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x y : C,

            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),

            (identity

             · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C

                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat

                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat

                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧, identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left

                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat

               (tensor_id TC x y))
            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,

            (pr1

               (internal_paths_rew_r

                  (identity

                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
