                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))))))
  (vcomp_linv
     (left_equivalence_unit_iso
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))
  (disp_id2
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X x0 y0) in
        X0 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x)
          (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) ;; 
      disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
        (((λ x y : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
           let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
           X1
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                   x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                p
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧, identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
               (tensor_id TC x y))
            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
                p
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                         ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))))))
 abstract (repeat (apply funextsec ; intro) ;
                   apply univalent_category_has_homsets).
          
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
  (disp_left_adjoint_counit
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
        let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
        X1
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
        swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
          (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
          (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
          x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
             p
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
            (tensor_id TC x y))
         (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
             p
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
               (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
            (tensor_id TD x y))
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_2cells
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) ^-1%bicategory
  (id_disp TD)
  (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
        let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
        X1
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
        swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
          (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
          (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
          x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
             p
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
            (tensor_id TC x y))
         (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
             p
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
               (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
            (tensor_id TD x y))
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))) ;; ((λ x
                                                 y : C,
                                              let X :=
                                                pr1 ti
                                                in
                                              let
                                                X0 :=
                                                λ 
                                                x0
                                                 y0 : C,
                                                pr1
                                                 (X x0
                                                 y0)
                                                in
                                              X0
                                                (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C) x)
                                                (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C) y)),,
                                             (λ (x1 x2
                                                 y1
                                                 y2 : C)
                                              (f : 
                                               C ⟦ x1,
                                               x2 ⟧)
                                              (g : 
                                               C ⟦ y1,
                                               y2 ⟧),
                                              pr2 ti
                                                x1 x2
                                                y1 y2
                                                f g)))
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
(λ y : disp_2cells
         (left_equivalence_counit_iso
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) ^-1%bicategory
         (id_disp TD)
         (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
            (((λ x y : C,
               let X := pr1 ti in
               let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
               let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0)
                 in
               X1
                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
              (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
                 (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
                 (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
                 (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
             (λ x y : C,
              internal_paths_rew_r
                (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                 x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                (identity
                   (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                 · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                (λ p : C
                       ⟦ functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TC} y), x ⊗_{ TC} y
                       ⟧,
                 p =
                 identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
                 · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                            (functor_identity C x)
                            (functor_identity C y))
                    · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                        (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                   (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
                   (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                   (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                          ⟧,
                    identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                    p
                    · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                               (functor_identity C x)
                               (functor_identity C y))
                       · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                           (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                      (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                       · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                                  (functor_identity C
                                     x)
                                  (functor_identity C
                                     y))
                          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                              (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                      (pr12 (pr1 ti
                               (functor_identity C x)
                               (functor_identity C y))
                       · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                           (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                      (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                             x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                       identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                      (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                           (pr1 ti x y))
                      (id_left
                         (pr12 (pr1 ti
                                  (functor_identity C
                                     x)
                                  (functor_identity C
                                     y))
                          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                              (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
                   (tensor_id TC x y))
                (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
             (λ x y : C,
              internal_paths_rew_r
                (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                (pr1
                   (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                      (functor_identity C y))
                 · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
                 · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
                (pr1
                   (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                      (functor_identity C y))
                 · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
                (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                 p =
                 identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
                 · identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                   (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
                   (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
                   (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                          ⟧,
                    pr1
                      (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                         (functor_identity C y))
                    · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                        (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
                    p
                    · identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                      (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                       · identity
                           (functor_identity C
                              (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                      (identity
                         (functor_identity C
                            (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                      (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y,
                             x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                       pr1
                         (pr1 ti
                            (functor_identity C x)
                            (functor_identity C y))
                       · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                           (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                      (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                         (pr1 ti x y))
                      (id_left
                         (identity
                            (functor_identity C
                               (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
                   (tensor_id TD x y))

                                                 ti in
                                                 let
                                                 X0 :=
                                                 λ 
                                                 x0
                                                 y1 : C,
                                                 pr1
                                                 (X x0
                                                 y1)
                                                 in
                                                 X0
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C) x)
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C) y0)),,
                                                 (λ 
                                                 (x1
                                                 x2 y1
                                                 y2 : C)
                                                 (f : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x1,
                                                 x2 ⟧)
                                                 (g : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y1,
                                                 y2 ⟧),
                                                 pr2
                                                 ti x1
                                                 x2 y1
                                                 y2 f
                                                 g))))
 × disp_vcomp2 y
     (disp_left_adjoint_counit
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
        (((λ x y0 : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x0 y1 : C, pr2 (X x0 y1) in
           let X1 := λ x0 y1 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y1) in
           X1
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y0)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x y0 : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0),
                   x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y0
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y0))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y0)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) =
                p
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y0))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0)
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y0))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y0))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0,
                         x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
                   identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x y0))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y0))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0)))))
               (tensor_id TC x y0))
            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0)))),,
         (λ x y0 : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y0))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y0))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y0
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y0)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y0))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)) =
                p
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C
                        (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0,
                         x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y0))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y0))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y0)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y0))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y0))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0))))))) =
   transportb
     (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats
              (identity C) (identity C),
      disp_2cells α (id_disp TD) (id_disp TD))
     (vcomp_linv
        (left_equivalence_counit_iso
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))
     (disp_id2 (id_disp TD))) ?pr1

             
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_2cells
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) ^-1%bicategory
  (id_disp TD)
  (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
        let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
        X1
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
        swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
          (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
          (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
          x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
             p
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
            (tensor_id TC x y))
         (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
             p
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
               (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
            (tensor_id TD x y))
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))) ;; ((λ x
                                                 y : C,
                                              let X :=
                                                pr1 ti
                                                in
                                              let
                                                X0 :=
                                                λ 
                                                x0
                                                 y0 : C,
                                                pr1
                                                 (X x0
                                                 y0)
                                                in
                                              X0
                                                (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C) x)
                                                (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C) y)),,
                                             (λ (x1 x2
                                                 y1
                                                 y2 : C)
                                              (f : 
                                               C ⟦ x1,
                                               x2 ⟧)
                                              (g : 
                                               C ⟦ y1,
                                               y2 ⟧),
                                              pr2 ti
                                                x1 x2
                                                y1 y2
                                                f g)))
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
pr1 (id_disp TD) x y
· (left_equivalence_counit_iso
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) ^-1%bicategory
    (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
(left_equivalence_counit_iso
   (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) ^-1%bicategory x
⊗^{ TD} (left_equivalence_counit_iso
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) ^-1%bicategory
          y
· pr1
    (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
       (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
       (((λ x y : C,
          let X := pr1 ti in
          let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
          let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
          X1
            (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
               (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
            (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
               (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
            (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
            (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g) (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
        (λ x y : C,
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
            x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
           (identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
           (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
           (λ p : C
                  ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                  x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
            p =
            identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
            · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                       (functor_identity C y))
               · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                   (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
              (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
              (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
              (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
               identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
               p
               · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                          (functor_identity C y))
                  · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                      (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                 (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                  · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                             (functor_identity C x)
                             (functor_identity C y))
                     · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                         (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                          (functor_identity C y))
                  · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                      (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                 (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                  identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                 (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
                 (id_left
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti
                             (functor_identity C x)
                             (functor_identity C y))
                     · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                         (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
              (tensor_id TC x y))
           (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
        (λ x y : C,
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
           (pr1
              (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                 (functor_identity C y))
            · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
            · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
           (pr1
              (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                 (functor_identity C y))
            · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
           (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
            p =
            identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
            · identity
                (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
              (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
              (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
              (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
               pr1
                 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                    (functor_identity C y))
               · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                   (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
               p
               · identity
                   (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                 (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                  · identity
                      (functor_identity C
                         (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                 (identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                 (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                  pr1
                    (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                       (functor_identity C y))
                  · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                      (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                 (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
                 (id_left
                    (identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
              (tensor_id TD x y))
           (id_right
              (pr1
                 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                    (functor_identity C y))
               · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                   (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))) ;; ((λ 
                                                x
                                                 y : C,
                                                let
                                                 X :=
                                                 pr1
                                                 ti in
                                                let
                                                 X0 :=
                                                 λ 
                                                 x0
                                                 y0 : C,
                                                 pr1
                                                 (X x0
                                                 y0)
                                                 in
                                                X0
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C) x)
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C) y)),,
                                               (λ 
                                                (x1 x2
                                                 y1
                                                 y2 : C)
                                                (f : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x1,
                                                 x2 ⟧)
                                                (g : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y1,
                                                 y2 ⟧),
                                                pr2 ti
                                                 x1 x2
                                                 y1 y2
                                                 f g)))
    x y

                
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TD x y
· identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
· compositions_preserves_tensor_data
    (λ x y : C, pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
    (λ x y : C, pr1 (pr1 ti x y)) x y

                
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
identityfunctor_preserves_tensor_data TD x y
· identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
· (pr1
     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
        (functor_identity C y))
   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))

                
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
· identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
· (pr1
     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
        (functor_identity C y))
   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))

                
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
· (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y))

                
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
· (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y))

                
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
· (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y))

                
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
x, y: C
identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y)

                apply (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso ((pr1 ti x y))).
             
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
(λ y : disp_2cells
         (left_equivalence_counit_iso
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))) ^-1%bicategory
         (id_disp TD)
         (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
            (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
            (((λ x y : C,
               let X := pr1 ti in
               let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
               let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0)
                 in
               X1
                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
              (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
                 (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
                 (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
                 (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
             (λ x y : C,
              internal_paths_rew_r
                (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                 x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                (identity
                   (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                 · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
                (λ p : C
                       ⟦ functor_identity C

             (λ p : C
                    ⟦ functor_identity C
                        (x ⊗_{ TC} y0), x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,
              p =
              identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y0
              · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                         (functor_identity C y0))
                 · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                     (pr1 (pr1 ti x y0))))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
                (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y0)
                (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))
                (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0
                       ⟧,
                 identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0) =
                 p
                 · (pr12 (pr1 ti (...) (...))
                    · (# (...))%cat (pr1 ...)))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)

                    · (pr12 (pr1 ti (...) (...))
                       · (# (...))%cat (pr1 ...)))

                            (functor_identity C y0))
                    · (# (functor_identity C))%cat

                   (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y0,
                          x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧,

                   (id_left

                   (functor_identity C y0))
              · (# (functor_identity C))%cat

              · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0))
             (pr1

                   (functor_identity C y0))
              · (# (functor_identity C))%cat

                   (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0,
                          x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,

                    · (# (...))%cat (pr12 (...)) = p)

                      (pr1 ti x y0))
                   (id_left
                      (identity
                         (functor_identity C (...)))))
                (tensor_id TD x y0))

                (pr1
                   (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                      (functor_identity C y0))
                 · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0)))))) ;; ((λ 
                                                 x

                                                 let

                                                 pr1
                                                 ti in
                                                 let

                                                 pr1
                                                 (X x0
                                                 y1)
                                                 in
                                                 X0

                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C) x)
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C) y0)),,
                                                 (λ 
                                                 (x1
                                                 x2 y1
                                                 y2 : C)
                                                 (f : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x1,
                                                 x2 ⟧)
                                                 (g : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y1,
                                                 y2 ⟧),
                                                 pr2
                                                 ti x1
                                                 x2 y1
                                                 y2 f
                                                 g))))
 × disp_vcomp2 y
     (disp_left_adjoint_counit
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
        (((λ x y0 : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x0 y1 : C, pr2 (X x0 y1) in
           let X1 := λ x0 y1 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y1) in
           X1
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y0)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x y0 : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y0 ⟧)
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y0))

                              (functor_identity C y0))

                  (id_left

                              (functor_identity C y0))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat

            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y0)))),,

             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y0))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y0))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat

            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y0, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 ⟧,

            (internal_paths_rew_r

                        (functor_identity C y0))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat

            (id_right

                     (functor_identity C y0))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y0))))))) =

     (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats
              (identity C) (identity C),
      disp_2cells α (id_disp TD) (id_disp TD))
     (vcomp_linv

     (disp_id2 (id_disp TD)))

    (((internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)

        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))

               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
                p
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                         ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))) ;; ((λ 
                                                 x
                                                 y : C,
                                                 let
                                                 X :=
                                                 pr1
                                                 ti in
                                                 let
                                                 X0 :=
                                                 λ 
                                                 x0
                                                 y0 : C,
                                                 pr1
                                                 (X x0
                                                 y0)
                                                 in
                                                 X0
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C) x)
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C) y)),,
                                                (λ 
                                                 (x1
                                                 x2 y1
                                                 y2 : C)
                                                 (f : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x1,
                                                 x2 ⟧)
                                                 (g : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y1,
                                                 y2 ⟧),
                                                 pr2
                                                 ti x1
                                                 x2 y1
                                                 y2 f
                                                 g))))
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_vcomp2
  (disp_left_adjoint_counit
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
        let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
        X1
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
        swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
          (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
          (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
          x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
             p
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
            (tensor_id TC x y))
         (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
             p
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
               (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
            (tensor_id TD x y))
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))
  (λ x y : C,
   internal_paths_rew_r
     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
     (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
     (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
      p =
      identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
      · (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
     (internal_paths_rew_r
        (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
        (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
        (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
        (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
         identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
         p · (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
           (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
            · (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
           (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
            identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) = p)
           (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
           (id_left
              (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))
        (tensor_id TD x y))
     (id_right (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))) =
