                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                p
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧, identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
               (tensor_id TC x y))
            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
                p
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                         ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))) ;; ((λ 
                                                 x
                                                 y : C,
                                                 let
                                                 X :=
                                                 pr1
                                                 ti in
                                                 let
                                                 X0 :=
                                                 λ 
                                                 x0
                                                 y0 : C,
                                                 pr1
                                                 (X x0
                                                 y0)
                                                 in
                                                 X0
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C) x)
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C) y)),,
                                                (λ 
                                                 (x1
                                                 x2 y1
                                                 y2 : C)
                                                 (f : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x1,
                                                 x2 ⟧)
                                                 (g : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y1,
                                                 y2 ⟧),
                                                 pr2
                                                 ti x1
                                                 x2 y1
                                                 y2 f
                                                 g))))
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_vcomp2
  (λ x y : C,
   internal_paths_rew_r
     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
     (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
     (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
      p =
      identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
      · (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
     (internal_paths_rew_r
        (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
        (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
        (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
        (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
         identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
         p · (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
           (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
            · (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
           (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
            identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) = p)
           (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
           (id_left
              (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))
        (tensor_id TD x y))
     (id_right (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))))
  (disp_left_adjoint_counit
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
        let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
        X1
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
        swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
          (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
          (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
          x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
             p
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
            (tensor_id TC x y))
         (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
             p
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
               (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
            (tensor_id TD x y))
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))))) =
transportb
  (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats
           (identity C) (identity C),
   disp_2cells α (id_disp TD) (id_disp TD))
  (vcomp_linv
     (left_equivalence_counit_iso
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))
  (disp_id2 (id_disp TD))

                
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_vcomp2
  (disp_left_adjoint_counit
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
        let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
        X1
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
        swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
          (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
          (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
          x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
             p
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
            (tensor_id TC x y))
         (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
             p
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
               (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
            (tensor_id TD x y))
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))))
  (λ x y : C,
   internal_paths_rew_r
     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
     (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
     (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
      p =
      identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
      · (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
     (internal_paths_rew_r
        (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
        (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
        (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
        (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
         identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
         p · (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
           (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
            · (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
           (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
            identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) = p)
           (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
           (id_left
              (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))
        (tensor_id TD x y))
     (id_right (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
            · idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
              (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
            · idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)),
   disp_2cells α
     (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
        (((λ x y : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
           let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
           X1
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                   x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                p
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧, identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
               (tensor_id TC x y))
            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
                p
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                         ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))) ;; ((λ 
                                                 x
                                                 y : C,
                                                 let
                                                 X :=
                                                 pr1
                                                 ti in
                                                 let
                                                 X0 :=
                                                 λ 
                                                 x0
                                                 y0 : C,
                                                 pr1
                                                 (X x0
                                                 y0)
                                                 in
                                                 X0
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C) x)
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C) y)),,
                                                (λ 
                                                 (x1
                                                 x2 y1
                                                 y2 : C)
                                                 (f : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x1,
                                                 x2 ⟧)
                                                 (g : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y1,
                                                 y2 ⟧),
                                                 pr2
                                                 ti x1
                                                 x2 y1
                                                 y2 f
                                                 g)))
     (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
        (((λ x y : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
           let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
           X1
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                   x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                p
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧, identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
               (tensor_id TC x y))
            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
                p
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                         ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))) ;; ((λ 
                                                 x
                                                 y : C,
                                                 let
                                                 X :=
                                                 pr1
                                                 ti in
                                                 let
                                                 X0 :=
                                                 λ 
                                                 x0

                                                 C) y)),,
                                                (λ

                                                 (f : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x1,
                                                 x2 ⟧)
                                                 (g : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y1,
                                                 y2 ⟧),
                                                 pr2
                                                 ti x1
                                                 x2 y1
                                                 y2 f
                                                 g))))
  (vcomp_rinv
     (left_equivalence_counit_iso
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))
  (disp_id2
     (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
        (((λ x y : C,
           let X := pr1 ti in
           let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
           let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
           X1
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
          (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
           (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
           swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1)
             (pr1 ti x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g)
             (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
             (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
             x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity
               (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                   x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
                p
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                   · (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y
                         ⟧, identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
                  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                       (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (pr12 (pr1 ti
                              (functor_identity C x)
                              (functor_identity C y))
                      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                          (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
               (tensor_id TC x y))
            (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
         (λ x y : C,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
             · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             p =
             identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
                p
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
                  (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                   · identity
                       (functor_identity C
                          (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y
                         ⟧,
                   pr1
                     (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
                  (id_left
                     (identity
                        (functor_identity C
                           (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
               (tensor_id TD x y))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))))) ;; ((λ 
                                                 x
                                                 y : C,
                                                 let
                                                 X :=
                                                 pr1
                                                 ti in
                                                 let
                                                 X0 :=
                                                 λ 
                                                 x0
                                                 y0 : C,
                                                 pr1
                                                 (X x0
                                                 y0)
                                                 in
                                                 X0
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C) x)
                                                 (idtoiso_2_0
                                                 C C
                                                 (idpath
                                                 C) y)),,
                                                (λ 
                                                 (x1
                                                 x2 y1
                                                 y2 : C)
                                                 (f : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ x1,
                                                 x2 ⟧)
                                                 (g : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ y1,
                                                 y2 ⟧),
                                                 pr2

                                                 x2 y1

                                                 g))))

                   apply univalent_category_has_homsets).
                
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_vcomp2
  (λ x y : C,
   internal_paths_rew_r
     (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
     (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
     (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
     (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
      p =
      identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
      · (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
     (internal_paths_rew_r
        (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
        (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
        (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
        (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
         identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) =
         p · (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
           (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
            · (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
           (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
            identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y) = p)
           (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
           (id_left
              (pr1 (pr1 ti x y) · pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))
        (tensor_id TD x y))
     (id_right (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))))
  (disp_left_adjoint_counit
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
     (((λ x y : C,
        let X := pr1 ti in
        let X0 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr2 (X x0 y0) in
        let X1 := λ x0 y0 : C, pr1 (X0 x0 y0) in
        X1
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) x)
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) y)),,
       (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
        swap_along_zisos (pr1 ti x1 y1) (pr1 ti x2 y2)
          (f ⊗^{ pr1 TD} g) (f ⊗^{ pr1 TC} g)
          (pr2 ti x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
          x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
         (identity (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : C ⟦ functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
                x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y
          · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TC} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
             identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
             p
             · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
                · (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y))))
               (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                        (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} y, x ⊗_{ TC} y ⟧,
                identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = p)
               (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (pr12 (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                           (functor_identity C y))
                   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                       (pr1 (pr1 ti x y)))))
            (tensor_id TC x y))
         (id_left (identity (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))),,
      (λ x y : C,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))
          · identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
         (pr1
            (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
               (functor_identity C y))
          · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
          p =
          identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y
          · identity
              (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
            (identity x ⊗^{ TD} identity y)
            (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
             pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) =
             p
             · identity
                 (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧)
               (identity (x ⊗_{ TD} y)
                · identity
                    (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (identity
                  (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TD} y, x ⊗_{ TD} y ⟧,
                pr1
                  (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                     (functor_identity C y))
                · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                    (pr12 (pr1 ti x y)) = p)
               (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 ti x y))
               (id_left
                  (identity
                     (functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ TD} y)))))
            (tensor_id TD x y))
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (pr1 ti (functor_identity C x)
                  (functor_identity C y))
             · (# (functor_identity C))%cat
                 (pr12 (pr1 ti x y))))))) =
transportb
  (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats
           (identity C) (identity C),
   disp_2cells α (id_disp TD) (id_disp TD))
  (vcomp_linv
     (left_equivalence_counit_iso
        (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))))
  (disp_id2 (id_disp TD))
 abstract (repeat (apply funextsec ; intro) ;
                   apply univalent_category_has_homsets).
  Defined.

  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
tensor_iso TC TD
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) TC TD

  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
tensor_iso TC TD
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) TC TD

    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
tensor_iso TC TD
→ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) TC TD
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
disp_adjoint_equivalence (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
  TC TD → tensor_iso TC TD
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
∏ x : tensor_iso TC TD, ?g (?f x) = x
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
∏
y : disp_adjoint_equivalence
      (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) TC TD,
?f (?g y) = y

    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
tensor_iso TC TD
→ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) TC TD
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
ti: tensor_iso TC TD
disp_adjoint_equivalence (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
  TC TD

      apply (tensoriso_to_disp_eq TC TD ti).
    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
disp_adjoint_equivalence (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C))
  TC TD → tensor_iso TC TD
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
dae: disp_adjoint_equivalence (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) TC TD
tensor_iso TC TD

      exact (disp_eq_to_tensoriso TC TD dae).
    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
∏ x : tensor_iso TC TD,
(λ dae : disp_adjoint_equivalence
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) TC TD,
 disp_eq_to_tensoriso TC TD dae)
  ((λ ti : tensor_iso TC TD,
    tensoriso_to_disp_eq TC TD ti) x) = x
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
i: tensor_iso TC TD
(λ dae : disp_adjoint_equivalence
           (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) TC TD,
 disp_eq_to_tensoriso TC TD dae)
  ((λ ti : tensor_iso TC TD,
    tensoriso_to_disp_eq TC TD ti) i) = i

      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
pr1: ∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
pr2: ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C) (f : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
Preamble.pr1 (pr1 a1 b1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g · Preamble.pr1 (pr1 a2 b2)
disp_eq_to_tensoriso TC TD
  (tensoriso_to_disp_eq TC TD (pr1,, pr2)) = pr1,, pr2

      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
pr1: ∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
pr2: ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C) (f : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
Preamble.pr1 (pr1 a1 b1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g · Preamble.pr1 (pr1 a2 b2)
isPredicate
  (λ x : ∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
   ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C) (f : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
   Preamble.pr1 (x a1 b1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   f ⊗^{ TD} g · Preamble.pr1 (x a2 b2))
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
pr1: ∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
pr2: ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C) (f : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
Preamble.pr1 (pr1 a1 b1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g · Preamble.pr1 (pr1 a2 b2)
Preamble.pr1
  (disp_eq_to_tensoriso TC TD
     (tensoriso_to_disp_eq TC TD (pr1,, pr2))) =
Preamble.pr1 (pr1,, pr2)

      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
pr1: ∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
pr2: ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C) (f : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
Preamble.pr1 (pr1 a1 b1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g · Preamble.pr1 (pr1 a2 b2)
isPredicate
  (λ x : ∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y),
   ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C) (f : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
   Preamble.pr1 (x a1 b1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   f ⊗^{ TD} g · Preamble.pr1 (x a2 b2))
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
pr1: ∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
pr2: ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C) (f : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
Preamble.pr1 (pr1 a1 b1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g · Preamble.pr1 (pr1 a2 b2)
f: ∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
isaprop
  (∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
   Preamble.pr1 (f a1 b1) · f0 ⊗^{ TC} g =
   f0 ⊗^{ TD} g · Preamble.pr1 (f a2 b2))

        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
pr1: ∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
pr2: ∏ (a1 a2 b1 b2 : C) (f : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
Preamble.pr1 (pr1 a1 b1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g · Preamble.pr1 (pr1 a2 b2)
f: ∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
t, t0, t1, t2: C
t3: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t4: C ⟦ t1, t2 ⟧
isaprop
  (Preamble.pr1 (f t t1) · t3 ⊗^{ TC} t4 =
   t3 ⊗^{ TD} t4 · Preamble.pr1 (f t0 t2))

        apply univalent_category_has_homsets.

TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
pr1: ∏ x y : C, z_iso (x ⊗_{ TD} y) (x ⊗_{ TC} y)

Preamble.pr1 (pr1 a1 b1) · f ⊗^{ TC} g =
f ⊗^{ TD} g · Preamble.pr1 (pr1 a2 b2)
Preamble.pr1
  (disp_eq_to_tensoriso TC TD
     (tensoriso_to_disp_eq TC TD (pr1,, pr2))) =
Preamble.pr1 (pr1,, pr2)

pr1
  (tensoriso_to_disp_eq TC TD
     ((λ dae : disp_adjoint_equivalence
                 (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) TC TD,
       disp_eq_to_tensoriso TC TD dae) dae)) = pr1 dae
 apply idpath.
  Defined.

  Definition tensor_eqi'' {C : univalent_category} (TC TD : tensor C) : UU
    := ∑ (α : ∏ x y : C, (x ⊗_{TC} y) = (x ⊗_{TD} y)),
    ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C⟦x1,x2⟧) (g : C⟦y1,y2⟧),
      f ⊗^{TC} g
      = transportf (λ x : C, C⟦x , x2 ⊗_{TC} y2⟧) (! α x1 y1) (transportf _ (! α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{TD} g)).

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tensor_eqi'' TC TD ≃ tensor_eq'' TC TD

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tensor_eqi'' TC TD ≃ tensor_eq'' TC TD

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tensor_eqi'' TC TD → tensor_eq'' TC TD
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tensor_eq'' TC TD → tensor_eqi'' TC TD
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
∏ x : tensor_eqi'' TC TD, ?g (?f x) = x
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
∏ y : tensor_eq'' TC TD, ?f (?g y) = y

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tensor_eqi'' TC TD → tensor_eq'' TC TD
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tei: tensor_eqi'' TC TD
tensor_eq'' TC TD

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tei: tensor_eqi'' TC TD
∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tei: tensor_eqi'' TC TD
(λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
 ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 f ⊗^{ TC} g =
 transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
   (α x1 y1)
   (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
      (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))) ?pr1

TC, TD: tensor C
tei: tensor_eqi'' TC TD
∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y

TC, TD: tensor C
tei: tensor_eqi'' TC TD
x, y: C
x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y

        exact (! pr1 tei x y).
      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tei: tensor_eqi'' TC TD
(λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
 ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 f ⊗^{ TC} g =
 transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
   (α x1 y1)
   (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
      (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y)
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tei: tensor_eqi'' TC TD
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
f ⊗^{ TC} g =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! pr1 tei x1 y1)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (! pr1 tei x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))

        exact (pr2 tei _ _ _ _ f g).

tensor_eq'' TC TD → tensor_eqi'' TC TD

(λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
 ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 f ⊗^{ TC} g =
 transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)

TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eq'' TC TD
(λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
 ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 f ⊗^{ TC} g =

C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eq'' TC TD
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
f ⊗^{ TC} g =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (! (! pr1 te x1 y1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (! (! pr1 te x2 y2)) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))

        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eq'' TC TD
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
f ⊗^{ TC} g =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (pr1 te x1 y1)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (! (! pr1 te x2 y2)) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))

        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eq'' TC TD
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
f ⊗^{ TC} g =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (pr1 te x1 y1)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
     (pr1 te x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))

        apply (pr2 te).
    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
∏ x : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
(λ te : tensor_eq'' TC TD,
 (λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
 ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   internal_paths_rew_r
     (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
     (! (! pr1 te x1 y1)) (pr1 te x1 y1)
     (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
      f ⊗^{ TC} g =
      transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
           (! (! pr1 te x2 y2)) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
     (internal_paths_rew_r
        (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
        (! (! pr1 te x2 y2)) (pr1 te x2 y2)
        (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
         f ⊗^{ TC} g =
         transportf
           (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
           (pr1 te x1 y1)
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
              p (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
        (pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
        (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x2 y2)))
     (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x1 y1)))
  :
  (λ α : ∏ x0 y : C, x0 ⊗_{ TC} y = x0 ⊗_{ TD} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (! α x1 y1)
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
        (! α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
    (λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y)))
  ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
    (λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y),,
    ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
      (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
     :
     (λ α : ∏ x0 y : C, x0 ⊗_{ TD} y = x0 ⊗_{ TC} y,
      ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
      (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
      f ⊗^{ TC} g =
      transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
        (α x1 y1)
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
           (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
       (λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y))) x) = x
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi'' TC TD
(λ te : tensor_eq'' TC TD,
 (λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
 ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   internal_paths_rew_r
     (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
     (! (! pr1 te x1 y1)) (pr1 te x1 y1)
     (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
      f ⊗^{ TC} g =
      transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
           (! (! pr1 te x2 y2)) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
     (internal_paths_rew_r
        (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
        (! (! pr1 te x2 y2)) (pr1 te x2 y2)
        (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
         f ⊗^{ TC} g =
         transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
           (pr1 te x1 y1)
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
              p (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
        (pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
        (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x2 y2)))
     (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x1 y1)))
  :
  (λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (! α x1 y1)
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
        (! α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
    (λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y)))
  ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
    (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
    ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
      (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
     :
     (λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
      ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
      (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
      f ⊗^{ TC} g =
      transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
        (α x1 y1)
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
           (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
       (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te) = te

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi'' TC TD
pr1
  ((λ x y : C,
    ! pr1
        ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
          (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0),,
          ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
            pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
           :
           (λ α : ∏ x0 y0 : C,
                  x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0 = x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0,
            ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
            f ⊗^{ TC} g =
            transportf
              (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
              (α x1 y1)
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)) (α x2 y2)
                 (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
             (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0))) te) x y),,
   ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     internal_paths_rew_r
       (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
       (! (! pr1
               ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                 (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                 ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                   (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                   (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                   pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                  :
                  (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                         x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                   ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                   (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                   (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                   f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                   transportf (λ ..., ...) (α x3 y3)
                     (transportf ... ... ...))
                    (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te)
               x1 y1))
       (pr1
          ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
            (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
            ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
              (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
              pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
             :
             (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                    x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
              ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
              (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
              f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
              transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, ... ⟧)
                (α x3 y3)
                (transportf (...) (...) (...)))
               (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te) x1 y1)
       (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
        f ⊗^{ TC} g =
        transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
             (! (! pr1
                     ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                       (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                       ((λ ... ... ..., ...)
                        :
                        (...) (...))) te) x2 y2))
             (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
       (internal_paths_rew_r
          (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
          (! (! pr1
                  ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                    (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                    ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                      (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                      (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                      pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                     :
                     (λ α : ∏ x y : C, ... = ...,
                      ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                      (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                      (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                      f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                      transportf ... ... ...)
                       (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te)
                  x2 y2))
          (pr1
             ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
               (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
               ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                :
                (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                       x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                 ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 transportf (...) (...) (...))
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te) x2
             y2)
          (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
           f ⊗^{ TC} g =
           transportf
             (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
             (pr1
                ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                  ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : ...)
                    (g0 : ...),
                    pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                   :
                   (λ ..., ...) (λ ..., ! ...))) te)
                x1 y1)
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
                p (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
          (pr2
             ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
               (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
               ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                :
                (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                       x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                 ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 transportf (...) (...) (...))
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te) x1
             x2 y1 y2 f g)
          (pathsinv0inv0
             (pr1
                ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                  ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                    (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                    (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                    pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                   :
                   (λ α : ∏ ..., ...,
                    ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : ...)
                    (g0 : ...), ... = ...)
                     (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te)
                x2 y2)))
       (pathsinv0inv0
          (pr1
             ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
               (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
               ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                :
                (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                       x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                 ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 transportf (...) (...) (...))
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te) x1
             y1)))
    :
    (λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
     ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     f ⊗^{ TC} g =
     transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
       (! α x1 y1)
       (transportf
          (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
          (! α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
      (λ x y : C,
       ! pr1
           ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
             (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0),,
             ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
              :
              (λ α : ∏ x0 y0 : C,
                     x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0 = x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0,
               ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               f ⊗^{ TC} g =
               transportf
                 (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                 (α x1 y1)
                 (transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms ...)
                    (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0))) te) x
           y))) = pr1 te
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi'' TC TD
pr2
  ((λ x y : C,
    ! pr1
        ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
          (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0),,
          ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
            pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
           :
           (λ α : ∏ x0 y0 : C,
                  x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0 = x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0,
            ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
            f ⊗^{ TC} g =
            transportf
              (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
              (α x1 y1)
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)) (α x2 y2)
                 (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
             (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0))) te) x y),,
   ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     internal_paths_rew_r
       (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
       (! (! pr1
               ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                 (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                 ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                   (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                   (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                   pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                  :
                  (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                         x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                   ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                   (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                   (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                   f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                   transportf (λ ..., ...) (α x3 y3)
                     (transportf ... ... ...))
                    (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te)
               x1 y1))
       (pr1
          ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
            (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
            ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
              (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
              pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
             :
             (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                    x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
              ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
              (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
              f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
              transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, ... ⟧)
                (α x3 y3)
                (transportf (...) (...) (...)))
               (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te) x1 y1)
       (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
        f ⊗^{ TC} g =
        transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
             (! (! pr1
                     ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                       (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                       ((λ ... ... ..., ...)
                        :
                        (...) (...))) te) x2 y2))
             (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
       (internal_paths_rew_r
          (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
          (! (! pr1
                  ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                    (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                    ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                      (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                      (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                      pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                     :
                     (λ α : ∏ x y : C, ... = ...,
                      ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                      (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                      (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                      f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                      transportf ... ... ...)
                       (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te)
                  x2 y2))
          (pr1
             ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
               (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
               ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                :
                (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                       x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                 ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 transportf (...) (...) (...))
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te) x2
             y2)
          (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
           f ⊗^{ TC} g =
           transportf
             (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
             (pr1
                ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                  ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : ...)
                    (g0 : ...),
                    pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                   :
                   (λ ..., ...) (λ ..., ! ...))) te)
                x1 y1)
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
                p (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
          (pr2
             ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
               (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
               ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                :
                (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                       x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                 ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 transportf (...) (...) (...))
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te) x1
             x2 y1 y2 f g)
          (pathsinv0inv0
             (pr1
                ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                  ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                    (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                    (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                    pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                   :
                   (λ α : ∏ ..., ...,
                    ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : ...)
                    (g0 : ...), ... = ...)
                     (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te)
                x2 y2)))
       (pathsinv0inv0
          (pr1
             ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
               (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
               ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                :
                (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                       x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                 ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 transportf (...) (...) (...))
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te) x1
             y1)))
    :
    (λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
     ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     f ⊗^{ TC} g =
     transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
       (! α x1 y1)
       (transportf
          (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
          (! α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
      (λ x y : C,
       ! pr1
           ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
             (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0),,
             ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
              :
              (λ α : ∏ x0 y0 : C,
                     x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0 = x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0,
               ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               f ⊗^{ TC} g =
               transportf
                 (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                 (α x1 y1)
                 (transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms ...)
                    (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0))) te) x
           y))) =
transportb
  (λ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (! x x1 y1)
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
        (! x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))) ?p (pr2 te)

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi'' TC TD
pr1
  ((λ x y : C,
    ! pr1
        ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
          (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0),,
          ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
            pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
           :
           (λ α : ∏ x0 y0 : C,
                  x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0 = x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0,
            ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
            f ⊗^{ TC} g =
            transportf
              (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
              (α x1 y1)
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)) (α x2 y2)
                 (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
             (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0))) te) x y),,
   ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     internal_paths_rew_r
       (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
       (! (! pr1
               ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                 (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                 ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                   (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                   (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                   pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                  :
                  (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                         x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                   ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                   (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                   (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                   f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                   transportf (λ ..., ...) (α x3 y3)
                     (transportf ... ... ...))
                    (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te)
               x1 y1))
       (pr1
          ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
            (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
            ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
              (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
              pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
             :
             (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                    x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
              ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
              (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
              f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
              transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, ... ⟧)
                (α x3 y3)
                (transportf (...) (...) (...)))
               (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te) x1 y1)
       (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
        f ⊗^{ TC} g =
        transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
             (! (! pr1
                     ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                       (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                       ((λ ... ... ..., ...)
                        :
                        (...) (...))) te) x2 y2))
             (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
       (internal_paths_rew_r
          (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
          (! (! pr1
                  ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                    (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                    ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                      (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                      (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                      pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                     :
                     (λ α : ∏ x y : C, ... = ...,
                      ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                      (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                      (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                      f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                      transportf ... ... ...)
                       (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te)
                  x2 y2))
          (pr1
             ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
               (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
               ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                :
                (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                       x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                 ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 transportf (...) (...) (...))
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te) x2
             y2)
          (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
           f ⊗^{ TC} g =
           transportf
             (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
             (pr1
                ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                  ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : ...)
                    (g0 : ...),
                    pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                   :
                   (λ ..., ...) (λ ..., ! ...))) te)
                x1 y1)
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
                p (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
          (pr2
             ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
               (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
               ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                :
                (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                       x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                 ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 transportf (...) (...) (...))
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te) x1
             x2 y1 y2 f g)
          (pathsinv0inv0
             (pr1
                ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                  ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                    (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                    (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                    pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                   :
                   (λ α : ∏ ..., ...,
                    ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : ...)
                    (g0 : ...), ... = ...)
