                     (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te)
                x2 y2)))
       (pathsinv0inv0
          (pr1
             ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
               (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
               ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                :
                (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                       x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                 ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 transportf (...) (...) (...))
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te) x1
             y1)))
    :
    (λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
     ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     f ⊗^{ TC} g =
     transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
       (! α x1 y1)
       (transportf
          (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
          (! α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
      (λ x y : C,
       ! pr1
           ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
             (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0),,
             ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
              :
              (λ α : ∏ x0 y0 : C,
                     x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0 = x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0,
               ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               f ⊗^{ TC} g =
               transportf
                 (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                 (α x1 y1)
                 (transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms ...)
                    (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0))) te) x
           y))) = pr1 te
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi'' TC TD
x, x0: C
pr1
  ((λ x y : C,
    ! pr1
        ((λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))
        x y),,
   (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
    (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
    internal_paths_rew_r
      (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
      (! (! pr1
              ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
               (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1))
      (pr1
         ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
          (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
           (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
           pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1)
      (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
       f ⊗^{ TC} g =
       transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
            (! (! pr1
                    ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                     (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                      (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                      (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                      pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2 y2))
            (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
         (! (! pr1
                 ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                  (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                   (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                   (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                   pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2 y2))
         (pr1
            ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
             (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
              (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
              pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2 y2)
         (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
          f ⊗^{ TC} g =
          transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
            (pr1
               ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1)
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
               p (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
         (pr2
            ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
             (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
              (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
              pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 x2 y1 y2 f
            g)
         (pathsinv0inv0
            (pr1
               ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2 y2)))
      (pathsinv0inv0
         (pr1
            ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
             (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
              (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
              pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1)))) x
  x0 = pr1 te x x0

        apply pathsinv0inv0.
      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi'' TC TD
pr2
  ((λ x y : C,
    ! pr1
        ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
          (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0),,
          ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
            pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
           :
           (λ α : ∏ x0 y0 : C,
                  x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0 = x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0,
            ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
            f ⊗^{ TC} g =
            transportf
              (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
              (α x1 y1)
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)) (α x2 y2)
                 (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
             (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0))) te) x y),,
   ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     internal_paths_rew_r
       (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
       (! (! pr1
               ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                 (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                 ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                   (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                   (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                   pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                  :
                  (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                         x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                   ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                   (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                   (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                   f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                   transportf (λ ..., ...) (α x3 y3)
                     (transportf ... ... ...))
                    (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te)
               x1 y1))
       (pr1
          ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
            (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
            ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
              (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
              pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
             :
             (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                    x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
              ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
              (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
              f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
              transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, ... ⟧)
                (α x3 y3)
                (transportf (...) (...) (...)))
               (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te) x1 y1)
       (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
        f ⊗^{ TC} g =
        transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
             (! (! pr1
                     ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                       (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                       ((λ ... ... ..., ...)
                        :
                        (...) (...))) te) x2 y2))
             (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
       (internal_paths_rew_r
          (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
          (! (! pr1
                  ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                    (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                    ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                      (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                      (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                      pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                     :
                     (λ α : ∏ x y : C, ... = ...,
                      ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                      (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                      (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                      f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                      transportf ... ... ...)
                       (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te)
                  x2 y2))
          (pr1
             ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
               (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
               ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                :
                (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                       x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                 ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 transportf (...) (...) (...))
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te) x2
             y2)
          (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
           f ⊗^{ TC} g =
           transportf
             (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
             (pr1
                ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                  ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : ...)
                    (g0 : ...),
                    pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                   :
                   (λ ..., ...) (λ ..., ! ...))) te)
                x1 y1)
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
                p (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
          (pr2
             ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
               (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
               ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                :
                (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                       x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                 ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 transportf (...) (...) (...))
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te) x1
             x2 y1 y2 f g)
          (pathsinv0inv0
             (pr1
                ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
                  ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                    (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                    (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                    pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                   :
                   (λ α : ∏ ..., ...,
                    ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : ...)
                    (g0 : ...), ... = ...)
                     (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te)
                x2 y2)))
       (pathsinv0inv0
          (pr1
             ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
               (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
               ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                :
                (λ α : ∏ x y : C,
                       x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
                 ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 transportf (...) (...) (...))
                  (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y))) te) x1
             y1)))
    :
    (λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
     ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     f ⊗^{ TC} g =
     transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
       (! α x1 y1)
       (transportf
          (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
          (! α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
      (λ x y : C,
       ! pr1
           ((λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
             (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0),,
             ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
              :
              (λ α : ∏ x0 y0 : C,
                     x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0 = x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0,
               ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               f ⊗^{ TC} g =
               transportf
                 (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                 (α x1 y1)
                 (transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms ...)
                    (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0))) te) x
           y))) =
transportb
  (λ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (! x x1 y1)
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
        (! x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
  (funextsec
     (λ t : C, ∏ y : C, t ⊗_{ TC} y = t ⊗_{ TD} y)
     (pr1
        ((λ x y : C,
          ! pr1
              ((λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0),,
               (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) x y),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
            (! (! pr1
                    ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                     (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                      (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                      (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                      pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1))
            (pr1
               ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1)
            (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
             f ⊗^{ TC} g =
             transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
                  (! (! pr1
                          ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                           (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                            (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                            (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                            pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0))
                          x2 y2)) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
               (! (! pr1
                       ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                        (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                         (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                         (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                         pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2
                       y2))
               (pr1
                  ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                   (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                    (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                    (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                    pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2 y2)
               (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                  (pr1
                     ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                      (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                       (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                       (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                       pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1
                     y1)
                  (transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)) p
                     (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
               (pr2
                  ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                   (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                    (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                    (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                    pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 x2
                  y1 y2 f g)
               (pathsinv0inv0
                  (pr1
                     ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                      (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                       (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                       (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                       pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2
                     y2)))
            (pathsinv0inv0
               (pr1
                  ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                   (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                    (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                    (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                    pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1)))))
     (pr1 te)
     ((λ x : C,
       funextsec (λ t : C, x ⊗_{ TC} t = x ⊗_{ TD} t)
         (pr1
            ((λ x0 y : C,
              ! pr1
                  ((λ x1 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x1 y0),,
                   (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                    (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                    (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                    pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) x0 y),,
             (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
              (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
              internal_paths_rew_r
                (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
                (! (! pr1
                        ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                         (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                          (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                          (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                          pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0))
                        x1 y1))
                (pr1
                   ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                    (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                     (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                     (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                     pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1)
                (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
                 f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                 transportf
                   (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                   p
                   (transportf
                      (precategory_morphisms
                         (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
                      (! (! pr1 (...,, ...) x2 y2))
                      (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
                   (! (! pr1
                           ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                            (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                             (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                             (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                             pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0))
                           x2 y2))
                   (pr1
                      ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                       (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                        (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                        (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                        pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2
                      y2)
                   (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 =
                          x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                    f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                    transportf
                      (λ x0 : C,
                       C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                      (pr1 ((...),, (...)) x1 y1)
                      (transportf
                         (precategory_morphisms (...))
                         p (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                   (pr2
                      ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                       (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                        (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                        (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                        pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1
                      x2 y1 y2 f g)
                   (pathsinv0inv0
                      (pr1
                         ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                          (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                           (f0 : ...) (g0 : ...),
                           pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0))
                         x2 y2)))
                (pathsinv0inv0
                   (pr1
                      ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                       (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                        (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                        (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                        pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1
                      y1)))) x) (pr1 te x)
         ((λ x0 : C, pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x x0))
          :
          pr1
            ((λ x0 y : C,
              ! pr1
                  ((λ x1 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x1 y0),,
                   (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                    (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                    (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                    pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) x0 y),,
             (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
              (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
              internal_paths_rew_r
                (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
                (! (! pr1
                        ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                         (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                          (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                          (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                          pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0))
                        x1 y1))
                (pr1
                   ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                    (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                     (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                     (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                     pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1)
                (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
                 f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                 transportf
                   (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                   p
                   (transportf
                      (precategory_morphisms (...))
                      (! (! pr1 ... x2 y2))
                      (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
                   (! (! pr1
                           ((λ ..., ! ...),,
                            (λ ... ... ..., ...)) x2
                           y2))
                   (pr1
                      ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                       (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : ...)
                        (g0 : ...),
                        pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2
                      y2)
                   (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 =
                          x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                    f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                    transportf
                      (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, ... ⟧)
                      (pr1 (...) x1 y1)
                      (transportf (...) p (...)))
                   (pr2
                      ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                       (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : ...)
                        (g0 : ...),
                        pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1
                      x2 y1 y2 f g)
                   (pathsinv0inv0
                      (pr1 ((...),, (...)) x2 y2)))
                (pathsinv0inv0
                   (pr1
                      ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                       (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : ...)
                        (g0 : ...),
                        pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1
                      y1)))) x ~ pr1 te x))
      :
      pr1
        ((λ x y : C,
          ! pr1
              ((λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0),,
               (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) x y),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
            (! (! pr1
                    ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                     (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                      (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                      (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                      pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1))
            (pr1
               ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1)
            (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
             f ⊗^{ TC} g =
             transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
                  (! (! pr1
                          ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                           (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                            (f0 : ...) (g0 : ...),
                            pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0))
                          x2 y2)) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
               (! (! pr1
                       ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                        (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                         (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                         (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                         pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2
                       y2))
               (pr1
                  ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                   (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                    (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                    (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                    pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2 y2)
               (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                  (pr1
                     ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                      (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                       (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                       (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                       pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1
                     y1)
                  (transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)) p
                     (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
               (pr2
                  ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                   (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                    (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                    (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                    pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 x2
                  y1 y2 f g)
               (pathsinv0inv0
                  (pr1
                     ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                      (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                       (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                       (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                       pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2
                     y2)))
            (pathsinv0inv0
               (pr1
                  ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                   (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                    (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                    (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                    pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1)))) ~
      pr1 te)) (pr2 te)
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi'' TC TD
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
pr2
  ((λ x y : C,
    ! pr1
        ((λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g))
        x y),,
   (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
    (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
    internal_paths_rew_r
      (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
      (! (! pr1
              ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
               (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1))
      (pr1
         ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
          (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
           (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
           pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1)
      (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
       f ⊗^{ TC} g =
       transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
            (! (! pr1
                    ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                     (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                      (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                      (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                      pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2 y2))
            (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
         (! (! pr1
                 ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                  (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                   (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                   (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                   pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2 y2))
         (pr1
            ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
             (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
              (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
              pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2 y2)
         (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
          f ⊗^{ TC} g =
          transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
            (pr1
               ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1)
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
               p (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
         (pr2
            ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
             (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
              (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
              pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 x2 y1 y2 f
            g)
         (pathsinv0inv0
            (pr1
               ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2 y2)))
      (pathsinv0inv0
         (pr1
            ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
             (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
              (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
              pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1)))) x
  x0 x1 x2 x3 x4 =
transportb
  (λ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (! x x1 y1)
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
        (! x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
  (funextsec
     (λ t : C, ∏ y : C, t ⊗_{ TC} y = t ⊗_{ TD} y)
     (pr1
        ((λ x y : C,
          ! pr1
              ((λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0),,
               (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) x y),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
            (! (! pr1
                    ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                     (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                      (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                      (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                      pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1))
            (pr1
               ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1)
            (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
             f ⊗^{ TC} g =
             transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
                  (! (! pr1
                          ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                           (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                            (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                            (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                            pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0))
                          x2 y2)) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
               (! (! pr1
                       ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                        (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                         (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                         (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                         pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2
                       y2))
               (pr1
                  ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                   (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                    (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                    (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                    pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2 y2)
               (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                  (pr1
                     ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                      (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                       (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                       (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                       pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1
                     y1)
                  (transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)) p
                     (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
               (pr2
                  ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                   (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                    (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                    (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                    pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 x2
                  y1 y2 f g)
               (pathsinv0inv0
                  (pr1
                     ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                      (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                       (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                       (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                       pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2
                     y2)))
            (pathsinv0inv0
               (pr1
                  ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
                   (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                    (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                    (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                    pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1)))))
     (pr1 te)
     (λ x : C,
      funextsec (λ t : C, x ⊗_{ TC} t = x ⊗_{ TD} t)
        (pr1
           ((λ x0 y : C,
             ! pr1
                 ((λ x1 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x1 y0),,
                  (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                   (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                   pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) x0 y),,
            (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
             (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
             internal_paths_rew_r
               (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
               (! (! pr1
                       ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                        (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                         (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                         (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                         pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1
                       y1))
               (pr1
                  ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                   (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                    (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                    (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                    pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1 y1)
               (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
                f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                transportf
                  (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                  p
                  (transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
                     (! (! pr1
                             ((λ ..., ! ...),,
                              (λ ... ... ..., ...)) x2
                             y2)) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
                  (! (! pr1
                          ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                           (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                            (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                            (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                            pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0))
                          x2 y2))
                  (pr1
                     ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                      (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                       (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                       (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                       pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x2
                     y2)
                  (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                   f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                   transportf
                     (λ x0 : C,
                      C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                     (pr1
                        ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                         (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                          (f0 : ...) (g0 : ...),
                          pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0))
                        x1 y1)
                     (transportf
                        (precategory_morphisms
                           (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)) p
                        (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                  (pr2
                     ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                      (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                       (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                       (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                       pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1
                     x2 y1 y2 f g)
                  (pathsinv0inv0
                     (pr1
                        ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                         (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                          (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                          (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                          pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0))
                        x2 y2)))
               (pathsinv0inv0
                  (pr1
                     ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 te x0 y),,
                      (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                       (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                       (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                       pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)) x1
                     y1)))) x) (pr1 te x)
        (λ x0 : C, pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x x0))))
  (pr2 te) x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4

        apply homset_property.
    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
∏ y : tensor_eq'' TC TD,
(λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
 (λ x y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x y0),,
 ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
  :
  (λ α : ∏ x y0 : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y0 = x ⊗_{ TC} y0,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (α x1 y1)
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
        (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
    (λ x y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x y0)))
  ((λ te : tensor_eq'' TC TD,
    (λ x y0 : C, ! pr1 te x y0),,
    ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
      (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
      internal_paths_rew_r
        (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
        (! (! pr1 te x1 y1)) (pr1 te x1 y1)
        (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
         f ⊗^{ TC} g =
         transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
           p
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
              (! (! pr1 te x2 y2)) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
           (! (! pr1 te x2 y2)) (pr1 te x2 y2)
           (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
            f ⊗^{ TC} g =
            transportf
              (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
              (pr1 te x1 y1)
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)) p (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
           (pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
           (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x2 y2)))
        (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x1 y1)))
     :
     (λ α : ∏ x y0 : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y0 = x ⊗_{ TD} y0,
      ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
      (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
      f ⊗^{ TC} g =
      transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
        (! α x1 y1)
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
           (! α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
       (λ x y0 : C, ! pr1 te x y0))) y) = y
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tei: tensor_eq'' TC TD
(λ tei : tensor_eqi'' TC TD,
 (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
 ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
  :
  (λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (α x1 y1)
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
        (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
    (λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y)))
  ((λ te : tensor_eq'' TC TD,
    (λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
    ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
      (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
      internal_paths_rew_r
        (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
        (! (! pr1 te x1 y1)) (pr1 te x1 y1)
        (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
         f ⊗^{ TC} g =
         transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
           p
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
              (! (! pr1 te x2 y2)) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
           (! (! pr1 te x2 y2)) (pr1 te x2 y2)
           (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
            f ⊗^{ TC} g =
            transportf
              (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
              (pr1 te x1 y1)
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)) p (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
           (pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
           (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x2 y2)))
        (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x1 y1)))
     :
     (λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
      ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
      (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
      f ⊗^{ TC} g =
      transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
        (! α x1 y1)
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
           (! α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
       (λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y))) tei) = tei

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tei: tensor_eq'' TC TD
pr1
  ((λ x y : C,
    ! pr1
        ((λ te : tensor_eq'' TC TD,
          (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0),,
          ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
              (! (! pr1 te x1 y1)) (pr1 te x1 y1)
              (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
               f ⊗^{ TC} g =
               transportf
                 (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
                 (transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms
                       (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
                    (! (! pr1 te x2 y2)) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
                 (! (! pr1 te x2 y2)) (pr1 te x2 y2)
                 (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                  f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                  transportf
                    (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                    (pr1 te x1 y1)
                    (transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms ...) p
                       (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                 (pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
                 (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x2 y2)))
              (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x1 y1)))
           :
           (λ α : ∏ x0 y0 : C,
                  x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0 = x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0,
            ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
            f ⊗^{ TC} g =
            transportf
              (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
              (! α x1 y1)
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)) (! α x2 y2)
                 (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
             (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0))) tei) x y),,
   ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     pr2
       ((λ te : tensor_eq'' TC TD,
         (λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
         ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
           (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
           internal_paths_rew_r
             (x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3)
             (! (! pr1 te x3 y3)) (pr1 te x3 y3)
             (λ p : x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3,
              f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
              transportf
                (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4 ⟧) p
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms ...)
                   (! (! ...)) (f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0)))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 = x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4)
                (! (! pr1 te x4 y4)) (pr1 te x4 y4)
                (λ p : x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 = x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4,
                 f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 transportf (λ ..., ...)
                   (pr1 te x3 y3)
                   (transportf ... p ...))
                (pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x4 y4)))
             (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x3 y3)))
          :
          (λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
           ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
           (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
           f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
           transportf
             (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4 ⟧)
             (! α x3 y3)
             (transportf (precategory_morphisms (...))
                (! α x4 y4) (f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0)))
            (λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y))) tei) x1 x2 y1
       y2 f g)
    :
    (λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
     ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     f ⊗^{ TC} g =
     transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
       (α x1 y1)
       (transportf
          (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
          (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
      (λ x y : C,
       ! pr1
           ((λ te : tensor_eq'' TC TD,
             (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0),,
             ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
                 (! (! pr1 te x1 y1)) (pr1 te x1 y1)
                 (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
                  f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                  transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, ... ⟧)
                    p (transportf (...) (! ...) (...)))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
                    (! (! pr1 te x2 y2))
                    (pr1 te x2 y2)
                    (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 =
                           x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                     f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                     transportf (...) (...) (...))
                    (pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
                    (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x2 y2)))
                 (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x1 y1)))
              :
              (λ α : ∏ x0 y0 : C,
                     x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0 = x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0,
               ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               f ⊗^{ TC} g =
               transportf
                 (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                 (! α x1 y1)
                 (transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms ...)
                    (! α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0))) tei) x
           y))) = pr1 tei
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tei: tensor_eq'' TC TD
pr2
  ((λ x y : C,
    ! pr1
        ((λ te : tensor_eq'' TC TD,
          (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0),,
          ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
              (! (! pr1 te x1 y1)) (pr1 te x1 y1)
              (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
               f ⊗^{ TC} g =
               transportf
                 (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
                 (transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms
                       (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
                    (! (! pr1 te x2 y2)) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
                 (! (! pr1 te x2 y2)) (pr1 te x2 y2)
                 (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                  f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                  transportf
                    (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                    (pr1 te x1 y1)
                    (transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms ...) p
                       (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                 (pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
                 (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x2 y2)))
              (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x1 y1)))
           :
           (λ α : ∏ x0 y0 : C,
                  x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0 = x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0,
            ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
            f ⊗^{ TC} g =
            transportf
              (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
              (! α x1 y1)
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)) (! α x2 y2)
                 (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
             (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0))) tei) x y),,
   ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     pr2
       ((λ te : tensor_eq'' TC TD,
         (λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
         ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
           (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
           internal_paths_rew_r
             (x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3)
             (! (! pr1 te x3 y3)) (pr1 te x3 y3)
             (λ p : x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3,
              f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
              transportf
                (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4 ⟧) p
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms ...)
                   (! (! ...)) (f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0)))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 = x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4)
                (! (! pr1 te x4 y4)) (pr1 te x4 y4)
                (λ p : x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 = x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4,
                 f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 transportf (λ ..., ...)
                   (pr1 te x3 y3)
                   (transportf ... p ...))
                (pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x4 y4)))
             (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x3 y3)))
          :
          (λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
           ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
           (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
           f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
           transportf
             (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4 ⟧)
             (! α x3 y3)
             (transportf (precategory_morphisms (...))
                (! α x4 y4) (f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0)))
            (λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y))) tei) x1 x2 y1
       y2 f g)
    :
    (λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
     ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     f ⊗^{ TC} g =
     transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
       (α x1 y1)
       (transportf
          (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
          (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
      (λ x y : C,
       ! pr1
           ((λ te : tensor_eq'' TC TD,
             (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0),,
             ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
                 (! (! pr1 te x1 y1)) (pr1 te x1 y1)
                 (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
                  f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                  transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, ... ⟧)
                    p (transportf (...) (! ...) (...)))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
                    (! (! pr1 te x2 y2))
                    (pr1 te x2 y2)
                    (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 =
                           x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                     f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                     transportf (...) (...) (...))
                    (pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
                    (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x2 y2)))
                 (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x1 y1)))
              :
              (λ α : ∏ x0 y0 : C,
                     x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0 = x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0,
               ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               f ⊗^{ TC} g =
               transportf
                 (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                 (! α x1 y1)
                 (transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms ...)
                    (! α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0))) tei) x
           y))) =
transportb
  (λ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (x x1 y1)
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
        (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g))) ?p (pr2 tei)

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tei: tensor_eq'' TC TD
pr1
  ((λ x y : C,
    ! pr1
        ((λ te : tensor_eq'' TC TD,
          (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0),,
          ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
              (! (! pr1 te x1 y1)) (pr1 te x1 y1)
              (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
               f ⊗^{ TC} g =
               transportf
                 (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
                 (transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms
                       (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
                    (! (! pr1 te x2 y2)) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
                 (! (! pr1 te x2 y2)) (pr1 te x2 y2)
                 (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                  f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                  transportf
                    (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                    (pr1 te x1 y1)
                    (transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms ...) p
                       (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                 (pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
                 (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x2 y2)))
              (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x1 y1)))
           :
           (λ α : ∏ x0 y0 : C,
                  x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0 = x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0,
            ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
            f ⊗^{ TC} g =
            transportf
              (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
              (! α x1 y1)
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)) (! α x2 y2)
                 (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
             (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0))) tei) x y),,
   ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     pr2
       ((λ te : tensor_eq'' TC TD,
         (λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
         ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
           (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
           internal_paths_rew_r
             (x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3)
             (! (! pr1 te x3 y3)) (pr1 te x3 y3)
             (λ p : x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3,
              f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
              transportf
                (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4 ⟧) p
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms ...)
                   (! (! ...)) (f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0)))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 = x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4)
                (! (! pr1 te x4 y4)) (pr1 te x4 y4)
                (λ p : x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 = x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4,
                 f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 transportf (λ ..., ...)
                   (pr1 te x3 y3)
                   (transportf ... p ...))
                (pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x4 y4)))
             (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x3 y3)))
          :
          (λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
           ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
           (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
           f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
           transportf
             (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4 ⟧)
             (! α x3 y3)
             (transportf (precategory_morphisms (...))
                (! α x4 y4) (f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0)))
            (λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y))) tei) x1 x2 y1
       y2 f g)
    :
    (λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
     ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     f ⊗^{ TC} g =
     transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
       (α x1 y1)
       (transportf
          (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
          (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
      (λ x y : C,
       ! pr1
           ((λ te : tensor_eq'' TC TD,
             (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0),,
             ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
                 (! (! pr1 te x1 y1)) (pr1 te x1 y1)
                 (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
                  f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                  transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, ... ⟧)
                    p (transportf (...) (! ...) (...)))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
                    (! (! pr1 te x2 y2))
                    (pr1 te x2 y2)
                    (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 =
                           x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                     f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                     transportf (...) (...) (...))
                    (pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
                    (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x2 y2)))
                 (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x1 y1)))
              :
              (λ α : ∏ x0 y0 : C,
                     x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0 = x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0,
               ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               f ⊗^{ TC} g =
               transportf
                 (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                 (! α x1 y1)
                 (transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms ...)
                    (! α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0))) tei) x
           y))) = pr1 tei
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tei: tensor_eq'' TC TD
x, x0: C
pr1
  ((λ x y : C,
    ! pr1
        ((λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
            (! (! pr1 tei x1 y1)) (pr1 tei x1 y1)
            (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
             f ⊗^{ TC} g =
             transportf
               (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
                  (! (! pr1 tei x2 y2)) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
               (! (! pr1 tei x2 y2)) (pr1 tei x2 y2)
               (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                transportf
                  (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                  (pr1 tei x1 y1)
                  (transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)) p
                     (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
               (pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
               (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x2 y2)))
            (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x1 y1)))) x y),,
   (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
    (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
    pr2
      ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
       (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
        (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
        internal_paths_rew_r
          (x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3)
          (! (! pr1 tei x3 y3)) (pr1 tei x3 y3)
          (λ p : x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3,
           f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
           transportf
             (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4 ⟧) p
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3))
                (! (! pr1 tei x4 y4)) (f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0)))
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 = x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4)
             (! (! pr1 tei x4 y4)) (pr1 tei x4 y4)
             (λ p : x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 = x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4,
              f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
              transportf
                (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4 ⟧)
                (pr1 tei x3 y3)
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms
                      (x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3)) p
                   (f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0)))
             (pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
             (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x4 y4)))
          (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x3 y3)))) x1 x2 y1
      y2 f g)) x x0 = pr1 tei x x0

        apply pathsinv0inv0.
      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tei: tensor_eq'' TC TD
pr2
  ((λ x y : C,
    ! pr1
        ((λ te : tensor_eq'' TC TD,
          (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0),,
          ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
              (! (! pr1 te x1 y1)) (pr1 te x1 y1)
              (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
               f ⊗^{ TC} g =
               transportf
                 (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
                 (transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms
                       (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
                    (! (! pr1 te x2 y2)) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
                 (! (! pr1 te x2 y2)) (pr1 te x2 y2)
                 (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                  f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                  transportf
                    (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                    (pr1 te x1 y1)
                    (transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms ...) p
                       (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                 (pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
                 (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x2 y2)))
              (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x1 y1)))
           :
           (λ α : ∏ x0 y0 : C,
                  x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0 = x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0,
            ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
            f ⊗^{ TC} g =
            transportf
              (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
              (! α x1 y1)
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)) (! α x2 y2)
                 (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
             (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0))) tei) x y),,
   ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     pr2
       ((λ te : tensor_eq'' TC TD,
         (λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y),,
         ((λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
           (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
           internal_paths_rew_r
             (x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3)
             (! (! pr1 te x3 y3)) (pr1 te x3 y3)
             (λ p : x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3,
              f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
              transportf
                (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4 ⟧) p
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms ...)
                   (! (! ...)) (f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0)))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 = x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4)
                (! (! pr1 te x4 y4)) (pr1 te x4 y4)
                (λ p : x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 = x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4,
                 f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 transportf (λ ..., ...)
                   (pr1 te x3 y3)
                   (transportf ... p ...))
                (pr2 te x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x4 y4)))
             (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x3 y3)))
          :
          (λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
           ∏ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
           (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
           f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
           transportf
             (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4 ⟧)
             (! α x3 y3)
             (transportf (precategory_morphisms (...))
                (! α x4 y4) (f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0)))
            (λ x y : C, ! pr1 te x y))) tei) x1 x2 y1
       y2 f g)
    :
    (λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
     ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
     (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
     f ⊗^{ TC} g =
     transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
       (α x1 y1)
       (transportf
          (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
          (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
      (λ x y : C,
       ! pr1
           ((λ te : tensor_eq'' TC TD,
             (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0),,
             ((λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
                 (! (! pr1 te x1 y1)) (pr1 te x1 y1)
                 (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
                  f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                  transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, ... ⟧)
                    p (transportf (...) (! ...) (...)))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
                    (! (! pr1 te x2 y2))
                    (pr1 te x2 y2)
                    (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 =
                           x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                     f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                     transportf (...) (...) (...))
                    (pr2 te x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
                    (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x2 y2)))
                 (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 te x1 y1)))
              :
              (λ α : ∏ x0 y0 : C,
                     x0 ⊗_{ TC} y0 = x0 ⊗_{ TD} y0,
               ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
               (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
               f ⊗^{ TC} g =
               transportf
                 (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                 (! α x1 y1)
                 (transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms ...)
                    (! α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                (λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 te x0 y0))) tei) x
           y))) =
transportb
  (λ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (x x1 y1)
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
        (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
  (funextsec
     (λ t : C, ∏ y : C, t ⊗_{ TD} y = t ⊗_{ TC} y)
     (pr1
        ((λ x y : C,
          ! pr1
              ((λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0),,
               (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                internal_paths_rew_r
                  (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
                  (! (! pr1 tei x1 y1))
                  (pr1 tei x1 y1)
                  (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
                   f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                   transportf
                     (λ x0 : C,
                      C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
                     (transportf
                        (precategory_morphisms
                           (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
                        (! (! pr1 tei x2 y2))
                        (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
                     (! (! pr1 tei x2 y2))
                     (pr1 tei x2 y2)
                     (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 =
                            x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                      f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                      transportf
                        (λ x0 : C,
                         C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                        (pr1 tei x1 y1)
                        (transportf
                           (precategory_morphisms
                              (...)) p (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                     (pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
                     (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x2 y2)))
                  (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x1 y1)))) x
              y),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          pr2
            ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
             (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
              (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
              internal_paths_rew_r
                (x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3)
                (! (! pr1 tei x3 y3)) (pr1 tei x3 y3)
                (λ p : x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3,
                 f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 transportf
                   (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4 ⟧) p
                   (transportf
                      (precategory_morphisms
                         (x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3))
                      (! (! pr1 tei x4 y4))
                      (f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0)))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 = x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4)
                   (! (! pr1 tei x4 y4))
                   (pr1 tei x4 y4)
                   (λ p : x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 =
                          x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4,
                    f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                    transportf
                      (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4 ⟧)
                      (pr1 tei x3 y3)
                      (transportf
                         (precategory_morphisms (...))
                         p (f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0)))
                   (pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                   (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x4 y4)))
                (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x3 y3)))) x1
            x2 y1 y2 f g))) (pr1 tei)
     ((λ x : C,
       funextsec (λ t : C, x ⊗_{ TD} t = x ⊗_{ TC} t)
         (pr1
            ((λ x0 y : C,
              ! pr1
                  ((λ x1 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x1 y0),,
                   (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                    (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                    (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                    internal_paths_rew_r
                      (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
                      (! (! pr1 tei x1 y1))
                      (pr1 tei x1 y1)
                      (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 =
                             x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
                       f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                       transportf (λ ..., ...) p
                         (transportf ... ... ...))
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                         (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 =
                          x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
                         (! (! pr1 tei x2 y2))
                         (pr1 tei x2 y2)
                         (λ p : ... = ...,
                          f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                          transportf ... ... ...)
                         (pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
                         (pathsinv0inv0
                            (pr1 tei x2 y2)))
                      (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x1 y1))))
                  x0 y),,
             (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
              (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
              pr2
                ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y),,
                 (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                  (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                  (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                  internal_paths_rew_r
                    (x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3)
                    (! (! pr1 tei x3 y3))
                    (pr1 tei x3 y3)
                    (λ p : x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 =
                           x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3,
                     f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                     transportf (λ ..., ...) p
                       (transportf ... ... ...))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 = x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4)
                       (! (! pr1 tei x4 y4))
                       (pr1 tei x4 y4)
                       (λ p : ... = ...,
                        f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                        transportf ... ... ...)
                       (pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                       (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x4 y4)))
                    (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x3 y3))))
                x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) x) (pr1 tei x)
         ((λ x0 : C, pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x x0))
          :
          pr1
            ((λ x0 y : C,
              ! pr1
                  ((λ x1 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x1 y0),,
                   (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                    (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                    (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                    internal_paths_rew_r
                      (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
                      (! (! pr1 tei x1 y1))
                      (pr1 tei x1 y1)
                      (λ p : ... = ...,
                       f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                       transportf ... p ...)
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                         (... = ...) (! (! ...))
                         (pr1 tei x2 y2) (λ ..., ...)
                         (pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
                         (pathsinv0inv0 ...))
                      (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x1 y1))))
                  x0 y),,
             (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
              (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
              pr2
                ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y),,
                 (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                  (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                  (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                  internal_paths_rew_r
                    (x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3)
                    (! (! pr1 tei x3 y3))
                    (pr1 tei x3 y3)
                    (λ p : ... = ...,
                     f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                     transportf ... p ...)
                    (internal_paths_rew_r (... = ...)
                       (! (! ...)) (pr1 tei x4 y4)
                       (λ ..., ...)
                       (pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                       (pathsinv0inv0 ...))
                    (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x3 y3))))
                x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) x ~ pr1 tei x))
      :
      pr1
        ((λ x y : C,
          ! pr1
              ((λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0),,
               (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                internal_paths_rew_r
                  (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
                  (! (! pr1 tei x1 y1))
                  (pr1 tei x1 y1)
                  (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
                   f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                   transportf
                     (λ x0 : C,
                      C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
                     (transportf
                        (precategory_morphisms (...))
                        (! (! pr1 tei x2 y2))
                        (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
                     (! (! pr1 tei x2 y2))
                     (pr1 tei x2 y2)
                     (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 =
                            x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                      f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                      transportf
                        (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, ... ⟧)
                        (pr1 tei x1 y1)
                        (transportf (...) p (...)))
                     (pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
                     (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x2 y2)))
                  (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x1 y1)))) x
              y),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          pr2
            ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
             (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
              (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
              internal_paths_rew_r
                (x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3)
                (! (! pr1 tei x3 y3)) (pr1 tei x3 y3)
                (λ p : x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3,
                 f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 transportf
                   (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4 ⟧) p
                   (transportf
                      (precategory_morphisms (...))
                      (! (! pr1 tei x4 y4))
                      (f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0)))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 = x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4)
                   (! (! pr1 tei x4 y4))
                   (pr1 tei x4 y4)
                   (λ p : x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 =
                          x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4,
                    f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                    transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, ... ⟧)
                      (pr1 tei x3 y3)
                      (transportf (...) p (...)))
                   (pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                   (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x4 y4)))
                (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x3 y3)))) x1
            x2 y1 y2 f g)) ~ pr1 tei)) (pr2 tei)
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tei: tensor_eq'' TC TD
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
pr2
  ((λ x y : C,
    ! pr1
        ((λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
            (! (! pr1 tei x1 y1)) (pr1 tei x1 y1)
            (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
             f ⊗^{ TC} g =
             transportf
               (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
                  (! (! pr1 tei x2 y2)) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
               (! (! pr1 tei x2 y2)) (pr1 tei x2 y2)
               (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                transportf
                  (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                  (pr1 tei x1 y1)
                  (transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1)) p
                     (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
               (pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
               (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x2 y2)))
            (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x1 y1)))) x y),,
   (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
    (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
    pr2
      ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
       (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
        (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
        internal_paths_rew_r
          (x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3)
          (! (! pr1 tei x3 y3)) (pr1 tei x3 y3)
          (λ p : x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3,
           f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
           transportf
             (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4 ⟧) p
             (transportf
                (precategory_morphisms (x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3))
                (! (! pr1 tei x4 y4)) (f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0)))
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 = x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4)
             (! (! pr1 tei x4 y4)) (pr1 tei x4 y4)
             (λ p : x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 = x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4,
              f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
              transportf
                (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4 ⟧)
                (pr1 tei x3 y3)
                (transportf
                   (precategory_morphisms
                      (x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3)) p
                   (f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0)))
             (pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
             (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x4 y4)))
          (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x3 y3)))) x1 x2 y1
      y2 f g)) x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4 =
transportb
  (λ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TD} y = x ⊗_{ TC} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (x x1 y1)
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
        (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
  (funextsec
     (λ t : C, ∏ y : C, t ⊗_{ TD} y = t ⊗_{ TC} y)
     (pr1
        ((λ x y : C,
          ! pr1
              ((λ x0 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y0),,
               (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                internal_paths_rew_r
                  (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
                  (! (! pr1 tei x1 y1))
                  (pr1 tei x1 y1)
                  (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
                   f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                   transportf
                     (λ x0 : C,
                      C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
                     (transportf
                        (precategory_morphisms
                           (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
                        (! (! pr1 tei x2 y2))
                        (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
                     (! (! pr1 tei x2 y2))
                     (pr1 tei x2 y2)
                     (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 =
                            x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                      f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                      transportf
                        (λ x0 : C,
                         C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                        (pr1 tei x1 y1)
                        (transportf
                           (precategory_morphisms
                              (...)) p (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                     (pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
                     (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x2 y2)))
                  (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x1 y1)))) x
              y),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          pr2
            ((λ x y : C, ! pr1 tei x y),,
             (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
              (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
              internal_paths_rew_r
                (x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3)
                (! (! pr1 tei x3 y3)) (pr1 tei x3 y3)
                (λ p : x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3,
