                 f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                 transportf
                   (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4 ⟧) p
                   (transportf
                      (precategory_morphisms
                         (x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3))
                      (! (! pr1 tei x4 y4))
                      (f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0)))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 = x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4)
                   (! (! pr1 tei x4 y4))
                   (pr1 tei x4 y4)
                   (λ p : x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 =
                          x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4,
                    f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                    transportf
                      (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4 ⟧)
                      (pr1 tei x3 y3)
                      (transportf
                         (precategory_morphisms (...))
                         p (f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0)))
                   (pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                   (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x4 y4)))
                (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x3 y3)))) x1
            x2 y1 y2 f g))) (pr1 tei)
     (λ x : C,
      funextsec (λ t : C, x ⊗_{ TD} t = x ⊗_{ TC} t)
        (pr1
           ((λ x0 y : C,
             ! pr1
                 ((λ x1 y0 : C, ! pr1 tei x1 y0),,
                  (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                   (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                   internal_paths_rew_r
                     (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)
                     (! (! pr1 tei x1 y1))
                     (pr1 tei x1 y1)
                     (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1 =
                            x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1,
                      f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                      transportf
                        (λ x3 : C,
                         C ⟦ x3, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧) p
                        (transportf
                           (precategory_morphisms ...)
                           (! (! ...)) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 = x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2)
                        (! (! pr1 tei x2 y2))
                        (pr1 tei x2 y2)
                        (λ p : x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 =
                               x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2,
                         f ⊗^{ TC} g =
                         transportf (λ ..., ...)
                           (pr1 tei x1 y1)
                           (transportf ... p ...))
                        (pr2 tei x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)
                        (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x2 y2)))
                     (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x1 y1))))
                 x0 y),,
            (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
             (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
             pr2
               ((λ x0 y : C, ! pr1 tei x0 y),,
                (λ (x3 x4 y3 y4 : C)
                 (f0 : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                 (g0 : C ⟦ y3, y4 ⟧),
                 internal_paths_rew_r
                   (x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 = x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3)
                   (! (! pr1 tei x3 y3))
                   (pr1 tei x3 y3)
                   (λ p : x3 ⊗_{ TD} y3 =
                          x3 ⊗_{ TC} y3,
                    f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                    transportf
                      (λ x0 : C,
                       C ⟦ x0, x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4 ⟧) p
                      (transportf
                         (precategory_morphisms ...)
                         (! (! ...)) (f0 ⊗^{ TD} g0)))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 = x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4)
                      (! (! pr1 tei x4 y4))
                      (pr1 tei x4 y4)
                      (λ p : x4 ⊗_{ TD} y4 =
                             x4 ⊗_{ TC} y4,
                       f0 ⊗^{ TC} g0 =
                       transportf (λ ..., ...)
                         (pr1 tei x3 y3)
                         (transportf ... p ...))
                      (pr2 tei x3 x4 y3 y4 f0 g0)
                      (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x4 y4)))
                   (pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x3 y3))))
               x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)) x) (pr1 tei x)
        (λ x0 : C, pathsinv0inv0 (pr1 tei x x0))))
  (pr2 tei) x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4

        apply homset_property.
  Defined.

  Definition tensor_eqi''' {C : univalent_category} (TC TD : tensor C) : UU
    := ∑ (α : ∏ x y : C, (x ⊗_{TC} y) = (x ⊗_{TD} y)),
    ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C⟦x1,x2⟧) (g : C⟦y1,y2⟧),
      transportf (λ x : C, C⟦x , x2 ⊗_{TD} y2⟧) (α x1 y1) (transportf (λ x : C, C⟦x1 ⊗_{TC} y1 , x⟧) (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{TC} g)) = (f ⊗^{TD} g).

  
C: univalent_category
F, G: C → C → C
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p1: F x1 y1 = G x1 y1
p2: F x2 y2 = G x2 y2
f: C ⟦ F x1 y1, F x2 y2 ⟧
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ G x1 y1, c ⟧) p2
  (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, F x2 y2 ⟧) p1 f) =
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, G x2 y2 ⟧) p1
  (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ F x1 y1, c ⟧) p2 f)

  
C: univalent_category
F, G: C → C → C
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p1: F x1 y1 = G x1 y1
p2: F x2 y2 = G x2 y2
f: C ⟦ F x1 y1, F x2 y2 ⟧
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ G x1 y1, c ⟧) p2
  (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, F x2 y2 ⟧) p1 f) =
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, G x2 y2 ⟧) p1
  (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ F x1 y1, c ⟧) p2 f)

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: C → C → C
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ F x1 y1, F x2 y2 ⟧
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ F x1 y1, c ⟧)
  (idpath (F x2 y2))
  (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, F x2 y2 ⟧)
     (idpath (F x1 y1)) f) =
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, F x2 y2 ⟧)
  (idpath (F x1 y1))
  (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ F x1 y1, c ⟧)
     (idpath (F x2 y2)) f)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tensor_eqi''' TC TD ≃ tensor_eqi'' TC TD

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tensor_eqi''' TC TD ≃ tensor_eqi'' TC TD

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
∏ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
   (x x1 y1)
   (transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x0 ⟧)
      (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
≃ (∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (! x x1 y1)
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
        (! x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
(∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
   (x x1 y1)
   (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
      (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
≃ (∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   f ⊗^{ TC} g =
   transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (! x x1 y1)
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TD} y1))
        (! x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TD} g)))

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧) (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5
≃ x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
  transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
    (! x x0 x2)
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
       (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧) (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5
→ x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
  transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
    (! x x0 x2)
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
       (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
→ transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
    (x x0 x2)
    (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
       (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
∏
x6 : transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
       (x x0 x2)
       (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
          (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5,
?g (?f x6) = x6
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
∏
y : x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
    transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
      (! x x0 x2)
      (transportf
         (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
         (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)), ?f (?g y) = y

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧) (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5
→ x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
  transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
    (! x x0 x2)
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
       (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
  (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5
x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))

q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
  (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
  (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)) = ?b
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y

q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
  (x x0 x2)

     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5
?b = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5

  (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)

C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
  (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
  (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
  (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5
x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5 = ?t2

        exact (! q).
      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
  (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3)
     (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
        (x x0 x2)
        (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
           (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))) =
x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
  (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
  (! x x1 x3)
  (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
     (! x x0 x2)
     (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
        (x x0 x2)
        (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
           (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))) =
x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
  (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
  (! x x1 x3)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
     (x x0 x2 @ ! x x0 x2)
     (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
        (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))) = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
  (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
  (! x x1 x3)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
     (idpath (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2))
     (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
        (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))) = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
  (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
  (! x x1 x3)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
  (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
  (x x1 x3 @ ! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5) =
x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
  (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
  (idpath (x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3)) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5) =
x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5

      apply idpath_transportf.
    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
→ transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
    (x x0 x2)
    (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
       (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5

TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧) (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5

      
C: univalent_category

x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y

x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧) (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = ?b

x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y

q: x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =

  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))

C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y

x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧) (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = ?b

        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧) (x x1 x3)
  (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 = ?t2

        exact q.
      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧) (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3)
     (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
        (! x x0 x2)
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
           (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))) =
x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧) (x x1 x3)
  (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
     (x x0 x2)
     (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
        (! x x0 x2)
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
           (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))) =
x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧) (x x1 x3)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
     (! x x0 x2 @ x x0 x2)
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
        (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧) (x x1 x3)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
     (idpath (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
        (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧) (x x1 x3)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
  (! x x1 x3 @ x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5) =
x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
  (idpath (x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3)) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5) =
x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5

      apply idpath_transportf.
    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
∏
x6 : transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
       (x x0 x2)
       (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
          (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5,
(λ q : x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
       transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
         (! x x0 x2)
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
            (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)),
 maponpaths
   (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
      (x x0 x2))
   (maponpaths
      (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
         (x x1 x3)) q) @
 internal_paths_rew_r
   (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
   (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
      (x x0 x2)
      (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
         (x x1 x3)
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
               (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))))
   (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
      (x x1 x3)
      (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
         (x x0 x2)
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
               (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))))
   (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧,
    p = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
   (internal_paths_rew_r
      (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
      (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
         (x x0 x2)
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
               (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))))
      (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
         (! x x0 x2 @ x x0 x2)
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
            (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))
      (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧,
       transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
         (x x1 x3) p = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2 = x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)
         (! x x0 x2 @ x x0 x2)
         (idpath (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
         (λ p : x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2 = x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2,
          transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
            (x x1 x3)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧) p
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                  (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
               (idpath (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                  (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
               (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧,
             transportf
               (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
               (x x1 x3) p = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
               (transportf
                  (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                  (x x1 x3)
                  (transportf
                     (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))
               (transportf
                  (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                  (! x x1 x3 @ x x1 x3)
                  (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3
                      ⟧, p = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 = x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3)
                  (! x x1 x3 @ x x1 x3)
                  (idpath (x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3))
                  (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 = x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3,
                   transportf
                     (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                     p (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
                  (idpath_transportf
                     (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                     (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
                  (pathsinv0l (x x1 x3)))
               (transport_f_f
                  (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                  (! x x1 x3) (x x1 x3)
                  (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))
            (idpath_transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                  (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))))
         (pathsinv0l (x x0 x2)))
      (transport_f_f (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
         (! x x0 x2) (x x0 x2)
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
            (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))))
   (! independent_transportation_commutes (x x0 x2)
        (x x1 x3)
        (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
           (! x x0 x2)
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
              (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))))
  ((λ q : transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
            (x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
               (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) =
          x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5,
    ! (maponpaths
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2))
         (maponpaths
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
               (! x x1 x3)) (! q)) @
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
         (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
               (! x x1 x3)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                  (x x0 x2)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))))
         (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
            (! x x1 x3)
            (transportf
               (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
               (! x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                  (x x0 x2)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧,
          p = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
               (! x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                  (x x0 x2)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))))
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
               (x x0 x2 @ ! x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                  (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧,
             transportf
               (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
               (! x x1 x3) p = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2 = x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
               (x x0 x2 @ ! x x0 x2)
               (idpath (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2))
               (λ p : x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2 = x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2,
                transportf
                  (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
                  (! x x1 x3)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                     p
                     (transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                        (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))) =
                x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                     (idpath (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2))
                     (transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                        (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2,
                         x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧,
                   transportf
                     (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
                     (! x x1 x3) p = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3
                      ⟧)
                     (transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                        (! x x1 x3)
                        (transportf
                           (λ x : C,
                            C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                           (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))
                     (transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                        (x x1 x3 @ ! x x1 x3)
                        (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))
                     (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2,
                            x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧,
                      p = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3)
                        (x x1 x3 @ ! x x1 x3)
                        (idpath (x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3))
                        (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 =
                               x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3,
                         transportf
                           (λ x : C, C ⟦ ..., x ⟧) p
                           (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5) =
                         x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
                        (idpath_transportf
                           (λ x : C,
                            C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                           (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))
                        (pathsinv0r (x x1 x3)))
                     (transport_f_f
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                        (x x1 x3) (! x x1 x3)
                        (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))
                  (idpath_transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                     (transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                        (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))))
               (pathsinv0r (x x0 x2)))
            (transport_f_f
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
               (x x0 x2) (! x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                  (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))))
         (! independent_transportation_commutes
              (! x x0 x2) (! x x1 x3)
              (transportf
                 (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                 (x x0 x2)
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                    (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))))) x6) =
x6
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
  (x x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5
(λ q : x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
       transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
         (! x x0 x2)
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
            (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)),
 maponpaths
   (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
      (x x0 x2))
   (maponpaths
      (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
         (x x1 x3)) q) @
 internal_paths_rew_r
   (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
   (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
      (x x0 x2)
      (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
         (x x1 x3)
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
               (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))))
   (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
      (x x1 x3)
      (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
         (x x0 x2)
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
               (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))))
   (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧,
    p = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
   (internal_paths_rew_r
      (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
      (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
         (x x0 x2)
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
               (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))))
      (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
         (! x x0 x2 @ x x0 x2)
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
            (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))
      (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧,
       transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
         (x x1 x3) p = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2 = x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)
         (! x x0 x2 @ x x0 x2)
         (idpath (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
         (λ p : x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2 = x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2,
          transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
            (x x1 x3)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧) p
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                  (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
               (idpath (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                  (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
               (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧,
             transportf
               (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
               (x x1 x3) p = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
               (transportf
                  (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                  (x x1 x3)
                  (transportf
                     (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))
               (transportf
                  (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                  (! x x1 x3 @ x x1 x3)
                  (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3
                      ⟧, p = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 = x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3)
                  (! x x1 x3 @ x x1 x3)
                  (idpath (x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3))
                  (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 = x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3,
                   transportf
                     (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                     p (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
                  (idpath_transportf
                     (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                     (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
                  (pathsinv0l (x x1 x3)))
               (transport_f_f
                  (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                  (! x x1 x3) (x x1 x3)
                  (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))
            (idpath_transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                  (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))))
         (pathsinv0l (x x0 x2)))
      (transport_f_f (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
         (! x x0 x2) (x x0 x2)
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
            (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))))
   (! independent_transportation_commutes (x x0 x2)
        (x x1 x3)
        (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
           (! x x0 x2)
           (transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
              (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))))
  ((λ q : transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
            (x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
               (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) =
          x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5,
    ! (maponpaths
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2))
         (maponpaths
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
               (! x x1 x3)) (! q)) @
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
         (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
               (! x x1 x3)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                  (x x0 x2)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))))
         (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
            (! x x1 x3)
            (transportf
               (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
               (! x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                  (x x0 x2)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧,
          p = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
               (! x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                  (x x0 x2)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))))
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
               (x x0 x2 @ ! x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                  (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))
            (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧,
             transportf
               (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
               (! x x1 x3) p = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2 = x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
               (x x0 x2 @ ! x x0 x2)
               (idpath (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2))
               (λ p : x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2 = x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2,
                transportf
                  (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
                  (! x x1 x3)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                     p
                     (transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                        (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))) =
                x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                     (idpath (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2))
                     (transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                        (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2,
                         x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧,
                   transportf
                     (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
                     (! x x1 x3) p = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3
                      ⟧)
                     (transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                        (! x x1 x3)
                        (transportf
                           (λ x : C,
                            C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                           (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))
                     (transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                        (x x1 x3 @ ! x x1 x3)
                        (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))
                     (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2,
                            x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧,
                      p = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3)
                        (x x1 x3 @ ! x x1 x3)
                        (idpath (x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3))
                        (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 =
                               x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3,
                         transportf
                           (λ x : C,
                            C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧) p
                           (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5) =
                         x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
                        (idpath_transportf
                           (λ x : C,
                            C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                           (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))
                        (pathsinv0r (x x1 x3)))
                     (transport_f_f
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                        (x x1 x3) (! x x1 x3)
                        (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))
                  (idpath_transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                     (transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                        (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))))
               (pathsinv0r (x x0 x2)))
            (transport_f_f
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
               (x x0 x2) (! x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                  (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))))
         (! independent_transportation_commutes
              (! x x0 x2) (! x x1 x3)
              (transportf
                 (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                 (x x0 x2)
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                    (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))))) q) =
q

      apply homset_property.
    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
∏
y : x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
    transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
      (! x x0 x2)
      (transportf
         (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
         (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)),
(λ q : transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
         (x x0 x2)
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
            (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5,
 ! (maponpaths
      (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
         (! x x0 x2))
      (maponpaths
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
            (! x x1 x3)) (! q)) @
    internal_paths_rew_r
      (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
      (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
         (! x x0 x2)
         (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
            (! x x1 x3)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
               (x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                  (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))))
      (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
         (! x x1 x3)
         (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
               (x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                  (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))))
      (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧,
       p = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
               (x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                  (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))))
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
            (x x0 x2 @ ! x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
               (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧,
          transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
            (! x x1 x3) p = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2 = x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
            (x x0 x2 @ ! x x0 x2)
            (idpath (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2))
            (λ p : x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2 = x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2,
             transportf
               (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
               (! x x1 x3)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧) p
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))) =
             x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                  (idpath (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2))
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                  (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3
                      ⟧,
                transportf
                  (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
                  (! x x1 x3) p = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (! x x1 x3)
                     (transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                        (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3 @ ! x x1 x3)
                     (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2,
                         x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧,
                   p = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3)
                     (x x1 x3 @ ! x x1 x3)
                     (idpath (x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3))
                     (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 =
                            x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3,
                      transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧) p
                        (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5) =
                      x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
                     (idpath_transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                        (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))
                     (pathsinv0r (x x1 x3)))
                  (transport_f_f
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3) (! x x1 x3)
                     (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))
               (idpath_transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))))
            (pathsinv0r (x x0 x2)))
         (transport_f_f
            (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
            (x x0 x2) (! x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
               (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))))
      (! independent_transportation_commutes
           (! x x0 x2) (! x x1 x3)
           (transportf
              (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
              (x x0 x2)
              (transportf
                 (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                 (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))))))
  ((λ q : x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
          transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
               (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)),
    maponpaths
      (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
         (x x0 x2))
      (maponpaths
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
            (x x1 x3)) q) @
    internal_paths_rew_r
      (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
      (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
         (x x0 x2)
         (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
            (x x1 x3)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
               (! x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                  (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))))
      (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
         (x x1 x3)
         (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
               (! x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                  (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))))
      (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧,
       p = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
               (! x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                  (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))))
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2 @ x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
               (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧,
          transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
            (x x1 x3) p = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2 = x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)
            (! x x0 x2 @ x x0 x2)
            (idpath (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
            (λ p : x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2 = x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2,
             transportf
               (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
               (x x1 x3)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧) p
                  (transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                     (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
                  (idpath (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
                  (transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                     (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                  (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3
                      ⟧,
                transportf
                  (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                  (x x1 x3) p = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                  (transportf
                     (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3)
                     (transportf
                        (λ c : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                        (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))
                  (transportf
                     (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                     (! x x1 x3 @ x x1 x3)
                     (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2,
                         x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧,
                   p = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 = x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3)
                     (! x x1 x3 @ x x1 x3)
                     (idpath (x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3))
                     (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 =
                            x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3,
                      transportf
                        (λ c : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧) p
                        (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5) =
                      x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
                     (idpath_transportf
                        (λ c : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                        (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
                     (pathsinv0l (x x1 x3)))
                  (transport_f_f
                     (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                     (! x x1 x3) (x x1 x3)
                     (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))
               (idpath_transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
                  (transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                     (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))))
            (pathsinv0l (x x0 x2)))
         (transport_f_f
            (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2) (x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
               (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))))
      (! independent_transportation_commutes (x x0 x2)
           (x x1 x3)
           (transportf
              (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
              (! x x0 x2)
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                 (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))))) y) = y
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
x: ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
x0, x1, x2, x3: C
x4: C ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
q: x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
  (! x x0 x2)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
     (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
(λ q : transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
         (x x0 x2)
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
            (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5,
 ! (maponpaths
      (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
         (! x x0 x2))
      (maponpaths
         (transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
            (! x x1 x3)) (! q)) @
    internal_paths_rew_r
      (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
      (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
         (! x x0 x2)
         (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
            (! x x1 x3)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
               (x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                  (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))))
      (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
         (! x x1 x3)
         (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
               (x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                  (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))))
      (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧,
       p = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
               (x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                  (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))))
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
            (x x0 x2 @ ! x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
               (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧,
          transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
            (! x x1 x3) p = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2 = x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2)
            (x x0 x2 @ ! x x0 x2)
            (idpath (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2))
            (λ p : x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2 = x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2,
             transportf
               (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
               (! x x1 x3)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧) p
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))) =
             x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                  (idpath (x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2))
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                  (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3
                      ⟧,
                transportf
                  (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
                  (! x x1 x3) p = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (! x x1 x3)
                     (transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                        (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3 @ ! x x1 x3)
                     (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2,
                         x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧,
                   p = x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 = x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3)
                     (x x1 x3 @ ! x x1 x3)
                     (idpath (x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3))
                     (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 =
                            x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3,
                      transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧) p
                        (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5) =
                      x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)
                     (idpath_transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                        (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))
                     (pathsinv0r (x x1 x3)))
                  (transport_f_f
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3) (! x x1 x3)
                     (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5)))
               (idpath_transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))))
            (pathsinv0r (x x0 x2)))
         (transport_f_f
            (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
            (x x0 x2) (! x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
               (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))))
      (! independent_transportation_commutes
           (! x x0 x2) (! x x1 x3)
           (transportf
              (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
              (x x0 x2)
              (transportf
                 (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
                 (x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5))))))
  ((λ q : x4 ⊗^{ TC} x5 =
          transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
               (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)),
    maponpaths
      (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
         (x x0 x2))
      (maponpaths
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, x ⟧)
            (x x1 x3)) q) @
    internal_paths_rew_r
      (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
      (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
         (x x0 x2)
         (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TC} x2, c ⟧)
            (x x1 x3)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
               (! x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                  (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))))
      (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
         (x x1 x3)
         (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
               (! x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                  (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))))
      (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧,
       p = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
               (! x x0 x2)
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                  (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))))
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2 @ x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
               (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧,
          transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
            (x x1 x3) p = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2 = x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)
            (! x x0 x2 @ x x0 x2)
            (idpath (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
            (λ p : x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2 = x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2,
             transportf
               (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
               (x x1 x3)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧) p
                  (transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                     (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))) = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
                  (idpath (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
                  (transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                     (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))
               (transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                  (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
               (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3
                      ⟧,
                transportf
                  (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                  (x x1 x3) p = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧)
                  (transportf
                     (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                     (x x1 x3)
                     (transportf
                        (λ c : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                        (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))
                  (transportf
                     (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                     (! x x1 x3 @ x x1 x3)
                     (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2,
                         x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 ⟧,
                   p = x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 = x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3)
                     (! x x1 x3 @ x x1 x3)
                     (idpath (x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3))
                     (λ p : x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3 =
                            x1 ⊗_{ TD} x3,
                      transportf
                        (λ c : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧) p
                        (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5) =
                      x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)
                     (idpath_transportf
                        (λ c : C,
                         C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                        (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))
                     (pathsinv0l (x x1 x3)))
                  (transport_f_f
                     (λ c : C, C ⟦ x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2, c ⟧)
                     (! x x1 x3) (x x1 x3)
                     (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5)))
               (idpath_transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
                  (transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                     (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))))
            (pathsinv0l (x x0 x2)))
         (transport_f_f
            (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
            (! x x0 x2) (x x0 x2)
            (transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2))
               (! x x1 x3) (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))))
      (! independent_transportation_commutes (x x0 x2)
           (x x1 x3)
           (transportf
              (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x1 ⊗_{ TC} x3 ⟧)
              (! x x0 x2)
              (transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2)) (! x x1 x3)
                 (x4 ⊗^{ TD} x5))))) q) = q

      apply homset_property.
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_category
F0, G0: C → C → C
F1: ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
→ C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ F0 x1 y1, F0 x2 y2 ⟧
gamma: F0 = G0
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
transportf
  (λ T : C → C → C,
   ∏ a1 a2 b1 b2 : C,
   C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
   → C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧ → C ⟦ T a1 b1, T a2 b2 ⟧) gamma F1
  x1 x2 y1 y2 f g =
double_transport
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (F0 x1) (G0 x1)
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) F0 G0 gamma x1)
     y1)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (F0 x2) (G0 x2)
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) F0 G0 gamma x2)
     y2) (F1 x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)

  
C: univalent_category
F0, G0: C → C → C
F1: ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
→ C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ F0 x1 y1, F0 x2 y2 ⟧
gamma: F0 = G0
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
transportf
  (λ T : C → C → C,
   ∏ a1 a2 b1 b2 : C,
   C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
   → C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧ → C ⟦ T a1 b1, T a2 b2 ⟧) gamma F1
  x1 x2 y1 y2 f g =
double_transport
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (F0 x1) (G0 x1)
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) F0 G0 gamma x1)
     y1)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (F0 x2) (G0 x2)
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) F0 G0 gamma x2)
     y2) (F1 x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)

    
C: univalent_category
F0: C → C → C
F1: ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
→ C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ F0 x1 y1, F0 x2 y2 ⟧
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
transportf
  (λ T : C → C → C,
   ∏ a1 a2 b1 b2 : C,
   C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
   → C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧ → C ⟦ T a1 b1, T a2 b2 ⟧)
  (idpath F0) F1 x1 x2 y1 y2 f g =
double_transport
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (F0 x1) (F0 x1)
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) F0 F0 (idpath F0)
        x1) y1)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (F0 x2) (F0 x2)
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) F0 F0 (idpath F0)
        x2) y2) (F1 x1 x2 y1 y2 f g)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tensor_eqi''' TC TD → pr11 TC = pr11 TD

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tensor_eqi''' TC TD → pr11 TC = pr11 TD

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
pr11 TC = pr11 TD

    apply funextsec ; intro ; apply funextsec ; intro ; apply (pr1 te).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tensor_eqi''' TC TD → TC = TD

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
tensor_eqi''' TC TD → TC = TD

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
TC = TD

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
pr1 TC = pr1 TD
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
transportf tensor_ax ?p (pr2 TC) = pr2 TD

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
pr1 TC = pr1 TD
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
pr11 TC = pr11 TD
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
transportf
  (λ x : C → C → C,
   ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
   C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
   → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧) ?p
  (pr21 TC) = pr21 TD

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
pr11 TC = pr11 TD

        exact (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te).
      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
transportf
  (λ x : C → C → C,
   ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
   C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
   → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te) (pr21 TC) = pr21 TD
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : C → C → C,
   ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
   C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
   → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te) (pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2
  x3 x4 = (pr21 TD) x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4

        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : C → C → C,
   ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
   C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
   → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te) (pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2
  x3 x4 = ?b
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
?b = (pr21 TD) x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4

        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : C → C → C,
   ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
   C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
   → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te) (pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2
  x3 x4 =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2 ⟧)
  (pr1 te x x1)
  (transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} x1, x0 ⟧)
     (pr1 te x0 x2) (x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4))


        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : C → C → C,
   ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
   C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
   → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te) (pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2
  x3 x4 = ?b
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
?b =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2 ⟧)
  (pr1 te x x1)
  (transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} x1, x0 ⟧)
     (pr1 te x0 x2) (x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4))
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : C → C → C,
   ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
   C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
   → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te) (pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2
  x3 x4 = ?b

          apply transport_of_bifunctor_map_is_pointwise.
        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
double_transport
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x)
     ((pr11 TD) x)
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) (pr11 TC)
        (pr11 TD) (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te) x)
     x1)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x0)
     ((pr11 TD) x0)
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) (pr11 TC)
        (pr11 TD) (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te) x0)
     x2) ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4) =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2 ⟧)
  (pr1 te x x1)
  (transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} x1, x0 ⟧)
     (pr1 te x0 x2) (x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4))

        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x x1, c ⟧)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x0)
     ((pr11 TD) x0)
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) (pr11 TC)
        (pr11 TD) (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te) x0)
     x2)
  (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, (pr11 TC) x0 x2 ⟧)
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x)
        ((pr11 TD) x)
        (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) (pr11 TC)
           (pr11 TD) (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te) x)
        x1) ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4)) =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2 ⟧)
  (pr1 te x x1)
  (transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} x1, x0 ⟧)
     (pr1 te x0 x2) (x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4))

        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x x1, c ⟧)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x0)
     ((pr11 TD) x0)
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) (pr11 TC)
        (pr11 TD)
        (funextsec (λ _ : C, C → C) (pr11 TC)
           (pr11 TD)
           (λ x : C,
            funextsec (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x)
              ((pr11 TD) x) (λ x0 : C, pr1 te x x0)))
        x0) x2)
  (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, (pr11 TC) x0 x2 ⟧)
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x)
        ((pr11 TD) x)
        (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) (pr11 TC)
           (pr11 TD)
           (funextsec (λ _ : C, C → C) (pr11 TC)
              (pr11 TD)
              (λ x : C,
               funextsec (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x)
                 ((pr11 TD) x) (λ x0 : C, pr1 te x x0)))
           x) x1) ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4)) =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2 ⟧)
  (pr1 te x x1)
  (transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} x1, x0 ⟧)
     (pr1 te x0 x2) (x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4))

        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x x1, c ⟧)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x0)
     ((pr11 TD) x0)
     (funextsec (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x0)
        ((pr11 TD) x0) (λ x1 : C, pr1 te x0 x1)) x2)
  (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, (pr11 TC) x0 x2 ⟧)
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x)
        ((pr11 TD) x)
        (funextsec (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x)
           ((pr11 TD) x) (λ x0 : C, pr1 te x x0)) x1)
     ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4)) =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2 ⟧)
  (pr1 te x x1)
  (transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} x1, x0 ⟧)
     (pr1 te x0 x2) (x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4))

        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x x1, c ⟧)
  (pr1 te x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, (pr11 TC) x0 x2 ⟧)
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x)
        ((pr11 TD) x)
        (funextsec (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x)
           ((pr11 TD) x) (λ x0 : C, pr1 te x x0)) x1)
     ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4)) =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2 ⟧)
  (pr1 te x x1)
  (transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} x1, x0 ⟧)
     (pr1 te x0 x2) (x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4))

        
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x x1, c ⟧)
  (pr1 te x0 x2)
  (transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, (pr11 TC) x0 x2 ⟧)
     (pr1 te x x1) ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4)) =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x0 ⊗_{ TD} x2 ⟧)
  (pr1 te x x1)
  (transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x ⊗_{ TC} x1, x0 ⟧)
     (pr1 te x0 x2) (x3 ⊗^{ TC} x4))

        apply independent_transportation_commutes.
    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
transportf tensor_ax
  (total2_paths_f (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
     (funextsec
        (λ t : C,
         ∏ x2 y1 y2 : C,
         C ⟦ t, x2 ⟧
         → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
           → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) t y1, (pr11 TD) x2 y2 ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ x : C → C → C,
            ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
           (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te) (pr21 TC))
        (pr21 TD)
        ((λ x : C,
          funextsec
            (λ t : C,
             ∏ y1 y2 : C,
             C ⟦ x, t ⟧
             → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
               → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x y1, (pr11 TD) t y2 ⟧)
            (transportf
               (λ x0 : C → C → C,
                ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
                C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
               (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
               (pr21 TC) x) ((pr21 TD) x)
            ((λ x0 : C,
              funextsec
                (λ t : C,
                 ∏ y2 : C,
                 C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
                 → C ⟦ t, y2 ⟧
                   → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x t,
                     (pr11 TD) x0 y2 ⟧)
                (transportf
                   (λ x1 : C → C → C,
                    ∏ x2 x3 y1 y2 : C,
                    C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
                    → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                      → C ⟦ x1 x2 y1, x1 x3 y2 ⟧)
                   (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                   (pr21 TC) x x0) ((pr21 TD) x x0)
                ((λ x1 : C,
                  funextsec
                    (λ t : C,
                     C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ x1, t ⟧
                       → C ⟦ ... x x1, ... x0 t ⟧)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x2 : C → ...,
                        ∏ x3 x4 y1 y2 : C, ... → ...)
                       (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                       (pr21 TC) x x0 x1)
                    ((pr21 TD) x x0 x1)
                    ((λ x2 : C,
                      funextsec (...) (...) (...)
                        (...))
                     :
                     transportf (λ ..., ...)
                       (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                       (pr21 TC) x x0 x1 ~
                     (pr21 TD) x x0 x1))
                 :
                 transportf
