                   (λ x1 : C → C → C,
                    ∏ x2 x3 y1 y2 : C,
                    C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
                    → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                      → C ⟦ x1 x2 y1, x1 x3 y2 ⟧)
                   (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                   (pr21 TC) x x0 ~ (pr21 TD) x x0))
             :
             transportf
               (λ x0 : C → C → C,
                ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
                C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
               (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
               (pr21 TC) x ~ (pr21 TD) x))
         :
         transportf
           (λ x : C → C → C,
            ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
           (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te) (pr21 TC) ~
         pr21 TD))) (pr2 TC) = pr2 TD
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
pr1
  (transportf tensor_ax
     (total2_paths_f (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
        (funextsec
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ x2 y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ t, x2 ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
              → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) t y1, (pr11 TD) x2 y2 ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ x : C → C → C,
               ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
               C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
               → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
              (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
              (pr21 TC)) (pr21 TD)
           ((λ x : C,
             funextsec
               (λ t : C,
                ∏ y1 y2 : C,
                C ⟦ x, t ⟧
                → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x y1, (pr11 TD) t y2
                    ⟧)
               (transportf
                  (λ x0 : C → C → C,
                   ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
                   C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                   → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
                  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                  (pr21 TC) x) ((pr21 TD) x)
               ((λ x0 : C,
                 funextsec
                   (λ t : C,
                    ∏ y2 : C,
                    C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
                    → C ⟦ t, y2 ⟧
                      → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x t,
                        (pr11 TD) x0 y2 ⟧)
                   (transportf
                      (λ x1 : C → C → C,
                       ∏ x2 x3 y1 y2 : C,
                       C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
                       → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                         → C ⟦ x1 x2 y1, x1 x3 y2 ⟧)
                      (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                      (pr21 TC) x x0) ((pr21 TD) x x0)
                   ((λ x1 : C,
                     funextsec
                       (λ t : C,
                        C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧ → ... → ...)
                       (transportf (λ ..., ...)
                          (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
                             te) (pr21 TC) x x0 x1)
                       ((pr21 TD) x x0 x1)
                       ((λ ..., ...)
                        :
                        transportf ... ... ... x x0 x1 ~
                        ... x x0 x1))
                    :
                    transportf
                      (λ x1 : C → C → C,
                       ∏ x2 x3 y1 y2 : C,
                       C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧ → ... → ...)
                      (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                      (pr21 TC) x x0 ~ (pr21 TD) x x0))
                :
                transportf
                  (λ x0 : C → C → C,
                   ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
                   C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                   → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
                  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                  (pr21 TC) x ~ (pr21 TD) x))
            :
            transportf
              (λ x : C → C → C,
               ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
               C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
               → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
              (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
              (pr21 TC) ~ pr21 TD))) (pr2 TC)) =
pr12 TD
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
transportf
  (λ _ : tensor_idax (pr1 TD), tensor_compax (pr1 TD))
  ?p
  (pr2
     (transportf tensor_ax
        (total2_paths_f
           (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
           (funextsec
              (λ t : C,
               ∏ x2 y1 y2 : C,
               C ⟦ t, x2 ⟧
               → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                 → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) t y1, (pr11 TD) x2 y2
                   ⟧)
              (transportf
                 (λ x : C → C → C,
                  ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
                  C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                    → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
                 (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                 (pr21 TC)) (pr21 TD)
              ((λ x : C,
                funextsec
                  (λ t : C,
                   ∏ y1 y2 : C,
                   C ⟦ x, t ⟧
                   → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x y1,
                       (pr11 TD) t y2 ⟧)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x0 : C → C → C,
                      ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
                      C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                      → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                        → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
                     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                     (pr21 TC) x) ((pr21 TD) x)
                  ((λ x0 : C,
                    funextsec
                      (λ t : C,
                       ∏ y2 : C,
                       C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
                       → C ⟦ t, y2 ⟧
                         → C ⟦ ... x t, ... x0 y2 ⟧)
                      (transportf
                         (λ x1 : C → C → C,
                          ∏ x2 x3 y1 y2 : C,
                          C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧ → ... → ...)
                         (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
                            te) (pr21 TC) x x0)
                      ((pr21 TD) x x0)
                      ((λ x1 : C,
                        funextsec (λ ..., ...)
                          (transportf ... ... ... x x0
                             x1) (... x x0 x1)
                          (... : ...))
                       :
                       transportf
                         (λ x1 : ..., ∏ ..., ...)
                         (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
                            te) (pr21 TC) x x0 ~
                       (pr21 TD) x x0))
                   :
                   transportf
                     (λ x0 : C → C → C,
                      ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
                      C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                      → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                        → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
                     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                     (pr21 TC) x ~ (pr21 TD) x))
               :
               transportf
                 (λ x : C → C → C,
                  ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
                  C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                    → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
                 (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                 (pr21 TC) ~ pr21 TD))) (pr2 TC))) =
pr22 TD

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
pr1
  (transportf tensor_ax
     (total2_paths_f (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
        (funextsec
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ x2 y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ t, x2 ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
              → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) t y1, (pr11 TD) x2 y2 ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ x : C → C → C,
               ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
               C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
               → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
              (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
              (pr21 TC)) (pr21 TD)
           ((λ x : C,
             funextsec
               (λ t : C,
                ∏ y1 y2 : C,
                C ⟦ x, t ⟧
                → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x y1, (pr11 TD) t y2
                    ⟧)
               (transportf
                  (λ x0 : C → C → C,
                   ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
                   C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                   → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
                  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                  (pr21 TC) x) ((pr21 TD) x)
               ((λ x0 : C,
                 funextsec
                   (λ t : C,
                    ∏ y2 : C,
                    C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
                    → C ⟦ t, y2 ⟧
                      → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x t,
                        (pr11 TD) x0 y2 ⟧)
                   (transportf
                      (λ x1 : C → C → C,
                       ∏ x2 x3 y1 y2 : C,
                       C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
                       → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                         → C ⟦ x1 x2 y1, x1 x3 y2 ⟧)
                      (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                      (pr21 TC) x x0) ((pr21 TD) x x0)
                   ((λ x1 : C,
                     funextsec
                       (λ t : C,
                        C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧ → ... → ...)
                       (transportf (λ ..., ...)
                          (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
                             te) (pr21 TC) x x0 x1)
                       ((pr21 TD) x x0 x1)
                       ((λ ..., ...)
                        :
                        transportf ... ... ... x x0 x1 ~
                        ... x x0 x1))
                    :
                    transportf
                      (λ x1 : C → C → C,
                       ∏ x2 x3 y1 y2 : C,
                       C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧ → ... → ...)
                      (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                      (pr21 TC) x x0 ~ (pr21 TD) x x0))
                :
                transportf
                  (λ x0 : C → C → C,
                   ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
                   C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                   → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
                  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                  (pr21 TC) x ~ (pr21 TD) x))
            :
            transportf
              (λ x : C → C → C,
               ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
               C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
               → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
              (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
              (pr21 TC) ~ pr21 TD))) (pr2 TC)) =
pr12 TD
 abstract (repeat (apply impred_isaprop ; intro) ;
        apply homset_property).
      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
te: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
transportf
  (λ _ : tensor_idax (pr1 TD), tensor_compax (pr1 TD))
  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq_subproof C TC TD te)
  (pr2
     (transportf tensor_ax
        (total2_paths_f
           (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
           (funextsec
              (λ t : C,
               ∏ x2 y1 y2 : C,
               C ⟦ t, x2 ⟧
               → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                 → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) t y1, (pr11 TD) x2 y2
                   ⟧)
              (transportf
                 (λ x : C → C → C,
                  ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
                  C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                    → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
                 (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                 (pr21 TC)) (pr21 TD)
              ((λ x : C,
                funextsec
                  (λ t : C,
                   ∏ y1 y2 : C,
                   C ⟦ x, t ⟧
                   → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x y1,
                       (pr11 TD) t y2 ⟧)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x0 : C → C → C,
                      ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
                      C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                      → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                        → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
                     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                     (pr21 TC) x) ((pr21 TD) x)
                  ((λ x0 : C,
                    funextsec
                      (λ t : C,
                       ∏ y2 : C,
                       C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
                       → C ⟦ t, y2 ⟧
                         → C ⟦ ... x t, ... x0 y2 ⟧)
                      (transportf
                         (λ x1 : C → C → C,
                          ∏ x2 x3 y1 y2 : C,
                          C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧ → ... → ...)
                         (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
                            te) (pr21 TC) x x0)
                      ((pr21 TD) x x0)
                      ((λ x1 : C,
                        funextsec (λ ..., ...)
                          (transportf ... ... ... x x0
                             x1) (... x x0 x1)
                          (... : ...))
                       :
                       transportf
                         (λ x1 : ..., ∏ ..., ...)
                         (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
                            te) (pr21 TC) x x0 ~
                       (pr21 TD) x x0))
                   :
                   transportf
                     (λ x0 : C → C → C,
                      ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
                      C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                      → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                        → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
                     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                     (pr21 TC) x ~ (pr21 TD) x))
               :
               transportf
                 (λ x : C → C → C,
                  ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
                  C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                    → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
                 (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD te)
                 (pr21 TC) ~ pr21 TD))) (pr2 TC))) =
pr22 TD
 abstract (repeat (apply impred_isaprop ; intro) ;
        apply homset_property).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pr11 TC = pr11 TD
→ ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
pr11 TC = pr11 TD
→ ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
p: pr11 TC = pr11 TD
x, y: C
x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y

    exact (toforallpaths _ _ _ (toforallpaths _ _ _ p x) y).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
TC = TD → ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
TC = TD → ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
p: TC = TD
∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
p: TC = TD
eqonob:= base_paths (pr1 TC) (pr1 TD)
  (base_paths TC TD p): pr11 TC = pr11 TD
∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y

    (* exact (toforallpaths _ _ _ (toforallpaths _ _ _ eqonob x) y). *)
    exact (id_tensor_eqi'''_2 TC TD eqonob).
  Defined.

  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TC = TD → tensor_eqi''' TC TD

  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TC = TD → tensor_eqi''' TC TD

    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: TC = TD
tensor_eqi''' TC TD

    (* induction p. *)
    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: TC = TD
∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: TC = TD
(λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
 ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
   (α x1 y1)
   (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
      (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g) ?pr1

    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: TC = TD
∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y
 exact (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p).

      (* induction p.
      apply idpath. *)
    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: TC = TD
(λ α : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
 ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
 transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
   (α x1 y1)
   (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
      (α x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p)
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: TC = TD
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) =
f ⊗^{ TD} g

      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC) x1 y1)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC) x2 y2)
     (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TC} g

      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC) x1 y1)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC) x2 y2)
     (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = ?b
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
?b = f ⊗^{ TC} g

      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC) x1 y1)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC) x2 y2)
     (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = ?b
 apply (! idpath_transportf _ _). 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
  (idpath (x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2))
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC) x1 y1)
     (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC) x2 y2)
        (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) = f ⊗^{ TC} g

      apply idpath_transportf.
  Defined.

  
A: UU
B: A → UU
x: ∑ y : A, B y
total2_paths_f (idpath (pr1 x))
  (idpath_transportf B (pr2 x)) = idpath x

  
A: UU
B: A → UU
x: ∑ y : A, B y
total2_paths_f (idpath (pr1 x))
  (idpath_transportf B (pr2 x)) = idpath x

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: UU
B: A → UU
x: ∑ y : A, B y
p0: pr1 x = pr1 x
p1: transportf B p0 (pr2 x) = pr2 x
q0: pr1 x = pr1 x
q1: transportf B q0 (pr2 x) = pr2 x
p0 = q0
→ (∏ a : A, isaset (B a))
  → total2_paths_f p0 p1 = total2_paths_f q0 q1

  
A: UU
B: A → UU
x: ∑ y : A, B y
p0: pr1 x = pr1 x
p1: transportf B p0 (pr2 x) = pr2 x
q0: pr1 x = pr1 x
q1: transportf B q0 (pr2 x) = pr2 x
p0 = q0
→ (∏ a : A, isaset (B a))
  → total2_paths_f p0 p1 = total2_paths_f q0 q1

    
A: UU
B: A → UU
x: ∑ y : A, B y
p0: pr1 x = pr1 x
p1: transportf B p0 (pr2 x) = pr2 x
q0: pr1 x = pr1 x
q1: transportf B q0 (pr2 x) = pr2 x
k0: p0 = q0
(∏ a : A, isaset (B a))
→ total2_paths_f p0 p1 = total2_paths_f q0 q1

    
A: UU
B: A → UU
x: ∑ y : A, B y
p0: pr1 x = pr1 x
p1, q1: transportf B p0 (pr2 x) = pr2 x
(∏ a : A, isaset (B a))
→ total2_paths_f p0 p1 = total2_paths_f p0 q1

    
A: UU
B: A → UU
x: ∑ y : A, B y
p0: pr1 x = pr1 x
p1, q1: transportf B p0 (pr2 x) = pr2 x
pfset: ∏ a : A, isaset (B a)
total2_paths_f p0 p1 = total2_paths_f p0 q1

    
A: UU
B: A → UU
x: ∑ y : A, B y
p0: pr1 x = pr1 x
p1, q1: transportf B p0 (pr2 x) = pr2 x
pfset: ∏ a : A, isaset (B a)
p1 = q1

    apply pfset.
  Qed.

  
A, B: UU
a: A
b: B
f: A → B
g: B → A
(∏ b0 : B, f (g b0) = b0) → g (f a) = g b → f a = b

  
A, B: UU
a: A
b: B
f: A → B
g: B → A
(∏ b0 : B, f (g b0) = b0) → g (f a) = g b → f a = b

    
A, B: UU
a: A
b: B
f: A → B
g: B → A
i: ∏ b0 : B, f (g b0) = b0
e: g (f a) = g b
f a = b

    
A, B: UU
a: A
b: B
f: A → B
g: B → A
i: ∏ b0 : B, f (g b0) = b0
e: g (f a) = g b
k0:= ! i (f a): f a = f (g (f a))
f a = b

    
A, B: UU
a: A
b: B
f: A → B
g: B → A
i: ∏ b0 : B, f (g b0) = b0
e: g (f a) = g b
k0: f a = f (g b)
f a = b

    exact (k0 @ i b).
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
∏ x : C,
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
  (funextsec (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
     (λ x0 : C, idpath (T x x0))) =
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T (idpath T) x)

  
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
∏ x : C,
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
  (funextsec (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
     (λ x0 : C, idpath (T x x0))) =
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T (idpath T) x)

    
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
x: C
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
  (funextsec (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
     (λ x0 : C, idpath (T x x0))) =
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T (idpath T) x)

    
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
x: C
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
  (funextsec (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
     (λ x0 : C, idpath (T x x0))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
x: C
?b =
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T (idpath T) x)
 
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
x: C
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
  (funextsec (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
     (λ x0 : C, idpath (T x x0))) = ?b

      apply toforallpaths_funextsec.
    
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
x: C
(λ x0 : C, idpath (T x x0)) =
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T (idpath T) x)

    
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
x, y: C
idpath (T x y) =
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T (idpath T) x) y

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T
  (funextsec (λ _ : C, C → C) T T
     (λ x : C,
      funextsec (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
        (λ x0 : C, idpath (T x x0)))) =
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T (idpath T)

  
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C

  (funextsec (λ _ : C, C → C) T T
     (λ x : C,
      funextsec (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
        (λ x0 : C, idpath (T x x0)))) =
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T (idpath T)

    
C: univalent_category

     (λ x : C,

        (λ x0 : C, idpath (T x x0)))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
?b = toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T (idpath T)

     (λ x : C,

        (λ x0 : C, idpath (T x x0)))) = ?b

C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
(λ x : C,
 funextsec (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
   (λ x0 : C, idpath (T x x0))) =

C: univalent_category

x: C
funextsec (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
  (λ x0 : C, idpath (T x x0)) =
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T (idpath T) x

    
C: univalent_category

x: C
∏ b0 : T x = T x,
funextsec (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x) b0) = b0
C: univalent_category

x: C
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
  (funextsec (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
     (λ x0 : C, idpath (T x x0))) =
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T (idpath T) x)

    
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
x: C
∏ b0 : T x = T x,
funextsec (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x) b0) = b0
 
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
x: C
q: T x = T x
funextsec (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x) q) = q

      apply funextsec_toforallpaths.
    
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
x: C
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
  (funextsec (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
     (λ x0 : C, idpath (T x x0))) =
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T (idpath T) x)
 apply funextsec_id''.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
funextsec (λ _ : C, C → C) T T
  (λ x : C,
   funextsec (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
     (λ x0 : C, idpath (T x x0))) = idpath T

  
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
funextsec (λ _ : C, C → C) T T
  (λ x : C,
   funextsec (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
     (λ x0 : C, idpath (T x x0))) = idpath T

    
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
∏ b0 : T = T,
funextsec (λ _ : C, C → C) T T
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T b0) = b0
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T
  (funextsec (λ _ : C, C → C) T T
     (λ x : C,
      funextsec (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
        (λ x0 : C, idpath (T x x0)))) =
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T (idpath T)

    
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
∏ b0 : T = T,
funextsec (λ _ : C, C → C) T T
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T b0) = b0
 
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
q: T = T
funextsec (λ _ : C, C → C) T T
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T q) = q

      apply funextsec_toforallpaths.
    
C: univalent_category
T: C → C → C
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T
  (funextsec (λ _ : C, C → C) T T
     (λ x : C,
      funextsec (λ _ : C, C) (T x) (T x)
        (λ x0 : C, idpath (T x x0)))) =
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) T T (idpath T)
 apply funextsec_id'.
  Qed.

  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: TC = TD
tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD p) =
p

  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: TC = TD
tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD p) =
p

    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: TC = TD
total2_paths_f
  (total2_paths_f
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
        (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD p))
     (funextsec
        (λ t : C,
         ∏ x2 y1 y2 : C,
         C ⟦ t, x2 ⟧
         → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
           → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) t y1, (pr11 TD) x2 y2 ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ x : C → C → C,
            ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
           (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
              (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD p)) (pr21 TC))
        (pr21 TD)
        (λ x : C,
         funextsec
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x, t ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
              → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x y1, (pr11 TD) t y2 ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ x0 : C → C → C,
               ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
               C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
               → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                 → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
              (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
                 (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD p)) (pr21 TC)
              x) ((pr21 TD) x)
           (λ x0 : C,
            funextsec
              (λ t : C,
               ∏ y2 : C,
               C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
               → C ⟦ t, y2 ⟧
                 → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x t, (pr11 TD) x0 y2
                   ⟧)
              (transportf
                 (λ x1 : C → C → C,
                  ∏ x2 x3 y1 y2 : C,
                  C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                    → C ⟦ x1 x2 y1, x1 x3 y2 ⟧)
                 (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
                    (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD p))
                 (pr21 TC) x x0) ((pr21 TD) x x0)
              (λ x1 : C,
               funextsec
                 (λ t : C,
                  C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ x1, t ⟧
                    → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x x1,
                      (pr11 TD) x0 t ⟧)
                 (transportf
                    (λ x2 : C → C → C,
                     ∏ x3 x4 y1 y2 : C,
                     C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                       → C ⟦ x2 x3 y1, x2 x4 y2 ⟧)
                    (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
                       (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD p))
                    (pr21 TC) x x0 x1)
                 ((pr21 TD) x x0 x1)
                 (λ x2 : C,
                  funextsec
                    (λ _ : C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                     C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x x1,
                       (pr11 TD) x0 x2 ⟧)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x3 : C → C → C,
                        ∏ x4 x5 y1 y2 : C,
                        C ⟦ x4, x5 ⟧
                        → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                          → C ⟦ x3 x4 y1, x3 x5 y2 ⟧)
                       (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
                          (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD p))
                       (pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2)
                    ((pr21 TD) x x0 x1 x2)
                    (λ x3 : C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                     funextsec
                       (λ _ : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧,
                        C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x x1,
                        (pr11 TD) x0 x2 ⟧)
                       (transportf
                          (λ x4 : C → ...,
                           ∏ x5 x6 y1 y2 : C,
                           ... → ...)
                          (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
                             (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD p))
                          (pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2 x3)
                       ((pr21 TD) x x0 x1 x2 x3)
                       (λ x4 : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧,
                        (transport_of_bifunctor_map_is_pointwise
                           ... ... x3 x4 @
                         internal_paths_rew_r ... ...
                           ... ... ... ...) @
                        pr2 (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD p)
                          x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4))))))))
  (total2_paths_f
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq_subproof C TC TD
        (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD p))
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq_subproof0 C TC TD
        (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD p))) = p

    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: TC = TD
total2_paths_f
  (total2_paths_f
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p,,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
            (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
             (p : TC = TD),
             transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
               (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
                  (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
            (! idpath_transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x : C,
                        C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                       (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
             idpath_transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
               (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TD p)))
     (funextsec
        (λ t : C,
         ∏ x2 y1 y2 : C,
         C ⟦ t, x2 ⟧
         → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
           → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) t y1, (pr11 TD) x2 y2 ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ x : C → C → C,
            ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
           (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
              (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p,,
               (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                paths_rect
                  (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
                  (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                   (p : TC = TD),
                   transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
                     (transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2
                           y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) =
                   f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                  (! idpath_transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms
                          (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                       (transportf
                          (λ x : C,
                           C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                             (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                          (transportf
                             (λ x : C,
                              C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                             (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                                (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                             (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
                   idpath_transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)) (f ⊗^{ TC} g))
                  TD p))) (pr21 TC)) (pr21 TD)
        (λ x : C,
         funextsec
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x, t ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
              → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x y1, (pr11 TD) t y2 ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ x0 : C → C → C,
               ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
               C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
               → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                 → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
              (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
                 (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p,,
                  (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                   (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                   paths_rect
                     (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
                     (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
                                C) (p : TC = TD),
                      transportf
                        (λ x0 : C,
                         C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1
                           y1)
                        (transportf
                           (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ ..., x0 ⟧)
                           (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p
                              x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) =
                      f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                     (! idpath_transportf
                          (precategory_morphisms
                             (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                          (transportf
                             (λ x0 : C,
                              C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                             (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                                (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                             (transportf (λ ..., ...)
                                (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC
                                   TC ... x2 y2)
                                (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
                      idpath_transportf
                        (precategory_morphisms
                           (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                        (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TD p)))
              (pr21 TC) x) ((pr21 TD) x)
           (λ x0 : C,
            funextsec
              (λ t : C,
               ∏ y2 : C,
               C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
               → C ⟦ t, y2 ⟧
                 → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x t, (pr11 TD) x0 y2
                   ⟧)
              (transportf
                 (λ x1 : C → C → C,
                  ∏ x2 x3 y1 y2 : C,
                  C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                    → C ⟦ x1 x2 y1, x1 x3 y2 ⟧)
                 (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p,,
                     (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                      (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                      (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                      paths_rect
                        (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                        TC
                        (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
                                   C) (p : TC = TD),
                         transportf (λ ..., ...)
                           (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p
                              x1 y1)
                           (transportf ... ... ...) =
                         f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                        (! idpath_transportf
                             (precategory_morphisms
                                (...))
                             (transportf (...) (...)
                                (...)) @
                         idpath_transportf
                           (precategory_morphisms
                              (...)) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TD
                        p))) (pr21 TC) x x0)
              ((pr21 TD) x x0)
              (λ x1 : C,
               funextsec
                 (λ t : C,
                  C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ x1, t ⟧
                    → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x x1,
                      (pr11 TD) x0 t ⟧)
                 (transportf
                    (λ x2 : C → C → C,
                     ∏ x3 x4 y1 y2 : C,
                     C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                       → C ⟦ x2 x3 y1, x2 x4 y2 ⟧)
                    (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p,,
                        (λ (x2 x3 y1 y2 : C)
                         (f : C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧)
                         (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                         paths_rect
                           (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                           TC
                           (λ (TD : ...) (p : ...),
                            ... = ...)
                           (! idpath_transportf ...
                                ... @
                            idpath_transportf ... ...)
                           TD p))) (pr21 TC) x x0 x1)
                 ((pr21 TD) x x0 x1)
                 (λ x2 : C,
                  funextsec
                    (λ _ : C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                     C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x x1,
                       (pr11 TD) x0 x2 ⟧)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x3 : C → C → C,
                        ∏ x4 x5 y1 y2 : C,
                        C ⟦ x4, x5 ⟧
                        → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                          → C ⟦ x3 x4 y1, x3 x5 y2 ⟧)
                       (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p,,
                           (λ (x3 x4 y1 y2 : C)
                            (f : ...) (g : ...),
                            paths_rect ... TC ... ...
                              TD p))) (pr21 TC) x x0
                       x1 x2) ((pr21 TD) x x0 x1 x2)
                    (λ x3 : C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                     funextsec
                       (λ _ : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧,
                        C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x x1,
                        (pr11 TD) x0 x2 ⟧)
                       (transportf
                          (λ x4 : C → ...,
                           ∏ x5 x6 y1 y2 : C,
                           ... → ...)
                          (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD
                             (...,, ...)) (pr21 TC) x
                          x0 x1 x2 x3)
                       ((pr21 TD) x x0 x1 x2 x3)
                       (λ x4 : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧,
                        (transport_of_bifunctor_map_is_pointwise
                           ... ... x3 x4 @
                         internal_paths_rew_r ... ...
                           ... ... ... ...) @
                        pr2 (...,, ...) x x0 x1 x2 x3
                          x4))))))))
  (total2_paths_f
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq_subproof C TC TD
        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p,,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
            (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
             (p : TC = TD),
             transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
               (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
                  (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
            (! idpath_transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x : C,
                        C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                       (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
             idpath_transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
               (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TD p)))
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq_subproof0 C TC TD
        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p,,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
            (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
             (p : TC = TD),
             transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
               (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
                  (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
            (! idpath_transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x : C,
                        C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                       (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
             idpath_transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
               (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TD p)))) = p

    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
total2_paths_f
  (total2_paths_f
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
            (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
             (p : TC = TD),
             transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
               (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
                  (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
            (! idpath_transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x : C,
                        C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                       (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
             idpath_transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
               (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))
     (funextsec
        (λ t : C,
         ∏ x2 y1 y2 : C,
         C ⟦ t, x2 ⟧
         → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
           → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) t y1, (pr11 TC) x2 y2 ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ x : C → C → C,
            ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
           (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
              (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
               (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                paths_rect
                  (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
                  (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                   (p : TC = TD),
                   transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
                     (transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2
                           y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) =
                   f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                  (! idpath_transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms
                          (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                       (transportf
                          (λ x : C,
                           C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                             (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                          (transportf
                             (λ x : C,
                              C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                             (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                                (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                             (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
                   idpath_transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)) (f ⊗^{ TC} g))
                  TC (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC))
        (pr21 TC)
        (λ x : C,
         funextsec
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x, t ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
              → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x y1, (pr11 TC) t y2 ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ x0 : C → C → C,
               ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
               C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
               → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                 → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
              (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                 (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
                  (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                   (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                   paths_rect
                     (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
                     (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
                                C) (p : TC = TD),
                      transportf
                        (λ x0 : C,
                         C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1
                           y1)
                        (transportf
                           (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ ..., x0 ⟧)
                           (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p
                              x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) =
                      f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                     (! idpath_transportf
                          (precategory_morphisms
                             (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                          (transportf
                             (λ x0 : C,
                              C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                             (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                                (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                             (transportf (λ ..., ...)
                                (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC
                                   TC ... x2 y2)
                                (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
                      idpath_transportf
                        (precategory_morphisms
                           (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                        (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))
              (pr21 TC) x) ((pr21 TC) x)
           (λ x0 : C,
            funextsec
              (λ t : C,
               ∏ y2 : C,
               C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
               → C ⟦ t, y2 ⟧
                 → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x t, (pr11 TC) x0 y2
                   ⟧)
              (transportf
                 (λ x1 : C → C → C,
                  ∏ x2 x3 y1 y2 : C,
                  C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                    → C ⟦ x1 x2 y1, x1 x3 y2 ⟧)
                 (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC),,
                     (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                      (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                      (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                      paths_rect
                        (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                        TC
                        (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
                                   C) (p : TC = TD),
                         transportf (λ ..., ...)
                           (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p
                              x1 y1)
                           (transportf ... ... ...) =
                         f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                        (! idpath_transportf
                             (precategory_morphisms
                                (...))
                             (transportf (...) (...)
                                (...)) @
                         idpath_transportf
                           (precategory_morphisms
                              (...)) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC
                        (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC) x x0)
              ((pr21 TC) x x0)
              (λ x1 : C,
               funextsec
                 (λ t : C,
                  C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ x1, t ⟧
                    → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1,
                      (pr11 TC) x0 t ⟧)
                 (transportf
                    (λ x2 : C → C → C,
                     ∏ x3 x4 y1 y2 : C,
                     C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                       → C ⟦ x2 x3 y1, x2 x4 y2 ⟧)
                    (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC),,
                        (λ (x2 x3 y1 y2 : C)
                         (f : C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧)
                         (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                         paths_rect
                           (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                           TC
                           (λ (TD : ...) (p : ...),
                            ... = ...)
                           (! idpath_transportf ...
                                ... @
                            idpath_transportf ... ...)
                           TC (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC)
                    x x0 x1) ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1)
                 (λ x2 : C,
                  funextsec
                    (λ _ : C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                     C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1,
                       (pr11 TC) x0 x2 ⟧)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x3 : C → C → C,
                        ∏ x4 x5 y1 y2 : C,
                        C ⟦ x4, x5 ⟧
                        → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                          → C ⟦ x3 x4 y1, x3 x5 y2 ⟧)
                       (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                             (idpath TC),,
                           (λ (x3 x4 y1 y2 : C)
                            (f : ...) (g : ...),
                            paths_rect ... TC ... ...
                              TC ...))) (pr21 TC) x x0
                       x1 x2) ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2)
                    (λ x3 : C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                     funextsec
                       (λ _ : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧,
                        C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1,
                        (pr11 TC) x0 x2 ⟧)
                       (transportf
                          (λ x4 : C → ...,
                           ∏ x5 x6 y1 y2 : C,
                           ... → ...)
                          (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                             (...,, ...)) (pr21 TC) x
                          x0 x1 x2 x3)
                       ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2 x3)
                       (λ x4 : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧,
                        (transport_of_bifunctor_map_is_pointwise
                           ... ... x3 x4 @
                         internal_paths_rew_r ... ...
                           ... ... ... ...) @
                        pr2 (...,, ...) x x0 x1 x2 x3
                          x4))))))))
  (total2_paths_f
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq_subproof C TC TC
        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
            (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
             (p : TC = TD),
             transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
               (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
                  (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
            (! idpath_transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x : C,
                        C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                       (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
             idpath_transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
               (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq_subproof0 C TC TC
        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
            (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
             (p : TC = TD),
             transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
               (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
                  (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
            (! idpath_transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x : C,
                        C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                       (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
             idpath_transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
               (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))) =
idpath TC

    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TC = TC
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
total2_paths_f
  (total2_paths_f
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
            (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
             (p : TC = TD),
             transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
               (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
                  (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
            (! idpath_transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x : C,
                        C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                       (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
             idpath_transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
               (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))
     (funextsec
        (λ t : C,
         ∏ x2 y1 y2 : C,
         C ⟦ t, x2 ⟧
         → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
           → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) t y1, (pr11 TC) x2 y2 ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ x : C → C → C,
            ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
           (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
              (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
               (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                paths_rect
                  (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
                  (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                   (p : TC = TD),
                   transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
                     (transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2
                           y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) =
                   f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                  (! idpath_transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms
                          (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                       (transportf
                          (λ x : C,
                           C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                             (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                          (transportf
                             (λ x : C,
                              C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                             (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                                (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                             (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
                   idpath_transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)) (f ⊗^{ TC} g))
                  TC (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC))
        (pr21 TC)
        (λ x : C,
         funextsec
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x, t ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
              → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x y1, (pr11 TC) t y2 ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ x0 : C → C → C,
               ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
               C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
               → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                 → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
              (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                 (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
                  (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                   (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                   paths_rect
                     (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
                     (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
                                C) (p : TC = TD),
                      transportf
                        (λ x0 : C,
                         C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1
                           y1)
                        (transportf
                           (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ ..., x0 ⟧)
                           (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p
                              x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) =
                      f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                     (! idpath_transportf
                          (precategory_morphisms
                             (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                          (transportf
                             (λ x0 : C,
                              C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                             (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                                (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                             (transportf (λ ..., ...)
                                (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC
                                   TC ... x2 y2)
                                (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
                      idpath_transportf
                        (precategory_morphisms
                           (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                        (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))
              (pr21 TC) x) ((pr21 TC) x)
           (λ x0 : C,
            funextsec
              (λ t : C,
               ∏ y2 : C,
               C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
               → C ⟦ t, y2 ⟧
                 → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x t, (pr11 TC) x0 y2
                   ⟧)
              (transportf
                 (λ x1 : C → C → C,
                  ∏ x2 x3 y1 y2 : C,
                  C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                    → C ⟦ x1 x2 y1, x1 x3 y2 ⟧)
                 (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC),,
                     (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                      (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                      (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                      paths_rect
                        (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                        TC
                        (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
                                   C) (p : TC = TD),
                         transportf (λ ..., ...)
                           (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p
                              x1 y1)
                           (transportf ... ... ...) =
                         f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                        (! idpath_transportf
                             (precategory_morphisms
                                (...))
                             (transportf (...) (...)
                                (...)) @
                         idpath_transportf
                           (precategory_morphisms
                              (...)) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC
                        (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC) x x0)
              ((pr21 TC) x x0)
              (λ x1 : C,
               funextsec
                 (λ t : C,
                  C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ x1, t ⟧
                    → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1,
                      (pr11 TC) x0 t ⟧)
                 (transportf
                    (λ x2 : C → C → C,
                     ∏ x3 x4 y1 y2 : C,
                     C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                       → C ⟦ x2 x3 y1, x2 x4 y2 ⟧)
                    (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC),,
                        (λ (x2 x3 y1 y2 : C)
                         (f : C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧)
                         (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                         paths_rect
                           (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                           TC
                           (λ (TD : ...) (p : ...),
                            ... = ...)
                           (! idpath_transportf ...
                                ... @
                            idpath_transportf ... ...)
                           TC (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC)
                    x x0 x1) ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1)
                 (λ x2 : C,
                  funextsec
                    (λ _ : C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                     C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1,
                       (pr11 TC) x0 x2 ⟧)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x3 : C → C → C,
                        ∏ x4 x5 y1 y2 : C,
                        C ⟦ x4, x5 ⟧
                        → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                          → C ⟦ x3 x4 y1, x3 x5 y2 ⟧)
                       (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                             (idpath TC),,
                           (λ (x3 x4 y1 y2 : C)
                            (f : ...) (g : ...),
                            paths_rect ... TC ... ...
                              TC ...))) (pr21 TC) x x0
                       x1 x2) ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2)
                    (λ x3 : C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                     funextsec
                       (λ _ : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧,
                        C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1,
                        (pr11 TC) x0 x2 ⟧)
                       (transportf
                          (λ x4 : C → ...,
                           ∏ x5 x6 y1 y2 : C,
                           ... → ...)
                          (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                             (...,, ...)) (pr21 TC) x
                          x0 x1 x2 x3)
                       ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2 x3)
                       (λ x4 : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧,
                        (transport_of_bifunctor_map_is_pointwise
                           ... ... x3 x4 @
                         internal_paths_rew_r ... ...
                           ... ... ... ...) @
                        pr2 (...,, ...) x x0 x1 x2 x3
                          x4))))))))
  (total2_paths_f
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq_subproof C TC TC
        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
            (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
             (p : TC = TD),
             transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
               (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
                  (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
            (! idpath_transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x : C,
                        C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                       (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
             idpath_transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
               (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq_subproof0 C TC TC
        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
            (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
             (p : TC = TD),
             transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
               (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
                  (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
            (! idpath_transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x : C,
                        C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                       (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
             idpath_transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
               (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))) = 
?b
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
?b = idpath TC

    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
total2_paths_f
  (total2_paths_f
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
            (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
             (p : TC = TD),
             transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
               (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
                  (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
            (! idpath_transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x : C,
                        C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                       (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
             idpath_transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
               (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))
     (funextsec
        (λ t : C,
         ∏ x2 y1 y2 : C,
         C ⟦ t, x2 ⟧
         → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
           → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) t y1, (pr11 TC) x2 y2 ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ x : C → C → C,
            ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
           (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
              (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
               (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                paths_rect
                  (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
                  (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                   (p : TC = TD),
                   transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
                     (transportf
                        (λ x : C,
                         C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2
                           y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) =
                   f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                  (! idpath_transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms
                          (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                       (transportf
                          (λ x : C,
                           C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                             (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                          (transportf
                             (λ x : C,
                              C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                             (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                                (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                             (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
                   idpath_transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)) (f ⊗^{ TC} g))
                  TC (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC))
        (pr21 TC)
        (λ x : C,
         funextsec
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x, t ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
              → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x y1, (pr11 TC) t y2 ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ x0 : C → C → C,
               ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
               C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
               → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                 → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
              (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                 (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
                  (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                   (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                   paths_rect
                     (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
                     (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
                                C) (p : TC = TD),
                      transportf
                        (λ x0 : C,
                         C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1
                           y1)
                        (transportf
                           (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ ..., x0 ⟧)
                           (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p
                              x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) =
                      f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                     (! idpath_transportf
                          (precategory_morphisms
                             (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                          (transportf
                             (λ x0 : C,
                              C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                             (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                                (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                             (transportf (λ ..., ...)
                                (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC
                                   TC ... x2 y2)
                                (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
                      idpath_transportf
                        (precategory_morphisms
                           (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                        (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))
              (pr21 TC) x) ((pr21 TC) x)
           (λ x0 : C,
            funextsec
              (λ t : C,
               ∏ y2 : C,
               C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
               → C ⟦ t, y2 ⟧
                 → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x t, (pr11 TC) x0 y2
                   ⟧)
              (transportf
                 (λ x1 : C → C → C,
                  ∏ x2 x3 y1 y2 : C,
                  C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                    → C ⟦ x1 x2 y1, x1 x3 y2 ⟧)
                 (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC),,
                     (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                      (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                      (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                      paths_rect
                        (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                        TC
                        (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
                                   C) (p : TC = TD),
                         transportf (λ ..., ...)
                           (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p
                              x1 y1)
                           (transportf ... ... ...) =
                         f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                        (! idpath_transportf
                             (precategory_morphisms
                                (...))
                             (transportf (...) (...)
                                (...)) @
                         idpath_transportf
                           (precategory_morphisms
                              (...)) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC
                        (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC) x x0)
              ((pr21 TC) x x0)
              (λ x1 : C,
               funextsec
                 (λ t : C,
                  C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ x1, t ⟧
                    → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1,
                      (pr11 TC) x0 t ⟧)
                 (transportf
                    (λ x2 : C → C → C,
                     ∏ x3 x4 y1 y2 : C,
                     C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                       → C ⟦ x2 x3 y1, x2 x4 y2 ⟧)
                    (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC),,
                        (λ (x2 x3 y1 y2 : C)
                         (f : C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧)
                         (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                         paths_rect
                           (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                           TC
                           (λ (TD : ...) (p : ...),
                            ... = ...)
                           (! idpath_transportf ...
                                ... @
                            idpath_transportf ... ...)
                           TC (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC)
                    x x0 x1) ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1)
                 (λ x2 : C,
                  funextsec
                    (λ _ : C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                     C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1,
                       (pr11 TC) x0 x2 ⟧)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x3 : C → C → C,
                        ∏ x4 x5 y1 y2 : C,
                        C ⟦ x4, x5 ⟧
                        → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                          → C ⟦ x3 x4 y1, x3 x5 y2 ⟧)
                       (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                             (idpath TC),,
                           (λ (x3 x4 y1 y2 : C)
                            (f : ...) (g : ...),
                            paths_rect ... TC ... ...
                              TC ...))) (pr21 TC) x x0
                       x1 x2) ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2)
                    (λ x3 : C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                     funextsec
                       (λ _ : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧,
                        C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1,
                        (pr11 TC) x0 x2 ⟧)
                       (transportf
                          (λ x4 : C → ...,
                           ∏ x5 x6 y1 y2 : C,
                           ... → ...)
                          (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                             (...,, ...)) (pr21 TC) x
                          x0 x1 x2 x3)
                       ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2 x3)
                       (λ x4 : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧,
                        (transport_of_bifunctor_map_is_pointwise
                           ... ... x3 x4 @
                         internal_paths_rew_r ... ...
                           ... ... ... ...) @
                        pr2 (...,, ...) x x0 x1 x2 x3
                          x4))))))))
  (total2_paths_f
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq_subproof C TC TC
        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
            (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
             (p : TC = TD),
             transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
               (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
                  (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
            (! idpath_transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x : C,
                        C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                       (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
             idpath_transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
               (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq_subproof0 C TC TC
        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
         (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
          paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
            (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
             (p : TC = TD),
             transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
               (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
               (transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
                  (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
            (! idpath_transportf
                 (precategory_morphisms
                    (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x : C,
                        C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                       (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
             idpath_transportf
               (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
               (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))) =
total2_paths_f (idpath (pr1 TC))
  (idpath_transportf tensor_ax (pr2 TC))


    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
total2_paths_f
  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
      (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
       (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
       paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
         (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
          (p : TC = TD),
          transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
            (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
               (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
               (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
         (! idpath_transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
              (transportf
                 (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                 (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC)
                    x1 y1)
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                    (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
          idpath_transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
            (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))
  (funextsec
     (λ t : C,
      ∏ x2 y1 y2 : C,
      C ⟦ t, x2 ⟧
      → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
        → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) t y1, (pr11 TC) x2 y2 ⟧)
     (transportf
        (λ x : C → C → C,
         ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
         C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
         → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
        (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
           (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
