            (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
             (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
             paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
               TC
               (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                (p : TC = TD),
                transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
                     (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
               (! idpath_transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms
                       (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                    (transportf
                       (λ x : C,
                        C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                       (transportf
                          (λ x : C,
                           C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                             (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                          (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
                idpath_transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)) (f ⊗^{ TC} g))
               TC (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC)) (pr21 TC)
     (λ x : C,
      funextsec
        (λ t : C,
         ∏ y1 y2 : C,
         C ⟦ x, t ⟧
         → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
           → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x y1, (pr11 TC) t y2 ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ x0 : C → C → C,
            ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
           (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
              (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
               (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                paths_rect
                  (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
                  (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                   (p : TC = TD),
                   transportf
                     (λ x0 : C,
                      C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
                     (transportf
                        (λ x0 : C,
                         C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x0 ⟧)
                        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2
                           y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) =
                   f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                  (! idpath_transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms
                          (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                       (transportf
                          (λ x0 : C,
                           C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                             (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                          (transportf
                             (λ x0 : C,
                              C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x0 ⟧)
                             (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                                (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                             (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
                   idpath_transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)) (f ⊗^{ TC} g))
                  TC (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC) x)
        ((pr21 TC) x)
        (λ x0 : C,
         funextsec
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
            → C ⟦ t, y2 ⟧
              → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x t, (pr11 TC) x0 y2 ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ x1 : C → C → C,
               ∏ x2 x3 y1 y2 : C,
               C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
               → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                 → C ⟦ x1 x2 y1, x1 x3 y2 ⟧)
              (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                 (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
                  (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                   (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                   paths_rect
                     (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
                     (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
                                C) (p : TC = TD),
                      transportf
                        (λ x3 : C,
                         C ⟦ x3, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1
                           y1)
                        (transportf (λ ..., ...)
                           (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p
                              x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) =
                      f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                     (! idpath_transportf
                          (precategory_morphisms
                             (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                          (transportf
                             (λ x3 : C, C ⟦ x3, ... ⟧)
                             (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                                (...) x1 y1)
                             (transportf (...) (...)
                                (...))) @
                      idpath_transportf
                        (precategory_morphisms
                           (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                        (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))
              (pr21 TC) x x0) ((pr21 TC) x x0)
           (λ x1 : C,
            funextsec
              (λ t : C,
               C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
               → C ⟦ x1, t ⟧
                 → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1, (pr11 TC) x0 t
                   ⟧)
              (transportf
                 (λ x2 : C → C → C,
                  ∏ x3 x4 y1 y2 : C,
                  C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                    → C ⟦ x2 x3 y1, x2 x4 y2 ⟧)
                 (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC),,
                     (λ (x2 x3 y1 y2 : C)
                      (f : C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧)
                      (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                      paths_rect
                        (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                        TC
                        (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
                                   C) (p : TC = TD),
                         transportf (...) (...) (...) =
                         f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                        (! idpath_transportf
                             (precategory_morphisms
                                ...)
                             (transportf ... ... ...) @
                         idpath_transportf
                           (precategory_morphisms ...)
                           (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC
                        (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC) x x0
                 x1) ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1)
              (λ x2 : C,
               funextsec
                 (λ _ : C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1,
                    (pr11 TC) x0 x2 ⟧)
                 (transportf
                    (λ x3 : C → C → C,
                     ∏ x4 x5 y1 y2 : C,
                     C ⟦ x4, x5 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                       → C ⟦ x3 x4 y1, x3 x5 y2 ⟧)
                    (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC),,
                        (λ (x3 x4 y1 y2 : C)
                         (f : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                         (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                         paths_rect
                           (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                           TC (λ ... ..., ...)
                           (! ... @ ...) TC
                           (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC) x
                    x0 x1 x2) ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2)
                 (λ x3 : C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  funextsec
                    (λ _ : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧,
                     C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1,
                     (pr11 TC) x0 x2 ⟧)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x4 : C → C → C,
                        ∏ x5 x6 y1 y2 : C,
                        C ⟦ x5, x6 ⟧
                        → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                          → C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                       (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                             (...),,
                           (λ ... ... ..., ...)))
                       (pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2 x3)
                    ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2 x3)
                    (λ x4 : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧,
                     (transport_of_bifunctor_map_is_pointwise
                        (pr21 TC)
                        (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                           ...) x3 x4 @
                      internal_paths_rew_r
                        (pr11 TC ~ pr11 TC)
                        (toforallpaths ... ... ... ...)
                        (λ ..., ...) (λ ..., ...)
                        (internal_paths_rew_r ... ...
                           ... ... ... ...)
                        (toforallpaths_funextsec ...)) @
                     pr2
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (...),,
                        (λ ... ... ..., ...)) x x0 x1
                       x2 x3 x4))))))) =
idpath (pr1 TC)
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
∏ a : tensor_data C, isaset (tensor_ax a)

    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
total2_paths_f
  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
      (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
       (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
       paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
         (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
          (p : TC = TD),
          transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
            (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
               (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
               (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
         (! idpath_transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
              (transportf
                 (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                 (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC)
                    x1 y1)
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                    (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
          idpath_transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
            (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))
  (funextsec
     (λ t : C,
      ∏ x2 y1 y2 : C,
      C ⟦ t, x2 ⟧
      → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
        → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) t y1, (pr11 TC) x2 y2 ⟧)
     (transportf
        (λ x : C → C → C,
         ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
         C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
         → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
        (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
           (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
            (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
             (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
             paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
               TC
               (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                (p : TC = TD),
                transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
                     (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
               (! idpath_transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms
                       (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                    (transportf
                       (λ x : C,
                        C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                       (transportf
                          (λ x : C,
                           C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                             (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                          (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
                idpath_transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)) (f ⊗^{ TC} g))
               TC (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC)) (pr21 TC)
     (λ x : C,
      funextsec
        (λ t : C,
         ∏ y1 y2 : C,
         C ⟦ x, t ⟧
         → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
           → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x y1, (pr11 TC) t y2 ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ x0 : C → C → C,
            ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
           (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
              (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
               (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                paths_rect
                  (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
                  (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                   (p : TC = TD),
                   transportf
                     (λ x0 : C,
                      C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
                     (transportf
                        (λ x0 : C,
                         C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x0 ⟧)
                        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2
                           y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) =
                   f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                  (! idpath_transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms
                          (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                       (transportf
                          (λ x0 : C,
                           C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                             (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                          (transportf
                             (λ x0 : C,
                              C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x0 ⟧)
                             (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                                (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                             (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
                   idpath_transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)) (f ⊗^{ TC} g))
                  TC (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC) x)
        ((pr21 TC) x)
        (λ x0 : C,
         funextsec
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
            → C ⟦ t, y2 ⟧
              → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x t, (pr11 TC) x0 y2 ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ x1 : C → C → C,
               ∏ x2 x3 y1 y2 : C,
               C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
               → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                 → C ⟦ x1 x2 y1, x1 x3 y2 ⟧)
              (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                 (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
                  (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                   (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                   paths_rect
                     (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
                     (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
                                C) (p : TC = TD),
                      transportf
                        (λ x3 : C,
                         C ⟦ x3, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1
                           y1)
                        (transportf (λ ..., ...)
                           (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p
                              x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) =
                      f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                     (! idpath_transportf
                          (precategory_morphisms
                             (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                          (transportf
                             (λ x3 : C, C ⟦ x3, ... ⟧)
                             (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                                (...) x1 y1)
                             (transportf (...) (...)
                                (...))) @
                      idpath_transportf
                        (precategory_morphisms
                           (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                        (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))
              (pr21 TC) x x0) ((pr21 TC) x x0)
           (λ x1 : C,
            funextsec
              (λ t : C,
               C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
               → C ⟦ x1, t ⟧
                 → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1, (pr11 TC) x0 t
                   ⟧)
              (transportf
                 (λ x2 : C → C → C,
                  ∏ x3 x4 y1 y2 : C,
                  C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                    → C ⟦ x2 x3 y1, x2 x4 y2 ⟧)
                 (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC),,
                     (λ (x2 x3 y1 y2 : C)
                      (f : C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧)
                      (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                      paths_rect
                        (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                        TC
                        (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
                                   C) (p : TC = TD),
                         transportf (...) (...) (...) =
                         f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                        (! idpath_transportf
                             (precategory_morphisms
                                ...)
                             (transportf ... ... ...) @
                         idpath_transportf
                           (precategory_morphisms ...)
                           (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC
                        (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC) x x0
                 x1) ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1)
              (λ x2 : C,
               funextsec
                 (λ _ : C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1,
                    (pr11 TC) x0 x2 ⟧)
                 (transportf
                    (λ x3 : C → C → C,
                     ∏ x4 x5 y1 y2 : C,
                     C ⟦ x4, x5 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                       → C ⟦ x3 x4 y1, x3 x5 y2 ⟧)
                    (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC),,
                        (λ (x3 x4 y1 y2 : C)
                         (f : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                         (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                         paths_rect
                           (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                           TC (λ ... ..., ...)
                           (! ... @ ...) TC
                           (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC) x
                    x0 x1 x2) ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2)
                 (λ x3 : C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  funextsec
                    (λ _ : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧,
                     C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1,
                     (pr11 TC) x0 x2 ⟧)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x4 : C → C → C,
                        ∏ x5 x6 y1 y2 : C,
                        C ⟦ x5, x6 ⟧
                        → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                          → C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                       (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                             (...),,
                           (λ ... ... ..., ...)))
                       (pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2 x3)
                    ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2 x3)
                    (λ x4 : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧,
                     (transport_of_bifunctor_map_is_pointwise
                        (pr21 TC)
                        (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                           ...) x3 x4 @
                      internal_paths_rew_r
                        (pr11 TC ~ pr11 TC)
                        (toforallpaths ... ... ... ...)
                        (λ ..., ...) (λ ..., ...)
                        (internal_paths_rew_r ... ...
                           ... ... ... ...)
                        (toforallpaths_funextsec ...)) @
                     pr2
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (...),,
                        (λ ... ... ..., ...)) x x0 x1
                       x2 x3 x4))))))) =
idpath (pr1 TC)
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
pr1 TC = pr1 TC
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
total2_paths_f
  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
      (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
       (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
       paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
         (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
          (p : TC = TD),
          transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
            (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
               (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
               (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
         (! idpath_transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
              (transportf
                 (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                 (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC)
                    x1 y1)
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                    (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
          idpath_transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
            (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))
  (funextsec
     (λ t : C,
      ∏ x2 y1 y2 : C,
      C ⟦ t, x2 ⟧
      → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
        → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) t y1, (pr11 TC) x2 y2 ⟧)
     (transportf
        (λ x : C → C → C,
         ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
         C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
         → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
        (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
           (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
            (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
             (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
             paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
               TC
               (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                (p : TC = TD),
                transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
                     (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
               (! idpath_transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms
                       (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                    (transportf
                       (λ x : C,
                        C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                       (transportf
                          (λ x : C,
                           C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                             (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                          (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
                idpath_transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)) (f ⊗^{ TC} g))
               TC (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC)) (pr21 TC)
     (λ x : C,
      funextsec
        (λ t : C,
         ∏ y1 y2 : C,
         C ⟦ x, t ⟧
         → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
           → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x y1, (pr11 TC) t y2 ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ x0 : C → C → C,
            ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
           (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
              (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
               (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                paths_rect
                  (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
                  (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                   (p : TC = TD),
                   transportf
                     (λ x0 : C,
                      C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
                     (transportf
                        (λ x0 : C,
                         C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x0 ⟧)
                        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2
                           y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) =
                   f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                  (! idpath_transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms
                          (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                       (transportf
                          (λ x0 : C,
                           C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                             (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                          (transportf
                             (λ x0 : C,
                              C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x0 ⟧)
                             (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                                (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                             (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
                   idpath_transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)) (f ⊗^{ TC} g))
                  TC (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC) x)
        ((pr21 TC) x)
        (λ x0 : C,
         funextsec
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
            → C ⟦ t, y2 ⟧
              → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x t, (pr11 TC) x0 y2 ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ x1 : C → C → C,
               ∏ x2 x3 y1 y2 : C,
               C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
               → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                 → C ⟦ x1 x2 y1, x1 x3 y2 ⟧)
              (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                 (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
                  (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                   (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                   paths_rect
                     (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
                     (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
                                C) (p : TC = TD),
                      transportf
                        (λ x3 : C,
                         C ⟦ x3, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1
                           y1)
                        (transportf (λ ..., ...)
                           (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p
                              x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) =
                      f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                     (! idpath_transportf
                          (precategory_morphisms
                             (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                          (transportf
                             (λ x3 : C, C ⟦ x3, ... ⟧)
                             (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                                (...) x1 y1)
                             (transportf (...) (...)
                                (...))) @
                      idpath_transportf
                        (precategory_morphisms
                           (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                        (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))
              (pr21 TC) x x0) ((pr21 TC) x x0)
           (λ x1 : C,
            funextsec
              (λ t : C,
               C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
               → C ⟦ x1, t ⟧
                 → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1, (pr11 TC) x0 t
                   ⟧)
              (transportf
                 (λ x2 : C → C → C,
                  ∏ x3 x4 y1 y2 : C,
                  C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                    → C ⟦ x2 x3 y1, x2 x4 y2 ⟧)
                 (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC),,
                     (λ (x2 x3 y1 y2 : C)
                      (f : C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧)
                      (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                      paths_rect
                        (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                        TC
                        (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
                                   C) (p : TC = TD),
                         transportf (...) (...) (...) =
                         f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                        (! idpath_transportf
                             (precategory_morphisms
                                ...)
                             (transportf ... ... ...) @
                         idpath_transportf
                           (precategory_morphisms ...)
                           (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC
                        (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC) x x0
                 x1) ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1)
              (λ x2 : C,
               funextsec
                 (λ _ : C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1,
                    (pr11 TC) x0 x2 ⟧)
                 (transportf
                    (λ x3 : C → C → C,
                     ∏ x4 x5 y1 y2 : C,
                     C ⟦ x4, x5 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                       → C ⟦ x3 x4 y1, x3 x5 y2 ⟧)
                    (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC),,
                        (λ (x3 x4 y1 y2 : C)
                         (f : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                         (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                         paths_rect
                           (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                           TC (λ ... ..., ...)
                           (! ... @ ...) TC
                           (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC) x
                    x0 x1 x2) ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2)
                 (λ x3 : C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  funextsec
                    (λ _ : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧,
                     C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1,
                     (pr11 TC) x0 x2 ⟧)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x4 : C → C → C,
                        ∏ x5 x6 y1 y2 : C,
                        C ⟦ x5, x6 ⟧
                        → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                          → C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                       (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                             (...),,
                           (λ ... ... ..., ...)))
                       (pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2 x3)
                    ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2 x3)
                    (λ x4 : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧,
                     (transport_of_bifunctor_map_is_pointwise
                        (pr21 TC)
                        (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                           ...) x3 x4 @
                      internal_paths_rew_r
                        (pr11 TC ~ pr11 TC)
                        (toforallpaths ... ... ... ...)
                        (λ ..., ...) (λ ..., ...)
                        (internal_paths_rew_r ... ...
                           ... ... ... ...)
                        (toforallpaths_funextsec ...)) @
                     pr2
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (...),,
                        (λ ... ... ..., ...)) x x0 x1
                       x2 x3 x4))))))) = ?b
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
?b = idpath (pr1 TC)

      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
total2_paths_f
  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
      (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
       (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
       paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
         (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
          (p : TC = TD),
          transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
            (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
            (transportf
               (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
               (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
               (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
         (! idpath_transportf
              (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
              (transportf
                 (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                 (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC)
                    x1 y1)
                 (transportf
                    (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                    (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
          idpath_transportf
            (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
            (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))
  (funextsec
     (λ t : C,
      ∏ x2 y1 y2 : C,
      C ⟦ t, x2 ⟧
      → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
        → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) t y1, (pr11 TC) x2 y2 ⟧)
     (transportf
        (λ x : C → C → C,
         ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
         C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
         → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
        (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
           (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
            (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
             (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
             paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
               TC
               (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                (p : TC = TD),
                transportf
                  (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
                  (transportf
                     (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
                     (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
               (! idpath_transportf
                    (precategory_morphisms
                       (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                    (transportf
                       (λ x : C,
                        C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                       (transportf
                          (λ x : C,
                           C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                             (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                          (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
                idpath_transportf
                  (precategory_morphisms
                     (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)) (f ⊗^{ TC} g))
               TC (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC)) (pr21 TC)
     (λ x : C,
      funextsec
        (λ t : C,
         ∏ y1 y2 : C,
         C ⟦ x, t ⟧
         → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
           → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x y1, (pr11 TC) t y2 ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ x0 : C → C → C,
            ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
           (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
              (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
               (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                paths_rect
                  (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
                  (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                   (p : TC = TD),
                   transportf
                     (λ x0 : C,
                      C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                     (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
                     (transportf
                        (λ x0 : C,
                         C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x0 ⟧)
                        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2
                           y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) =
                   f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                  (! idpath_transportf
                       (precategory_morphisms
                          (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                       (transportf
                          (λ x0 : C,
                           C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                             (idpath TC) x1 y1)
                          (transportf
                             (λ x0 : C,
                              C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x0 ⟧)
                             (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                                (idpath TC) x2 y2)
                             (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
                   idpath_transportf
                     (precategory_morphisms
                        (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1)) (f ⊗^{ TC} g))
                  TC (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC) x)
        ((pr21 TC) x)
        (λ x0 : C,
         funextsec
           (λ t : C,
            ∏ y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
            → C ⟦ t, y2 ⟧
              → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x t, (pr11 TC) x0 y2 ⟧)
           (transportf
              (λ x1 : C → C → C,
               ∏ x2 x3 y1 y2 : C,
               C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
               → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                 → C ⟦ x1 x2 y1, x1 x3 y2 ⟧)
              (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                 (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
                  (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C)
                   (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
                   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                   paths_rect
                     (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
                     (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
                                C) (p : TC = TD),
                      transportf
                        (λ x3 : C,
                         C ⟦ x3, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
                        (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1
                           y1)
                        (transportf (λ ..., ...)
                           (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p
                              x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) =
                      f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                     (! idpath_transportf
                          (precategory_morphisms
                             (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                          (transportf
                             (λ x3 : C, C ⟦ x3, ... ⟧)
                             (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                                (...) x1 y1)
                             (transportf (...) (...)
                                (...))) @
                      idpath_transportf
                        (precategory_morphisms
                           (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
                        (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))))
              (pr21 TC) x x0) ((pr21 TC) x x0)
           (λ x1 : C,
            funextsec
              (λ t : C,
               C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
               → C ⟦ x1, t ⟧
                 → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1, (pr11 TC) x0 t
                   ⟧)
              (transportf
                 (λ x2 : C → C → C,
                  ∏ x3 x4 y1 y2 : C,
                  C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                    → C ⟦ x2 x3 y1, x2 x4 y2 ⟧)
                 (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                    (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                       (idpath TC),,
                     (λ (x2 x3 y1 y2 : C)
                      (f : C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧)
                      (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                      paths_rect
                        (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                        TC
                        (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
                                   C) (p : TC = TD),
                         transportf (...) (...) (...) =
                         f ⊗^{ TD} g)
                        (! idpath_transportf
                             (precategory_morphisms
                                ...)
                             (transportf ... ... ...) @
                         idpath_transportf
                           (precategory_morphisms ...)
                           (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC
                        (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC) x x0
                 x1) ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1)
              (λ x2 : C,
               funextsec
                 (λ _ : C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1,
                    (pr11 TC) x0 x2 ⟧)
                 (transportf
                    (λ x3 : C → C → C,
                     ∏ x4 x5 y1 y2 : C,
                     C ⟦ x4, x5 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                       → C ⟦ x3 x4 y1, x3 x5 y2 ⟧)
                    (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                          (idpath TC),,
                        (λ (x3 x4 y1 y2 : C)
                         (f : C ⟦ x3, x4 ⟧)
                         (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
                         paths_rect
                           (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
                           TC (λ ... ..., ...)
                           (! ... @ ...) TC
                           (idpath TC)))) (pr21 TC) x
                    x0 x1 x2) ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2)
                 (λ x3 : C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  funextsec
                    (λ _ : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧,
                     C ⟦ (pr11 TC) x x1,
                     (pr11 TC) x0 x2 ⟧)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x4 : C → C → C,
                        ∏ x5 x6 y1 y2 : C,
                        C ⟦ x5, x6 ⟧
                        → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                          → C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                       (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                          (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC
                             (...),,
                           (λ ... ... ..., ...)))
                       (pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2 x3)
                    ((pr21 TC) x x0 x1 x2 x3)
                    (λ x4 : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧,
                     (transport_of_bifunctor_map_is_pointwise
                        (pr21 TC)
                        (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
                           ...) x3 x4 @
                      internal_paths_rew_r
                        (pr11 TC ~ pr11 TC)
                        (toforallpaths ... ... ... ...)
                        (λ ..., ...) (λ ..., ...)
                        (internal_paths_rew_r ... ...
                           ... ... ... ...)
                        (toforallpaths_funextsec ...)) @
                     pr2
                       (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (...),,
                        (λ ... ... ..., ...)) x x0 x1
                       x2 x3 x4))))))) =
total2_paths_f (idpath (pr11 TC))
  (idpath_transportf
     (λ x : C → C → C,
      ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
      C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
      → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
     (pr21 TC))

      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
   (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
    (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
    paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
      (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
       (p : TC = TD),
       transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
         (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
            (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
            (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
      (! idpath_transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
           (transportf
              (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
              (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC) x1
                 y1)
              (transportf
                 (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                 (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC)
                    x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
       idpath_transportf
         (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
         (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))) =
idpath (pr11 TC)
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
∏ a : C → C → C,
isaset
  (∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
   C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
   → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ a x1 y1, a x2 y2 ⟧)

      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TC
  (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC),,
   (λ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
    (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
    paths_rect (bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C) TC
      (λ (TD : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C)
       (p : TC = TD),
       transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
         (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x1 y1)
         (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
            (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x2 y2)
            (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
      (! idpath_transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
           (transportf
              (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, x2 ⊗_{ TC} y2 ⟧)
              (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC) x1
                 y1)
              (transportf
                 (λ x : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x ⟧)
                 (id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TC (idpath TC)
                    x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g))) @
       idpath_transportf
         (precategory_morphisms (x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1))
         (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) TC (idpath TC))) =
idpath (pr11 TC)
 apply funextsec_id.
      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
∏ a : C → C → C,
isaset
  (∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
   C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
   → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ a x1 y1, a x2 y2 ⟧)
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
T: C → C → C
isaset
  (∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
   C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
   → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ T x1 y1, T x2 y2 ⟧)

        
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
T: C → C → C
t, t0, t1, t2: C
t3: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t4: C ⟦ t1, t2 ⟧
isaset (C ⟦ T t t1, T t0 t2 ⟧)

        apply homset_property.
    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
∏ a : tensor_data C, isaset (tensor_ax a)
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
T: tensor_data C
isaset (tensor_ax T)

      apply isaset_dirprod; repeat (apply impred_isaset ; intro) ; apply isasetaprop ; apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
p: TC = TD
x, y: C
pr1 (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD p) x y =
id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x y

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
p: TC = TD
x, y: C
pr1 (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD p) x y =
id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD p x y

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p) =
id_tensor_eqi'''_2 TC TD
  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p)

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p) =
id_tensor_eqi'''_2 TC TD
  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p)

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
id_tensor_eqi'''_2 TC TD
  (base_paths (pr1 TC) (pr1 TD)
     (base_paths TC TD (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p))) =
id_tensor_eqi'''_2 TC TD
  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p)

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
base_paths (pr1 TC) (pr1 TD)
  (base_paths TC TD (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p)) =
tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
base_paths (pr1 TC) (pr1 TD)
  (base_paths TC TD (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p)) =
?b
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
?b = tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p
 
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
base_paths (pr1 TC) (pr1 TD)
  (base_paths TC TD (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p)) =
?b

      
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
base_paths TC TD (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p) = ?t2

      apply base_total2_paths.
    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
base_paths (pr1 TC) (pr1 TD)
  (total2_paths_f (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p)
     (funextsec
        (λ t : C,
         ∏ x2 y1 y2 : C,
         C ⟦ t, x2 ⟧
         → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
           → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) t y1, (pr11 TD) x2 y2 ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ x : C → C → C,
            ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
           (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p) (pr21 TC))
        (pr21 TD)
        ((λ x : C,
          funextsec
            (λ t : C,
             ∏ y1 y2 : C,
             C ⟦ x, t ⟧
             → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
               → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x y1, (pr11 TD) t y2 ⟧)
            (transportf
               (λ x0 : C → C → C,
                ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
                C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
               (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p)
               (pr21 TC) x) ((pr21 TD) x)
            ((λ x0 : C,
              funextsec
                (λ t : C,
                 ∏ y2 : C,
                 C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
                 → C ⟦ t, y2 ⟧
                   → C ⟦ (pr11 TD) x t,
                     (pr11 TD) x0 y2 ⟧)
                (transportf
                   (λ x1 : C → C → C,
                    ∏ x2 x3 y1 y2 : C,
                    C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
                    → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                      → C ⟦ x1 x2 y1, x1 x3 y2 ⟧)
                   (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p)
                   (pr21 TC) x x0) ((pr21 TD) x x0)
                ((λ x1 : C,
                  funextsec
                    (λ t : C,
                     C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
                     → C ⟦ x1, t ⟧
                       → C ⟦ ... x x1, ... x0 t ⟧)
                    (transportf
                       (λ x2 : C → ...,
                        ∏ x3 x4 y1 y2 : C, ... → ...)
                       (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p)
                       (pr21 TC) x x0 x1)
                    ((pr21 TD) x x0 x1)
                    ((λ x2 : C,
                      funextsec (...) (...) (...)
                        (...))
                     :
                     transportf (λ ..., ...)
                       (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p)
                       (pr21 TC) x x0 x1 ~
                     (pr21 TD) x x0 x1))
                 :
                 transportf
                   (λ x1 : C → C → C,
                    ∏ x2 x3 y1 y2 : C,
                    C ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
                    → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                      → C ⟦ x1 x2 y1, x1 x3 y2 ⟧)
                   (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p)
                   (pr21 TC) x x0 ~ (pr21 TD) x x0))
             :
             transportf
               (λ x0 : C → C → C,
                ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
                C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
                → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
                  → C ⟦ x0 x1 y1, x0 x2 y2 ⟧)
               (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p)
               (pr21 TC) x ~ (pr21 TD) x))
         :
         transportf
           (λ x : C → C → C,
            ∏ x1 x2 y1 y2 : C,
            C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
            → C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧ → C ⟦ x x1 y1, x x2 y2 ⟧)
           (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p) (pr21 TC) ~
         pr21 TD))) = tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p

    apply base_total2_paths.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, y: C
id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p)
  x y =
id_tensor_eqi'''_2 TC TD
  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p) x y

  
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, y: C
id_tensor_eqi'''_1 TC TD (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p)
  x y =
id_tensor_eqi'''_2 TC TD
  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p) x y

    
C: univalent_category
TC, TD: tensor C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, y: C
id_tensor_eqi'''_2 TC TD
  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p) x y =
id_tensor_eqi'''_2 TC TD
  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p) x y

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p) =
p

  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p) =
p

    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
pr1
  (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p)) = pr1 p
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
transportf
  (λ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
     (x x1 y1)
     (transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x0 ⟧)
        (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g) ?p
  (pr2
     (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD
        (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p))) = pr2 p

    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
pr1
  (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p)) = pr1 p
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, y: C
pr1
  (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p)) x y = pr1 p x y

      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, y: C
pr1
  (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p)) x y = ?b

  (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD

id_tensor_eqi'''_2 TC TD
  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p) x y = pr1 p x y

      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, y: C
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x) ((pr11 TD) x)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) (pr11 TC) (pr11 TD)
     (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p) x) y = pr1 p x y

      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, y: C
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x) ((pr11 TD) x)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) (pr11 TC) (pr11 TD)
     (funextsec (λ _ : C, C → C) (pr11 TC) (pr11 TD)
        (λ x : C,
         funextsec (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x)
           ((pr11 TD) x) (λ x0 : C, pr1 p x x0))) x) y =
pr1 p x y

      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, y: C
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x) ((pr11 TD) x)
  (funextsec (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x) ((pr11 TD) x)
     (λ x0 : C, pr1 p x x0)) y = pr1 p x y

      
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, y: C
pr1 p x y = pr1 p x y

      apply idpath.
    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
transportf
  (λ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
     (x x1 y1)
     (transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x0 ⟧)
        (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
  (funextsec
     (λ t : C, ∏ y : C, t ⊗_{ TC} y = t ⊗_{ TD} y)
     (pr1
        (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD
           (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p))) (pr1 p)
     ((λ x : C,
       funextsec (λ t : C, x ⊗_{ TC} t = x ⊗_{ TD} t)
         (pr1
            (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD
               (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p)) x)
         (pr1 p x)
         ((λ y : C,
           pr_id_tensor_eqi'''_funextsec
             (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p) x y @
           distributer_funext p x y @
           ((internal_paths_rew_r (pr11 TC ~ pr11 TD)
               (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C)
                  (pr11 TC) (pr11 TD)
                  (funextsec (λ _ : C, C → C)
                     (pr11 TC) (pr11 TD)
                     (λ x0 : C,
                      funextsec ... ... ... ...)))
               (λ x0 : C,
                funextsec (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x0)
                  ((pr11 TD) x0)
                  (λ x1 : C, pr1 p x0 x1))
               (λ h : pr11 TC ~ pr11 TD,
                toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C)
                  ((pr11 TC) x) ((pr11 TD) x) (h x) y =
                pr1 p x y)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  ((pr11 TC) x ~ (pr11 TD) x)
                  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C)
                     ((pr11 TC) x) ((pr11 TD) x)
                     (funextsec (...) (...) (...)
                        (...))) (λ x0 : C, pr1 p x x0)
                  (λ h : ... x ~ ... x,
                   h y = pr1 p x y)
                  (idpath (pr1 p x y))
                  (toforallpaths_funextsec
                     (λ x0 : C, pr1 p x x0)))
               (toforallpaths_funextsec
                  (λ x0 : C,
                   funextsec (λ ..., C) (... x0)
                     (... x0) (λ ..., ...)))
             :
             toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x)
               ((pr11 TD) x)
               (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C)
                  (pr11 TC) (pr11 TD)
                  (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p) x) y =
             pr1 p x y)
            :
            id_tensor_eqi'''_2 TC TD
              (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq1 TC TD p) x y =
            pr1 p x y))
          :
          pr1
            (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD
               (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p)) x ~
          pr1 p x))
      :
      pr1
        (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD
           (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p)) ~ pr1 p))
  (pr2
     (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD
        (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p))) = pr2 p
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
p: tensor_eqi''' TC TD
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : ∏ x y : C, x ⊗_{ TC} y = x ⊗_{ TD} y,
   ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
   (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
   transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x2 ⊗_{ TD} y2 ⟧)
     (x x1 y1)
     (transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ TC} y1, x0 ⟧)
        (x x2 y2) (f ⊗^{ TC} g)) = f ⊗^{ TD} g)
  (funextsec
     (λ t : C, ∏ y : C, t ⊗_{ TC} y = t ⊗_{ TD} y)
     (pr1
        (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD
           (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p))) (pr1 p)
     (λ x : C,
      funextsec (λ t : C, x ⊗_{ TC} t = x ⊗_{ TD} t)
        (pr1
           (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD
              (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p)) x)
        (pr1 p x)
        (λ y : C,
         pr_id_tensor_eqi'''_funextsec
           (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p) x y @
         distributer_funext p x y @
         internal_paths_rew_r (pr11 TC ~ pr11 TD)
           (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → C) (pr11 TC)
              (pr11 TD)
              (funextsec (λ _ : C, C → C) (pr11 TC)
                 (pr11 TD)
                 (λ x0 : C,
                  funextsec (λ _ : C, C)
                    ((pr11 TC) x0) ((pr11 TD) x0)
                    (λ x1 : C, pr1 p x0 x1))))
           (λ x0 : C,
            funextsec (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x0)
              ((pr11 TD) x0) (λ x1 : C, pr1 p x0 x1))
           (λ h : pr11 TC ~ pr11 TD,
            toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x)
              ((pr11 TD) x) (h x) y = pr1 p x y)
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              ((pr11 TC) x ~ (pr11 TD) x)
              (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C)
                 ((pr11 TC) x) ((pr11 TD) x)
                 (funextsec (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x)
                    ((pr11 TD) x)
                    (λ x0 : C, pr1 p x x0)))
              (λ x0 : C, pr1 p x x0)
              (λ h : (pr11 TC) x ~ (pr11 TD) x,
               h y = pr1 p x y) (idpath (pr1 p x y))
              (toforallpaths_funextsec
                 (λ x0 : C, pr1 p x x0)))
           (toforallpaths_funextsec
              (λ x0 : C,
               funextsec (λ _ : C, C) ((pr11 TC) x0)
                 ((pr11 TD) x0)
                 (λ x1 : C, pr1 p x0 x1))))))
  (pr2
     (id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD
        (tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD p))) x x0 x1 x2 x3
  x4 = pr2 p x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

∏ y : tensor_eqi''' TC TD, ?f (?g y) = y

TC = TD → tensor_eqi''' TC TD

C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
∏ x : TC = TD,
(λ teq : tensor_eqi''' TC TD,
 tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD teq)
  ((λ eq : TC = TD, id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD eq) x) = x
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C

 tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD teq)
  ((λ eq : TC = TD, id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD eq) eq) =
eq

      apply id_to_teqi'''_to_id.
    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
∏ y : tensor_eqi''' TC TD,
(λ eq : TC = TD, id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD eq)
  ((λ teq : tensor_eqi''' TC TD,
    tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD teq) y) = y
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C

(λ eq : TC = TD, id_tensor_eqi''' TC TD eq)
  ((λ teq : tensor_eqi''' TC TD,
    tensor_eqi'''_to_eq TC TD teq) teq) = teq

      apply teqi'''_to_id_to_teqi'''.
  Defined.

  
disp_univalent_2_0 bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat

  (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,

TC, TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C

    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) TC TD
i2:= tensor_iso_equiv_tensor_eq TC TD: tensor_eq TC TD ≃ tensor_iso TC TD
i3:= tensor_eq_equiv_tensor_eq' TC TD: tensor_eq' TC TD ≃ tensor_eq TC TD
i4:= tensor_eq'_equiv_tensor_eq'' TC TD: tensor_eq'' TC TD ≃ tensor_eq' TC TD
i5:= tensor_eq''_equiv_tensor_eqi'' TC TD: tensor_eqi'' TC TD ≃ tensor_eq'' TC TD
i6:= tensor_eqi''_equiv_tensor_eqi''' TC TD: tensor_eqi''' TC TD ≃ tensor_eqi'' TC TD
i7:= tensor_eqi'''_equiv_eq TC TD: TC = TD ≃ tensor_eqi''' TC TD
transportf
  (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
   bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C) TC = TD
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)) TC TD

     exact ((i1 ∘ i2 ∘ i3 ∘ i4 ∘ i5 ∘ i6 ∘ i7)%weq).

(let i1 := tensor_iso_disp_eq_equiv TC TD in
 let i2 := tensor_iso_equiv_tensor_eq TC TD in
 let i3 := tensor_eq_equiv_tensor_eq' TC TD in
 let i4 := tensor_eq'_equiv_tensor_eq'' TC TD in
 let i5 := tensor_eq''_equiv_tensor_eqi'' TC TD in
 let i6 := tensor_eqi''_equiv_tensor_eqi''' TC TD in
 let i7 := tensor_eqi'''_equiv_eq TC TD in
 (i1 ∘ i2 ∘ i3 ∘ i4 ∘ i5 ∘ i6 ∘ i7)%weq) ~

   bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C) TC = TD

 let i2 := tensor_iso_equiv_tensor_eq TC TD in
 let i3 := tensor_eq_equiv_tensor_eq' TC TD in
 let i4 := tensor_eq'_equiv_tensor_eq'' TC TD in
 let i5 := tensor_eq''_equiv_tensor_eqi'' TC TD in
 let i6 := tensor_eqi''_equiv_tensor_eqi''' TC TD in
 let i7 := tensor_eqi'''_equiv_eq TC TD in
 (i1 ∘ i2 ∘ i3 ∘ i4 ∘ i5 ∘ i6 ∘ i7)%weq) p =
disp_idtoiso_2_0 bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat (idpath C)
  TC TD p

     
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
(let i1 :=
   tensor_iso_disp_eq_equiv TC
     (transportf
        (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
         bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C) TC) in
 let i2 :=
   tensor_iso_equiv_tensor_eq TC
     (transportf
        (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
         bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C) TC) in
 let i3 :=
   tensor_eq_equiv_tensor_eq' TC
     (transportf
        (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
         bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C) TC) in
 let i4 :=
   tensor_eq'_equiv_tensor_eq'' TC
     (transportf
        (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
         bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C) TC) in
 let i5 :=
   tensor_eq''_equiv_tensor_eqi'' TC
     (transportf
        (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
         bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C) TC) in
 let i6 :=
   tensor_eqi''_equiv_tensor_eqi''' TC
     (transportf
        (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
         bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C) TC) in
 let i7 :=
   tensor_eqi'''_equiv_eq TC
     (transportf
        (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
         bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C) TC) in
 (i1 ∘ i2 ∘ i3 ∘ i4 ∘ i5 ∘ i6 ∘ i7)%weq)
  (idpath
     (transportf
        (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
         bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C) TC)) =
disp_idtoiso_2_0 bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat (idpath C)
  TC
  (transportf
     (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
      bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C) TC)
  (idpath
     (transportf
        (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
         bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C) TC))

     
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
isPredicate
  (disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
     (idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C)))
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
pr1
  ((let i1 :=
      tensor_iso_disp_eq_equiv TC
        (transportf
           (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
            bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C) TC)
      in
    let i2 :=
      tensor_iso_equiv_tensor_eq TC
        (transportf
           (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
            bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C) TC)
      in
    let i3 :=
      tensor_eq_equiv_tensor_eq' TC
        (transportf
           (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
            bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C) TC)
      in
    let i4 :=
      tensor_eq'_equiv_tensor_eq'' TC
        (transportf
           (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
            bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C) TC)
      in
    let i5 :=
