                    (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                     bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath C) TC) in
             let i6 :=
               tensor_eqi''_equiv_tensor_eqi''' TC
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                     bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath C) TC) in
             let i7 :=
               tensor_eqi'''_equiv_eq TC
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                     bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath C) TC) in
             (i1 ∘ i2 ∘ i3 ∘ i4 ∘ i5 ∘ i6 ∘ i7)%weq)
              (idpath
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                     bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath C) TC))) ~
      pr11 (disp_idtoiso_2_0 bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
              (idpath C) TC
              (transportf
                 (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                  bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                 (idpath C) TC)
              (idpath
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                     bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath C) TC)))))
  (pr21 (disp_idtoiso_2_0 bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
           (idpath C) TC
           (transportf
              (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
               bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C)
              TC)
           (idpath
              (transportf
                 (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                  bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                 (idpath C) TC))))
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
x, x0, x1, x2: C
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
(pr21 ((let i1 :=
          tensor_iso_disp_eq_equiv TC
            (transportf
               (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C)
               TC) in
        let i2 :=
          tensor_iso_equiv_tensor_eq TC
            (transportf
               (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C)
               TC) in
        let i3 :=
          tensor_eq_equiv_tensor_eq' TC
            (transportf
               (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C)
               TC) in
        let i4 :=
          tensor_eq'_equiv_tensor_eq'' TC
            (transportf
               (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C)
               TC) in
        let i5 :=
          tensor_eq''_equiv_tensor_eqi'' TC
            (transportf
               (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C)
               TC) in
        let i6 :=
          tensor_eqi''_equiv_tensor_eqi''' TC
            (transportf
               (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C)
               TC) in
        let i7 :=
          tensor_eqi'''_equiv_eq TC
            (transportf
               (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C)
               TC) in
        (i1 ∘ i2 ∘ i3 ∘ i4 ∘ i5 ∘ i6 ∘ i7)%weq)
         (idpath
            (transportf
               (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C)
               TC)))) x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4 =
transportb preserves_tensor_nat
  (funextsec
     (λ t : C,
      ∏ y : C,
      C
      ⟦ idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) t
        ⊗_{ transportf
              (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
               bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C)
              TC} idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) y,
      idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) (t ⊗_{ TC} y) ⟧)
     (pr11 ((let i1 :=
               tensor_iso_disp_eq_equiv TC
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                     bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath C) TC) in
             let i2 :=
               tensor_iso_equiv_tensor_eq TC
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                     bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath C) TC) in
             let i3 :=
               tensor_eq_equiv_tensor_eq' TC
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                     bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath C) TC) in
             let i4 :=
               tensor_eq'_equiv_tensor_eq'' TC
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                     bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath C) TC) in
             let i5 :=
               tensor_eq''_equiv_tensor_eqi'' TC
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                     bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath C) TC) in
             let i6 :=
               tensor_eqi''_equiv_tensor_eqi''' TC
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                     bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath C) TC) in
             let i7 :=
               tensor_eqi'''_equiv_eq TC
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                     bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath C) TC) in
             (i1 ∘ i2 ∘ i3 ∘ i4 ∘ i5 ∘ i6 ∘ i7)%weq)
              (idpath
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                     bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath C) TC))))
     (pr11 (disp_idtoiso_2_0 bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
              (idpath C) TC
              (transportf
                 (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                  bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                 (idpath C) TC)
              (idpath
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                     bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                    (idpath C) TC))))
     (λ x : C,
      funextsec
        (λ t : C,
         C
         ⟦ idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) x
           ⊗_{ transportf
                 (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                  bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                 (idpath C) TC} idtoiso_2_0 C C
                                  (idpath C) t,
         idtoiso_2_0 C C (idpath C) (x ⊗_{ TC} t) ⟧)
        ((pr11 ((let i1 :=
                   tensor_iso_disp_eq_equiv TC
                     (transportf
                        (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                         bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                        (idpath C) TC) in
                 let i2 :=
                   tensor_iso_equiv_tensor_eq TC
                     (transportf
                        (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                         bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                        (idpath C) TC) in
                 let i3 :=
                   tensor_eq_equiv_tensor_eq' TC
                     (transportf
                        (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                         bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                        (idpath C) TC) in
                 let i4 :=
                   tensor_eq'_equiv_tensor_eq'' TC
                     (transportf
                        (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                         bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                        (idpath C) TC) in
                 let i5 :=
                   tensor_eq''_equiv_tensor_eqi'' TC
                     (transportf
                        (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                         bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                        (idpath C) TC) in
                 let i6 :=
                   tensor_eqi''_equiv_tensor_eqi''' TC
                     (transportf
                        (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                         bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                        (idpath C) TC) in
                 let i7 :=
                   tensor_eqi'''_equiv_eq TC
                     (transportf
                        (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                         bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                        (idpath C) TC) in
                 (i1 ∘ i2 ∘ i3 ∘ i4 ∘ i5 ∘ i6 ∘ i7)%weq)
                  (idpath
                     (transportf
                        (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                         bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                        (idpath C) TC)))) x)
        ((pr11 (disp_idtoiso_2_0
                  bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat (idpath C)
                  TC
                  (transportf
                     (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                      bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                     (idpath C) TC)
                  (idpath
                     (transportf
                        (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                         bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                        (idpath C) TC)))) x)
        (λ x0 : C,
         idpath
           ((pr11 (disp_idtoiso_2_0
                     bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
                     (idpath C) TC
                     (transportf
                        (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                         bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                        (idpath C) TC)
                     (idpath
                        (transportf
                           (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                            bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                           (idpath C) TC)))) x x0))))
  (pr21 (disp_idtoiso_2_0 bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
           (idpath C) TC
           (transportf
              (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
               bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z) (idpath C)
              TC)
           (idpath
              (transportf
                 (λ z : bicat_of_univ_cats,
                  bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat z)
                 (idpath C) TC)))) x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4

         apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
disp_univalent_2 bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat

  
disp_univalent_2 bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat

    
disp_univalent_2_0 bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
disp_univalent_2_1 bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat

    
disp_univalent_2_0 bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
 apply bicatcattensor_disp_prebicat_is_globally_univalent.
    
disp_univalent_2_1 bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat
 apply bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat_is_locally_univalent.
  Defined.

  
disp_2cells_isaprop bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat

  
disp_2cells_isaprop bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
isaprop (disp_2cells α ptC ptD)

    apply isaprop_bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct.
  Qed.

  
disp_locally_groupoid bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat

  
disp_locally_groupoid bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat

    
∏ (a b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f g : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : invertible_2cell f g)
(aa : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat a)
(bb : bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
(gg : aa -->[ g] bb) (xx : disp_2cells x ff gg),
is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
is_disp_invertible_2cell α ptc

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
∑ y : disp_2cells α ^-1%bicategory ptD ptC,
disp_vcomp2 ptc y =
transportb
  (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F F,
   disp_2cells α ptC ptC) (vcomp_rinv α)
  (disp_id2 ptC)
× disp_vcomp2 y ptc =
  transportb
    (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G G,
     disp_2cells α ptD ptD) (vcomp_linv α)
    (disp_id2 ptD)

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
disp_2cells α ^-1%bicategory ptD ptC
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
(λ y : disp_2cells α ^-1%bicategory ptD ptC,
 disp_vcomp2 ptc y =
 transportb
   (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F F,
    disp_2cells α ptC ptC) (vcomp_rinv α)
   (disp_id2 ptC)
 × disp_vcomp2 y ptc =
   transportb
     (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G G,
      disp_2cells α ptD ptD) (vcomp_linv α)
     (disp_id2 ptD)) ?pr1

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
disp_2cells α ^-1%bicategory ptD ptC
 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
pr1 ptD x y · α ^-1%bicategory (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
α ^-1%bicategory x ⊗^{ TD} α ^-1%bicategory y
· pr1 ptC x y


      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
pr1 ptD x y · α ^-1%bicategory (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
α ^-1%bicategory x ⊗^{ TD} α ^-1%bicategory y
· pr1 ptC x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
pr1 ptD x y · α ^-1%bicategory (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
α ^-1%bicategory x ⊗^{ TD} α ^-1%bicategory y
· pr1 ptC x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
pr1 ptD x y · α ^-1%bicategory (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
α ^-1%bicategory x ⊗^{ TD} α ^-1%bicategory y
· pr1 ptC x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x
   ⊗_{ TC
       :
       tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
:
z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)): z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
pr1 ptD x y · α ^-1%bicategory (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
α ^-1%bicategory x ⊗^{ TD} α ^-1%bicategory y
· pr1 ptC x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x
   ⊗_{ TC
       :
       tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
:
z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)): z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
z_iso
  (pr1 G x
   ⊗_{ TD : tensor (D : univalent_category)} pr1 G y)
  (pr1 F x
   ⊗_{ TD : tensor (D : univalent_category)} pr1 F y)
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x
   ⊗_{ TC
       :
       tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
:
z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)): z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
α_natisotxmym:= ?Goal: z_iso
  (pr1 G x
   ⊗_{ TD
       :
       tensor (D : univalent_category)} 
   pr1 G y)
  (pr1 F x
   ⊗_{ TD
       :
       tensor (D : univalent_category)} 
   pr1 F y)
pr1 ptD x y · α ^-1%bicategory (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
α ^-1%bicategory x ⊗^{ TD} α ^-1%bicategory y
· pr1 ptC x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x
   ⊗_{ TC
       :
       tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
:
z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)): z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
z_iso
  (pr1 G x
   ⊗_{ TD : tensor (D : univalent_category)} pr1 G y)
  (pr1 F x
   ⊗_{ TD : tensor (D : univalent_category)} pr1 F y)

        
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x
   ⊗_{ TC
       :
       tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
:
z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)): z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
   ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)

        
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G

TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x
   ⊗_{ TC
       :
       tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
:
z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)): z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
is_inverse_in_precat
  (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
   ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)
  ((pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y)

        
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: invertible_2cell F G

TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x
   ⊗_{ TC
       :
       tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
:
z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)): z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
· (pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y =
identity (pr1 G x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 G y)

TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x
   ⊗_{ TC
       :
       tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
:
z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :

  (pr1 F

     (x

          :
          tensor

⊗^{ TD} (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y · (pr11 α) y) =
identity (pr1 G x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 G y)

:

α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:

  (x

C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G

TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x
   ⊗_{ TC
       :
       tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
:
z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :

  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x · (pr11 α) x =
identity (pr1 G x)

            apply (pr222 α_natisox).

α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x

  (pr1 F

  (pr1 G

C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x
   ⊗_{ TC
       :
       tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
:
z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)): z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
identity (pr1 G x) ⊗^{ TD} identity (pr1 G y) =
identity (pr1 G x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 G y)

          apply tensor_id.
        
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x
   ⊗_{ TC
       :
       tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
:
z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)): z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
(pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y
· pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
  ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y =
identity (pr1 F x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 F y)

ptD: TC -->[ G] TD

x, y: C

:

((pr11 α) x · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
⊗^{ TD} ((pr11 α) y · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y) =
identity (pr1 F x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 F y)

            apply (pr122 α_natisox).

z_iso

C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x
   ⊗_{ TC
       :
       tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
:
z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)): z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
α_natisotxmym:= pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y,,
(pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y,,
internal_paths_rew
  (D ⟦ G x ⊗_{ TD} G y, 
   G x ⊗_{ TD} G y ⟧)
  ((pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x · (pr11 α) x)
   ⊗^{ TD} (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
            · (pr11 α) y))
  (λ p : D ⟦ G x ⊗_{ TD} G y,
         G x ⊗_{ TD} G y ⟧,
   p =
   identity (pr1 G x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 G y))
  (maponpaths
     (λ l : D ⟦ pr1 G x, pr1 G x ⟧,
      l
      ⊗^{ TD} (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
               · (pr11 α) y))
     (pr222 α_natisox) @
   maponpaths
     (tensor_on_hom TD 
        (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x) 
        (G y) (G y)
        (identity (pr1 G x)))
     (pr222 α_natisoy) @
   tensor_id TD (pr1 G x) (pr1 G y))
  (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
   ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
   · (pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y)
  (tensor_comp TD (G x) 
     (F x) (G x) (G y) 
     (F y) (G y)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
     ((pr11 α) x)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)
     ((pr11 α) y)),,
internal_paths_rew
  (D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ TD} F y, 
   F x ⊗_{ TD} F y ⟧)
  (((pr11 α) x · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
   ⊗^{ TD} ((pr11 α) y
            · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y))
  (λ p : D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ TD} F y,
         F x ⊗_{ TD} F y ⟧,
   p =
   identity (pr1 F x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 F y))
  (maponpaths
     (λ l : D ⟦ pr1 F x, pr1 F x ⟧,
      l
      ⊗^{ TD} ((pr11 α) y
               · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y))
     (pr122 α_natisox) @
   maponpaths
     (tensor_on_hom TD 
        (pr1 F x) (pr1 F x) 
        (F y) (F y)
        (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (pr122 α_natisoy) @
   tensor_id TD (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y))
  ((pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y
   · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
     ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)
  (tensor_comp TD (F x) 
     (G x) (F x) (F y) 
     (G y) (F y) ((pr11 α) x)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
     ((pr11 α) y)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)): z_iso
  (pr1 G x
   ⊗_{ TD
       :
       tensor (D : univalent_category)} 
   pr1 G y)
  (pr1 F x
   ⊗_{ TD
       :
       tensor (D : univalent_category)} 
   pr1 F y)
pr1 ptD x y · α ^-1%bicategory (x ⊗_{ TC} y) =
α ^-1%bicategory x ⊗^{ TD} α ^-1%bicategory y
· pr1 ptC x y


      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x
   ⊗_{ TC
       :
       tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
:
z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)): z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
α_natisotxmym:= pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y,,
(pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y,,
internal_paths_rew
  (D ⟦ G x ⊗_{ TD} G y, 
   G x ⊗_{ TD} G y ⟧)
  ((pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x · (pr11 α) x)
   ⊗^{ TD} (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
            · (pr11 α) y))
  (λ p : D ⟦ G x ⊗_{ TD} G y,
         G x ⊗_{ TD} G y ⟧,
   p =
   identity (pr1 G x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 G y))
  (maponpaths
     (λ l : D ⟦ pr1 G x, pr1 G x ⟧,
      l
      ⊗^{ TD} (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
               · (pr11 α) y))
     (pr222 α_natisox) @
   maponpaths
     (tensor_on_hom TD 
        (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x) 
        (G y) (G y)
        (identity (pr1 G x)))
     (pr222 α_natisoy) @
   tensor_id TD (pr1 G x) (pr1 G y))
  (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
   ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
   · (pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y)
  (tensor_comp TD (G x) 
     (F x) (G x) (G y) 
     (F y) (G y)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
     ((pr11 α) x)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)
     ((pr11 α) y)),,
internal_paths_rew
  (D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ TD} F y, 
   F x ⊗_{ TD} F y ⟧)
  (((pr11 α) x · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
   ⊗^{ TD} ((pr11 α) y
            · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y))
  (λ p : D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ TD} F y,
         F x ⊗_{ TD} F y ⟧,
   p =
   identity (pr1 F x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 F y))
  (maponpaths
     (λ l : D ⟦ pr1 F x, pr1 F x ⟧,
      l
      ⊗^{ TD} ((pr11 α) y
               · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y))
     (pr122 α_natisox) @
   maponpaths
     (tensor_on_hom TD 
        (pr1 F x) (pr1 F x) 
        (F y) (F y)
        (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (pr122 α_natisoy) @
   tensor_id TD (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y))
  ((pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y
   · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
     ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)
  (tensor_comp TD (F x) 
     (G x) (F x) (F y) 
     (G y) (F y) ((pr11 α) x)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
     ((pr11 α) y)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)): z_iso
  (pr1 G x
   ⊗_{ TD
       :
       tensor (D : univalent_category)} 
   pr1 G y)
  (pr1 F x
   ⊗_{ TD
       :
       tensor (D : univalent_category)} 
   pr1 F y)
inv_from_z_iso α_natisotxmym
· (pr1 ptD x y · α ^-1%bicategory (x ⊗_{ TC} y)) =
pr1 ptC x y

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x
   ⊗_{ TC
       :
       tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
:
z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)): z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
α_natisotxmym:= pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y,,
(pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y,,
internal_paths_rew
  (D ⟦ G x ⊗_{ TD} G y, 
   G x ⊗_{ TD} G y ⟧)
  ((pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x · (pr11 α) x)
   ⊗^{ TD} (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
            · (pr11 α) y))
  (λ p : D ⟦ G x ⊗_{ TD} G y,
         G x ⊗_{ TD} G y ⟧,
   p =
   identity (pr1 G x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 G y))
  (maponpaths
     (λ l : D ⟦ pr1 G x, pr1 G x ⟧,
      l
      ⊗^{ TD} (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
               · (pr11 α) y))
     (pr222 α_natisox) @
   maponpaths
     (tensor_on_hom TD 
        (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x) 
        (G y) (G y)
        (identity (pr1 G x)))
     (pr222 α_natisoy) @
   tensor_id TD (pr1 G x) (pr1 G y))
  (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
   ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
   · (pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y)
  (tensor_comp TD (G x) 
     (F x) (G x) (G y) 
     (F y) (G y)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
     ((pr11 α) x)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)
     ((pr11 α) y)),,
internal_paths_rew
  (D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ TD} F y, 
   F x ⊗_{ TD} F y ⟧)
  (((pr11 α) x · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
   ⊗^{ TD} ((pr11 α) y
            · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y))
  (λ p : D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ TD} F y,
         F x ⊗_{ TD} F y ⟧,
   p =
   identity (pr1 F x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 F y))
  (maponpaths
     (λ l : D ⟦ pr1 F x, pr1 F x ⟧,
      l
      ⊗^{ TD} ((pr11 α) y
               · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y))
     (pr122 α_natisox) @
   maponpaths
     (tensor_on_hom TD 
        (pr1 F x) (pr1 F x) 
        (F y) (F y)
        (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (pr122 α_natisoy) @
   tensor_id TD (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y))
  ((pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y
   · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
     ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)
  (tensor_comp TD (F x) 
     (G x) (F x) (F y) 
     (G y) (F y) ((pr11 α) x)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
     ((pr11 α) y)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)): z_iso
  (pr1 G x
   ⊗_{ TD
       :
       tensor (D : univalent_category)} 
   pr1 G y)
  (pr1 F x
   ⊗_{ TD
       :
       tensor (D : univalent_category)} 
   pr1 F y)
inv_from_z_iso α_natisotxmym · pr1 ptD x y
· α ^-1%bicategory (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = pr1 ptC x y



      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x
   ⊗_{ TC
       :
       tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
:
z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)): z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
α_natisotxmym:= pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y,,
(pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y,,
internal_paths_rew
  (D ⟦ G x ⊗_{ TD} G y, 
   G x ⊗_{ TD} G y ⟧)
  ((pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x · (pr11 α) x)
   ⊗^{ TD} (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
            · (pr11 α) y))
  (λ p : D ⟦ G x ⊗_{ TD} G y,
         G x ⊗_{ TD} G y ⟧,
   p =
   identity (pr1 G x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 G y))
  (maponpaths
     (λ l : D ⟦ pr1 G x, pr1 G x ⟧,
      l
      ⊗^{ TD} (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
               · (pr11 α) y))
     (pr222 α_natisox) @
   maponpaths
     (tensor_on_hom TD 
        (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x) 
        (G y) (G y)
        (identity (pr1 G x)))
     (pr222 α_natisoy) @
   tensor_id TD (pr1 G x) (pr1 G y))
  (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
   ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
   · (pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y)
  (tensor_comp TD (G x) 
     (F x) (G x) (G y) 
     (F y) (G y)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
     ((pr11 α) x)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)
     ((pr11 α) y)),,
internal_paths_rew
  (D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ TD} F y, 
   F x ⊗_{ TD} F y ⟧)
  (((pr11 α) x · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
   ⊗^{ TD} ((pr11 α) y
            · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y))
  (λ p : D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ TD} F y,
         F x ⊗_{ TD} F y ⟧,
   p =
   identity (pr1 F x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 F y))
  (maponpaths
     (λ l : D ⟦ pr1 F x, pr1 F x ⟧,
      l
      ⊗^{ TD} ((pr11 α) y
               · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y))
     (pr122 α_natisox) @
   maponpaths
     (tensor_on_hom TD 
        (pr1 F x) (pr1 F x) 
        (F y) (F y)
        (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (pr122 α_natisoy) @
   tensor_id TD (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y))
  ((pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y
   · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
     ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)
  (tensor_comp TD (F x) 
     (G x) (F x) (F y) 
     (G y) (F y) ((pr11 α) x)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
     ((pr11 α) y)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)): z_iso
  (pr1 G x
   ⊗_{ TD
       :
       tensor (D : univalent_category)} 
   pr1 G y)
  (pr1 F x
   ⊗_{ TD
       :
       tensor (D : univalent_category)} 
   pr1 F y)
inv_from_z_iso α_natisotxmym · pr1 ptD x y =
pr1 ptC x y · α_natisoxty

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x
   ⊗_{ TC
       :
       tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
:
z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)): z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
α_natisotxmym:= pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y,,
(pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y,,
internal_paths_rew
  (D ⟦ G x ⊗_{ TD} G y, 
   G x ⊗_{ TD} G y ⟧)
  ((pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x · (pr11 α) x)
   ⊗^{ TD} (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
            · (pr11 α) y))
  (λ p : D ⟦ G x ⊗_{ TD} G y,
         G x ⊗_{ TD} G y ⟧,
   p =
   identity (pr1 G x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 G y))
  (maponpaths
     (λ l : D ⟦ pr1 G x, pr1 G x ⟧,
      l
      ⊗^{ TD} (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
               · (pr11 α) y))
     (pr222 α_natisox) @
   maponpaths
     (tensor_on_hom TD 
        (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x) 
        (G y) (G y)
        (identity (pr1 G x)))
     (pr222 α_natisoy) @
   tensor_id TD (pr1 G x) (pr1 G y))
  (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
   ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
   · (pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y)
  (tensor_comp TD (G x) 
     (F x) (G x) (G y) 
     (F y) (G y)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
     ((pr11 α) x)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)
     ((pr11 α) y)),,
internal_paths_rew
  (D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ TD} F y, 
   F x ⊗_{ TD} F y ⟧)
  (((pr11 α) x · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
   ⊗^{ TD} ((pr11 α) y
            · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y))
  (λ p : D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ TD} F y,
         F x ⊗_{ TD} F y ⟧,
   p =
   identity (pr1 F x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 F y))
  (maponpaths
     (λ l : D ⟦ pr1 F x, pr1 F x ⟧,
      l
      ⊗^{ TD} ((pr11 α) y
               · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y))
     (pr122 α_natisox) @
   maponpaths
     (tensor_on_hom TD 
        (pr1 F x) (pr1 F x) 
        (F y) (F y)
        (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (pr122 α_natisoy) @
   tensor_id TD (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y))
  ((pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y
   · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
     ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)
  (tensor_comp TD (F x) 
     (G x) (F x) (F y) 
     (G y) (F y) ((pr11 α) x)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
     ((pr11 α) y)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)): z_iso
  (pr1 G x
   ⊗_{ TD
       :
       tensor (D : univalent_category)} 
   pr1 G y)
  (pr1 F x
   ⊗_{ TD
       :
       tensor (D : univalent_category)} 
   pr1 F y)
(pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y · pr1 ptD x y =
pr1 ptC x y · α (x ⊗_{ TC} y)

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct C D F G α TC TD ptC ptD
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x
   ⊗_{ TC
       :
       tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
:
z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)): z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
α_natisotxmym:= pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y,,
(pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y,,
internal_paths_rew
  (D ⟦ G x ⊗_{ TD} G y, 
   G x ⊗_{ TD} G y ⟧)
  ((pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x · (pr11 α) x)
   ⊗^{ TD} (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
            · (pr11 α) y))
  (λ p : D ⟦ G x ⊗_{ TD} G y,
         G x ⊗_{ TD} G y ⟧,
   p =
   identity (pr1 G x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 G y))
  (maponpaths
     (λ l : D ⟦ pr1 G x, pr1 G x ⟧,
      l
      ⊗^{ TD} (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
               · (pr11 α) y))
     (pr222 α_natisox) @
   maponpaths
     (tensor_on_hom TD 
        (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x) 
        (G y) (G y)
        (identity (pr1 G x)))
     (pr222 α_natisoy) @
   tensor_id TD (pr1 G x) (pr1 G y))
  (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
   ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
   · (pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y)
  (tensor_comp TD (G x) 
     (F x) (G x) (G y) 
     (F y) (G y)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
     ((pr11 α) x)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)
     ((pr11 α) y)),,
internal_paths_rew
  (D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ TD} F y, 
   F x ⊗_{ TD} F y ⟧)
  (((pr11 α) x · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
   ⊗^{ TD} ((pr11 α) y
            · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y))
  (λ p : D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ TD} F y,
         F x ⊗_{ TD} F y ⟧,
   p =
   identity (pr1 F x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 F y))
  (maponpaths
     (λ l : D ⟦ pr1 F x, pr1 F x ⟧,
      l
      ⊗^{ TD} ((pr11 α) y
               · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y))
     (pr122 α_natisox) @
   maponpaths
     (tensor_on_hom TD 
        (pr1 F x) (pr1 F x) 
        (F y) (F y)
        (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (pr122 α_natisoy) @
   tensor_id TD (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y))
  ((pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y
   · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
     ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)
  (tensor_comp TD (F x) 
     (G x) (F x) (F y) 
     (G y) (F y) ((pr11 α) x)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
     ((pr11 α) y)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)): z_iso
  (pr1 G x
   ⊗_{ TD
       :
       tensor (D : univalent_category)} 
   pr1 G y)
  (pr1 F x
   ⊗_{ TD
       :
       tensor (D : univalent_category)} 
   pr1 F y)
(pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y · pr1 ptD x y =
pr1 ptC x y · α (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: preservestensor_commutes (pr1 ptC) (pr1 ptD) α
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x
   ⊗_{ TC
       :
       tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
:
z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)): z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
α_natisotxmym:= pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y,,
(pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y,,
internal_paths_rew
  (D ⟦ G x ⊗_{ TD} G y, 
   G x ⊗_{ TD} G y ⟧)
  ((pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x · (pr11 α) x)
   ⊗^{ TD} (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
            · (pr11 α) y))
  (λ p : D ⟦ G x ⊗_{ TD} G y,
         G x ⊗_{ TD} G y ⟧,
   p =
   identity (pr1 G x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 G y))
  (maponpaths
     (λ l : D ⟦ pr1 G x, pr1 G x ⟧,
      l
      ⊗^{ TD} (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
               · (pr11 α) y))
     (pr222 α_natisox) @
   maponpaths
     (tensor_on_hom TD 
        (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x) 
        (G y) (G y)
        (identity (pr1 G x)))
     (pr222 α_natisoy) @
   tensor_id TD (pr1 G x) (pr1 G y))
  (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
   ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
   · (pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y)
  (tensor_comp TD (G x) 
     (F x) (G x) (G y) 
     (F y) (G y)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
     ((pr11 α) x)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)
     ((pr11 α) y)),,
internal_paths_rew
  (D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ TD} F y, 
   F x ⊗_{ TD} F y ⟧)
  (((pr11 α) x · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
   ⊗^{ TD} ((pr11 α) y
            · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y))
  (λ p : D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ TD} F y,
         F x ⊗_{ TD} F y ⟧,
   p =
   identity (pr1 F x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 F y))
  (maponpaths
     (λ l : D ⟦ pr1 F x, pr1 F x ⟧,
      l
      ⊗^{ TD} ((pr11 α) y
               · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y))
     (pr122 α_natisox) @
   maponpaths
     (tensor_on_hom TD 
        (pr1 F x) (pr1 F x) 
        (F y) (F y)
        (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (pr122 α_natisoy) @
   tensor_id TD (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y))
  ((pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y
   · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
     ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)
  (tensor_comp TD (F x) 
     (G x) (F x) (F y) 
     (G y) (F y) ((pr11 α) x)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
     ((pr11 α) y)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)): z_iso
  (pr1 G x
   ⊗_{ TD
       :
       tensor (D : univalent_category)} 
   pr1 G y)
  (pr1 F x
   ⊗_{ TD
       :
       tensor (D : univalent_category)} 
   pr1 F y)
(pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y · pr1 ptD x y =
pr1 ptC x y · α (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: ∏ x y : C, pr1 ptC x y · α (x ⊗_{ TC} y) = α x ⊗^{ TD} α y · pr1 ptD x y
x, y: C
α_natiso:= invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α: nat_z_iso F G
α_natisox:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
:
z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x): z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)
α_natisoy:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
:
z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y): z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y)
α_natisoxty:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
  (x
   ⊗_{ TC
       :
       tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
:
z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)): z_iso
  (pr1 F
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
  (pr1 G
     (x
      ⊗_{ TC
          :
          tensor
            (C : univalent_category)} y))
α_natisotxmym:= pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y,,
(pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y,,
internal_paths_rew
  (D ⟦ G x ⊗_{ TD} G y, 
   G x ⊗_{ TD} G y ⟧)
  ((pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x · (pr11 α) x)
   ⊗^{ TD} (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
            · (pr11 α) y))
  (λ p : D ⟦ G x ⊗_{ TD} G y,
         G x ⊗_{ TD} G y ⟧,
   p =
   identity (pr1 G x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 G y))
  (maponpaths
     (λ l : D ⟦ pr1 G x, pr1 G x ⟧,
      l
      ⊗^{ TD} (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
               · (pr11 α) y))
     (pr222 α_natisox) @
   maponpaths
     (tensor_on_hom TD 
        (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x) 
        (G y) (G y)
        (identity (pr1 G x)))
     (pr222 α_natisoy) @
   tensor_id TD (pr1 G x) (pr1 G y))
  (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
   ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
   · (pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y)
  (tensor_comp TD (G x) 
     (F x) (G x) (G y) 
     (F y) (G y)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
     ((pr11 α) x)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)
     ((pr11 α) y)),,
internal_paths_rew
  (D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ TD} F y, 
   F x ⊗_{ TD} F y ⟧)
  (((pr11 α) x · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
   ⊗^{ TD} ((pr11 α) y
            · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y))
  (λ p : D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ TD} F y,
         F x ⊗_{ TD} F y ⟧,
   p =
   identity (pr1 F x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 F y))
  (maponpaths
     (λ l : D ⟦ pr1 F x, pr1 F x ⟧,
      l
      ⊗^{ TD} ((pr11 α) y
               · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y))
     (pr122 α_natisox) @
   maponpaths
     (tensor_on_hom TD 
        (pr1 F x) (pr1 F x) 
        (F y) (F y)
        (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (pr122 α_natisoy) @
   tensor_id TD (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y))
  ((pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y
   · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
     ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)
  (tensor_comp TD (F x) 
     (G x) (F x) (F y) 
     (G y) (F y) ((pr11 α) x)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
     ((pr11 α) y)
     (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)): z_iso
  (pr1 G x
   ⊗_{ TD
       :
       tensor (D : univalent_category)} 
   pr1 G y)
  (pr1 F x
   ⊗_{ TD
       :
       tensor (D : univalent_category)} 
   pr1 F y)
(pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y · pr1 ptD x y =
pr1 ptC x y · α (x ⊗_{ TC} y)

      apply pathsinv0, ptc.
    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
α: invertible_2cell F G
TC: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat C
TD: bidisp_tensor_disp_bicat D
ptC: TC -->[ F] TD
ptD: TC -->[ G] TD
ptc: disp_2cells α ptC ptD
(λ y : disp_2cells α ^-1%bicategory ptD ptC,
 disp_vcomp2 ptc y =
 transportb
   (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats F F,
    disp_2cells α ptC ptC) (vcomp_rinv α)
   (disp_id2 ptC)
 × disp_vcomp2 y ptc =
   transportb
     (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_univ_cats G G,
      disp_2cells α ptD ptD) (vcomp_linv α)
     (disp_id2 ptD))
  ((λ x y : C,
    let α_natiso :=
      invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso F G α in
    let α_natisox :=
      nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso x
      :
      z_iso (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) in
    let α_natisoy :=
      nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso y
      :
      z_iso (pr1 F y) (pr1 G y) in
    let α_natisoxty :=
      nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α_natiso
        (x ⊗_{ TC : tensor (C : univalent_category)} y)
      :
      z_iso
        (pr1 F
           (x
            ⊗_{ TC : tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
        (pr1 G
           (x
            ⊗_{ TC : tensor (C : univalent_category)} y))
      in
    let α_natisotxmym :=
      pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
      ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y,,
      (pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y,,
      internal_paths_rew
        (D ⟦ G x ⊗_{ TD} G y, G x ⊗_{ TD} G y ⟧)
        ((pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x · (pr11 α) x)
         ⊗^{ TD} (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y · (pr11 α) y))
        (λ p : D ⟦ G x ⊗_{ TD} G y, G x ⊗_{ TD} G y ⟧,
         p = identity (pr1 G x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 G y))
        (maponpaths
           (λ l : D ⟦ pr1 G x, pr1 G x ⟧,
            l
            ⊗^{ TD} (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
                     · (pr11 α) y)) (pr222 α_natisox) @
         maponpaths
           (tensor_on_hom TD (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x) (G y)
              (G y) (identity (pr1 G x)))
           (pr222 α_natisoy) @
         tensor_id TD (pr1 G x) (pr1 G y))
        (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
         ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y
         · (pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y)
        (tensor_comp TD (G x) (F x) (G x) (G y) (F y)
           (G y) (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x) ((pr11 α) x)
           (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y) ((pr11 α) y)),,
      internal_paths_rew
        (D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ TD} F y, F x ⊗_{ TD} F y ⟧)
        (((pr11 α) x · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
         ⊗^{ TD} ((pr11 α) y · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y))
        (λ p : D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ TD} F y, F x ⊗_{ TD} F y ⟧,
         p = identity (pr1 F x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 F y))
        (maponpaths
           (λ l : D ⟦ pr1 F x, pr1 F x ⟧,
            l
            ⊗^{ TD} ((pr11 α) y
                     · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y))
           (pr122 α_natisox) @
         maponpaths
           (tensor_on_hom TD (pr1 F x) (pr1 F x) (F y)
              (F y) (identity (pr1 F x)))
           (pr122 α_natisoy) @
         tensor_id TD (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y))
        ((pr11 α) x ⊗^{ TD} (pr11 α) y
         · pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x
           ⊗^{ TD} pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)
        (tensor_comp TD (F x) (G x) (F x) (F y) (G y)
           (F y) ((pr11 α) x) (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory x)
           ((pr11 α) y) (pr1 α ^-1%bicategory y)) in
    z_iso_inv_to_left (pr1 G x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 G y)
      (pr1 F x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 F y) (F (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
      α_natisotxmym (pr1 ptC x y)
      (pr1 ptD x y · α ^-1%bicategory (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (D ⟦ pr1 F x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 F y, F (x ⊗_{ TC} y)
          ⟧)
         (inv_from_z_iso α_natisotxmym
          · (pr1 ptD x y
             · α ^-1%bicategory (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))
         (inv_from_z_iso α_natisotxmym · pr1 ptD x y
          · α ^-1%bicategory (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
         (λ p : D ⟦ pr1 F x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 F y,
                F (x ⊗_{ TC} y) ⟧, p = pr1 ptC x y)
         (! z_iso_inv_on_left
              (pr1 F x ⊗_{ TD} pr1 F y)
              (pr1 F (x ⊗_{ TC} y))
              (pr1 G (x ⊗_{ TC} y)) (pr1 ptC x y)
              α_natisoxty
              (inv_from_z_iso α_natisotxmym
               · pr1 ptD x y)
              (! ptc x y
               :
               inv_from_z_iso α_natisotxmym
               · pr1 ptD x y =
               pr1 ptC x y · α_natisoxty))
         (assoc (inv_from_z_iso α_natisotxmym)
            (pr1 ptD x y)
            (α ^-1%bicategory (x ⊗_{ TC} y)))))
   :
   disp_2cells α ^-1%bicategory ptD ptC)
 split ; apply isaprop_bidisp_tensor_disp_2cell_struct.
  Qed.

End TensorLayer.
